Void Breath.description: The ravener breathes a blast of necrotic flame that deals @Damage[20d6[fire]] damage plus @Damage[4d6[persistent,void]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:44|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:drained] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure). If a creature is drained by the ravener's Void Breath, the ravener's soul ward gains 5 HP. The ravener can't use Void Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Void Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Smoke Vision.name: Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description: Smoke doesn't impair a cinder ravener's vision; it ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Soulsense 60 feet.name: Soulsense 60 feet
Soulsense 60 feet.description: A ravener senses the spiritual essence of living and undead creatures within the listed range. Creatures whose material bodies are one unit with their souls, like celestials and fiends, appear brighter to this sense.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal.name: 对抗原能的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal

Cowering Fear.name: Cowering Fear
Cowering Fear.description:
90 feet. @Check[will|dc:42|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened,inflicts:immobilized]

A ravener's frightful presence causes creatures to cower in fear as well. As long as a creature is at least @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} or more as a result of the ravener's frightful presence, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} from the fear.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.FrightfulPresence]

Discorporate.name: Discorporate
Discorporate.description:
Trigger The ravener takes excess damage to their soul ward but still has at least 51 Hit Points in their soul ward

Effect The ravener draws deeply into their soul ward, discorporating their body into soul energy to escape. They take@Damage[50[untyped]] damage to their soul ward and their physical body vanishes, reappearing [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours} later in a random location within 1 mile from the location where they used Discorporate.

Soul Ward.name: Soul Ward
Soul Ward.description:
200 HP

An intangible field of necromantic energy protects a ravener from total destruction. A soul ward has 150 maximum Hit Points, or 200 if the ravener is level 21 or higher. Whenever a ravener would be reduced below 1 Hit Point, all damage in excess of what would reduce them to 1 Hit Point is instead dealt to their soul ward. If this damage reduces the soul ward to fewer than 0 Hit Points, the ravener is destroyed. A soul ward's Hit Points can be restored only via specific ravener abilities such as Consume Soul, Void Breath, or vicious criticals. A ravener who goes more than a week without successfully using Consume Soul to feed on a dying creature starves, and their soul ward loses 1d4 Hit Points each day until they feed. If the ravener's soul ward loses all its Hit Points while the ravener still has more than 1 HP, they become a ravener husk.

All Becomes Flame.name: All Becomes Flame
All Becomes Flame.description:
The ravener curses a creature within 60 feet to have their magic replaced with primordial flames. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:42] save. Regardless of the result, the target becomes temporarily immune for 1 day. Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is cursed for 1 round. While cursed, any spells that the creature casts gain the fire trait and have their damage type changed to fire damage, regardless of the original damage type or types of the spell. Additionally, any magical items that the cursed target holds or wields are affected in the same manner, such as changing the cold damage of a frost rune to fire damage. The cursed creature can attempt to temporarily suppress the curse as an action, which has the concentrate trait. If the creature succeeds a @Check[will|dc:42] save, the curse is suppressed until the end of their turn.

Failure As success, but the curse's duration is 1 hour.

Critical Failure As success, but the curse's duration is 1 day, and the DC to suppress the curse increases to DC 44.

Consume Soul.name: Consume Soul
Consume Soul.description:
Trigger A living creature within 30 feet of the ravener dies

Effect The ravener tears the creature's soul from its body with their maw and gulps it down. The dying creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:44] save with the same DC as the ravener's breath ability.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The ravener tears off a small chunk of the creature's soul. If the victim is restored to life, they are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} in addition to any other side effects of returning to life. The ravener adds a number of Hit Points to their soul ward equal to half the creature's level.

Failure As success, but the creature's soul is ravaged. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3} and the ravener adds a number of Hit Points to their soul ward equal to the creature's level.

Critical Failure As failure, but the ravener devours the entire soul. The victim can't be restored to life as long as the ravener exists except via powerful magic such as a wish ritual, and the ravener adds a number of Hit Points to their soul ward equal to twice the creature's level.

Manipulate Flames.name: Manipulate Flames
Manipulate Flames.description: The ravener intensifies nearby fires. Every foe within 60 feet taking persistent fire damage takes @Damage[5d6[fire]] damage.

Vicious Criticals.name: Vicious Criticals
Vicious Criticals.description: The ravener treats an attack roll as a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20, as long as the attack roll was a success. Additionally, whenever the ravener makes a critical hit with one of their Strikes, the target must succeed on a @Check[fortitude|dc:42] save or gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} condition. If the target already has a drained value of greater than 0, their drained value instead increases by 1, to a maximum of drained 4. Whenever the ravener applies drain to a creature in this way, their soul ward gains 5 Hit Points.

Ravener.name: Ravener
Ravener.publicNotes:
The ravener presented here was once an ancient cinder dragon.

Though their lifespans can measure in millennia, all dragons must eventually perish. While many do so on the blades or under the spells of dragonslayers, some manage to outlast their enemies and must, in time, face the truth that awaits all living creatures at the end of their natural life span. As with many other creatures, some dragons respond to such looming reminders of their own mortality poorly, and the particularly prideful or wrathful of their kind often lash out in anger when confronted by this grim truth. Peace and acceptance are found by some dragons, but the most stubborn of their ilk (and invariably the most wicked) can pursue a different answer to the problem. These dragons seek out sinister rites that can transform them into undead creatures known as raveners.

A ravener's flesh is stripped away as part of the transformation, leaving only bones. What they lose in flesh, however, the dragon gains in soul-rending power, as their spiritual energy forms a protective barrier around their body, keeping it intact and allowing flight with now-skeletal wings. This existence isn't as easy to maintain as other forms of undeath, however, and the ravener must feed regularly on living souls to power their profane metabolism. Their hunger is much greater than that of a living dragon, so raveners are forced to relocate regularly, traveling to fresh hunting grounds each time they strip their current home of prey.
Ravener.allSaves: 对抗原能的全豁免+2状态加值

Esipil.name: Esipil
Esipil.publicNotes:
Among the least of the sahkils, esipils delight in spreading fears and uncertainty among people who live with animals that could turn on them. They generally appear to their prey as some benign creature such as a domesticated dog or cat, but once they gain trust and get their victims close, they transform into a terrifying creature that looks part dog and part worm with tendrils of viscera that the creature uses as both a tongue and a weapon.

Of all the sahkils, esipils are most likely to ingratiate themselves with mortals, sometimes serving powerful spellcasters and other times simply living among unsuspecting victims, biding their time until they strike.

Ages ago, when this cycle of the multiverse was still adolescent, a cabal of psychopomps who already felt bored and restrained in their role of ushering souls to their ultimate resting place rebelled against their station. It was this corruption of the cycle of souls that spawned the first sahkils.

Ambivalent to the prescribed order of the multiverse and spiteful of mortals, sahkils delight in spreading fear and unease to all beings, clogging up the metaphysical cycle with anxiety-ridden mortals too scared to achieve their potential. These fiends have drastically changed from their dedicated psychopomp predecessors. They are creatures of spite and torment, fear and disgust. They exploit the most common and rare fears for their own perverse satisfaction, and they want nothing more than to frighten mortals and make them quetion their reason for existence.

Most sahkils lurk on the Ethereal Plane, but they frequently invade the Material Plane to torment mortals and spread terror. They use their innate ability to slip between the veils of the Ethereal and Material effortlessly, often stalking their targets for days or weeks before enacting their devious plots.

Easy to Call.name: Easy to Call
Easy to Call.description: A esipil's level is considered 2 lower for the purpose of being conjured by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2ykmAVKrsAWcazcC]{Binding Circle} ritual (and potentially other rituals, at the GM's discretion), but it is always free to attack or leave instead of negotiate unless the primary caster's check is a critical success.

Change Shape.name: Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
The esipil transforms into a Tiny cat, dog, or other unassuming domestic animal. This doesn't affect the esipil's statistics, but it could change the damage type of its Strikes.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Skip Between.name: Skip Between
Skip Between.description: The sahkil moves from the Universe to the Ethereal Plane or vice-versa. While in the Ethereal Plane, they're unable to affect anything in the Universe, and they cannot be seen by beings or abilities in the Universe, unless these have an ability that can gaze into the Ethereal Plane. While on the Material Plane the inverse is true for anything on the Ethereal Plane. A summoned sahkil can't use Skip Between.

Dislocating Breath.name: 错位吐息 Dislocating Breath
Dislocating Breath.description: 相位龙吐出一股将生物撕裂的能量旋涡，在@Template[type:cone|distance:40]范围内造成@Damage[12d6[force]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。相位龙可以传送任何豁免失败的生物，将其向任意方向传送最多40尺（若大失败则传送距离加倍）。目标位置必须为地面且位于无危害的空间。相位龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dislocating Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用错位吐息。

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: 相位龙以任意顺序进行两次爪抓打击和一次尾扫打击。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane.name: 对抗奥术的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane

Shoo!.name: 走开！ Shoo!
Shoo!.description:
触发 一个15尺内的敌人对相位龙造成伤害

效果 相位龙将该生物传送至最多25尺远的地方。目标位置必须为地面且位于无危害的空间。

Unerring Location.name: 精准定位 Unerring Location
Unerring Location.description: 相位龙自动尝试反制任何以其为目标的传送效果（反制环级7环级，反制调整值[[/r 1d20+25 #Counteract]]{+25}）。相位龙也可以选择正常受到影响。其他被同一效果选为目标的生物会照常受到影响。

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之威势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: 相位龙的打击重击时，恢复错位吐息的使用次数，或恢复一个已消耗的传送法术。

Phase Jump.name: 相位跳跃 Phase Jump
Phase Jump.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 相位龙传送最多75尺。如果它们正在空中飞行，它们将保持动量，这使它即使没有使用飞行动作，在回合结束时也不会坠落。

Portal Strike.name: 传送打击 Portal Strike
Portal Strike.description: 相位龙短暂开启一个小型传送门，对75尺范围内的一个生物进行一次爪抓打击。目标对该打击处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]状态。

Phase Dragon (Adult).name: 成年相位龙 Phase Dragon (Adult)
Phase Dragon (Adult).publicNotes: 没有任何地方能限制相位龙，甚至没有任何地方能够长时间吸引它们的兴趣；它们与生俱来的奥术联系使它们与传送和移位魔法紧密相连。作为探索者和学者，相位龙随心所欲地四处游荡，探索新的地点和传送的奥秘。它们常在反复造访的遥远之地建立多处巢穴。除了巢穴中常见的财富外，相位龙更倾向于珍藏旅途中具有情感价值的物品——比如当地特有的珍稀花卉，或当地艺术家的创作。

Animated Trebuchet.name: Animated Trebuchet
Animated Trebuchet.publicNotes:
Large armies sometimes pay exorbitant fees to animate their siege weapons.

Many animated objects have useful functions but become dangers when uncontrolled.

Construct Armor (Hardness 14).name: Construct Armor (Hardness 14)
Construct Armor (Hardness 14).description: Like normal objects, an animated trebuchet has Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage the trebuchet takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once an animated trebuchet is reduced to fewer than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks, removing the Hardness and reducing its Armor Class to 32.

Launch.name: Launch
Launch.description:
Requirements The animated trebuchet has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in its arm.

Effect The animated trebuchet attempts an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude] check against the grabbed creature's Fortitude DC.

On a success, it fires the creature up to 40 feet in height and up to 120 feet away. The creature takes @Damage[4d12[bludgeoning]] damage plus the appropriate falling damage. If the flung creature lands on another creature, the creature it lands on takes the same amount of bludgeoning damage (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic] save).

On a successful Launch, the animated trebuchet must Interact to reposition its arm into the proper position before it can Launch again.

Drain Blood.name: 吸血 Drain Blood
Drain Blood.description:
需求 一个处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]状态或自愿的生物在血鬼婆的触及内

效果 鬼婆将尖牙插进生物体内饮用其血。如果受害者处于受擒状态，这需要一次成功对抗受害者强韧DC的运动检定，而其他状态则自动成功。受害者陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}。鬼婆恢复15点生命值，获得的任何过量生命值将作为持续1小时的临时生命值。从已经陷入流失状态的生物吸血不会恢复鬼婆任何生命值，但是会增加1点受害者的流失状态值，当达到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}时会杀死受害者。

受害者的流失状态每周减少1。输血需要一次成功的@Check[medicine|dc:20]检定，以及足够的血液或献血者，能在经历10分钟后减少1点流失状态值。

Bloodsense (Imprecise) 90 feet.name: 血液感知（模糊） 90尺 Bloodsense (Imprecise) 90 feet
Bloodsense (Imprecise) 90 feet.description: 血鬼婆可以感知到血液和拥有血液的生物的存在。她能够分辨出溅落的血液和活物体内血液的不同。

Borrowed Skin.name: 借用皮肤 Borrowed Skin
Borrowed Skin.description:
血鬼婆穿着一张从她杀死的类人生物那里偷来的皮肤，隐藏了她的真实形态。她外貌与所穿戴皮肤所属生物相同，包括侦测该生物的法术也不能识破。生物仍然如@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]动作描述中所述，有可能侦测出伪装。

在皮肤内洒上粗盐可以阻止鬼婆将它穿回去，迫使她保持火焰形态，直到她杀死另一个类人生物，并花费1小时将其制成新的伪装。

Coven.name: 巫团 Coven
Coven.description:
血鬼婆能将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.NzXpEzcZAjuDTZjK]， @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XS7Wyh5YC0NWeWyB]和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Uqj344bezBq3ESdq]添加到巫团法术中。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

Assume Fiery Form.name: 展现火焰形态 Assume Fiery Form
Assume Fiery Form.description:
血鬼婆褪去她借来的皮肤，变成一团明亮的火球。她变得不定型（允许她穿过至少1尺宽的缝隙，而无需挤入，且在挤入时能以全速移动），获得火焰特征以及60尺飞行速度，变得免疫火焰，并如同火炬一样发光。她失去近战打击，且不能使用吸血，但当她会对每个接触她的生物造成@Damage[4d6[fire]|options:area-damage]伤害，进行@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic]豁免，包括由从一处相邻方格使用无武装攻击或武器攻击命中她的生物。如果她的皮肤未受损且她与皮肤相邻，则她可以使用交互来进入皮肤内从而返回其通常形态。

鬼婆也可以用一个单动作使用展现火焰形态能力，在一团烈焰中冲破她的皮肤。这样做会摧毁她借用的皮肤，并对@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]范围内所有生物造成@Damage[9d6[fire]|options:area-damage]伤害 ，进行DC 26的基础反射豁免。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.H99PJXU5cvJ4Oycm]

Blood Hag.name: 血鬼婆 Blood Hag
Blood Hag.publicNotes:
血鬼婆，亦被称作吸血女妖（soucouyant），常伪装成纯真少女潜入聚落中。这种伪装绝非幻术，因为血鬼婆会穿上之前受害者的皮肤来隐藏她的真实外貌。在白天，她的伪装几乎是完美的。但在日落之后，这个生物就会褪下她的皮，藏在安全所在，在夜间狩猎畅饮鲜血为生。

血鬼婆能够以火球的形态快速移动，穿过钥匙孔或者门和窗户上最小的缝隙，以熟睡的受害者为食，然后在黎明到来前回家披上她们偷来的皮肤。

鬼婆是来历不明的诡异掠食者，最臭名昭著的便是以孩童和年轻人为猎物。她们无一例外呈现女性外貌，在日常生活中通常伪装成凡人女性。她们强大的魔法与操纵手段让让她们能引诱天真脆弱的猎物，在绑架或吞噬之前，先将受害者折磨得体无完肤以满足其虐待狂的欲望。典型的鬼婆皆以虚荣心和控制欲为特征。虽可能存在恶意较弱的鬼婆，但此类存在往往深藏不露，既为躲避冒险者的追捕，亦为逃避其喜爱虐待的亲族。

Runic Breath.name: 符文吐息 Runic Breath
Runic Breath.description: 符文龙释放数百枚一触即爆的符文，在@Template[type:cone|distance:30]范围内造成@Damage[9d6[untyped]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。此能力的伤害类型由变幻符文决定。豁免失败的生物还会受到爆裂符文的影响。符文龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Runic Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用符文吐息。

Shifting Runes.name: 变幻符文 Shifting Runes
Shifting Runes.description: 符文龙选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或音波伤害类型。蚀刻在其鳞片上的符文随之变幻，形成该能量类型的符文。符文龙获得对该伤害类型的免疫，且其爆裂符文与符文吐息均造成该类型伤害。任何在奥法上受训的生物无需检定即可立即识别蚀刻符文的能量类型。

equipment-Common runes of 5th level or l.name: 刻在鳞片上的常见符文（5级或更低） Common runes of 5th level or lower etched upon their scales

Magic Sense.name: 魔法感知 Magic Sense
Magic Sense.description: 符文龙能感知到列出范围内所有激活的魔法能力与效果。当符文龙进行搜寻时，它在列出范围内获得4环级侦测魔法法术的效果（此外还获得搜寻的正常好处）。

Runic Scales.name: 符文鳞片 Runic Scales
Runic Scales.description: 符文龙的鳞片作为符文石存在。符文龙不能使用蚀刻在其鳞片上的符文的效果或能力，但它们可以将其转移到适当的物品上。以这种方式向物品转移或从物品上转移一个符文需要1分钟，在此期间符文龙处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]状态。该过程自动完成无需检定，但如果符文龙在此过程中停止或受到打扰，符文将被摧毁。符文龙可以在其鳞片上蚀刻任意数量的符文，但它们通常一次只在鳞片上蚀刻少数符文。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane.name: 对抗奥术的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane

Retributive Rune.name: 惩戒符文 Retributive Rune
Retributive Rune.description:
触发 一个15尺内的生物对符文龙造成伤害

效果 伴随着符文魔法的爆发，符文龙对触发生物使用爆裂符文能力，若符文未自动引爆则立即将其引爆。

Detonating Rune.name: 爆裂符文 Detonating Rune
Detonating Rune.description: 符文龙的打击与能力可以在目标身上留下一个爆裂符文。如果一个生物在已经拥有一个爆裂符文的情况下将要获得另一个爆裂符文，则不会新增一个符文，而是会激活其当前的爆裂符文，消耗该符文并对目标造成@Damage[4d6[untyped]]伤害。爆裂符文的伤害类型与符文龙当前变幻符文的类型一致。生物可以使用一个交互动作移除该符文。如果爆裂符文没有引爆，则在1分钟后消散。

Rune Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).name: 青年符文龙施法者 Rune Dragon (Young, Spellcaster)
Rune Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 符文龙天生对符文的力量有着深刻的洞察。大多数符文龙的鳞片上刻有各种符文，它们的身体可以魔法般地增强这些符文的力量。符文龙通常不自己施法，而是依靠它们即兴创造符文的能力来产生所需的效果。符文龙常常把自己的财宝称为图书馆，因为它们的财宝中充满了由不同文化的人们使用多种语言写成的重要历史文献、戏剧、演讲、教科书和法术书。尽管它们通常可以借助魔法说某种语言，但它们更喜欢在讲者的语境中学习语言，以便理解其中隐藏的细微差别和符号中的魔力。

Theletos.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Envisioning.name: 心相 Envisioning
Envisioning.description: 当命运御衡者传递信息时，它会使用无声的心能投影。该行动是一种具有100尺范围的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.kdhbPaBMK1d1fpbA]，且所有生物都可以理解，无论其是否掌握语言。心相传递的含义对于非御衡者来说是模糊的，通常神秘晦涩。不过命运御衡者可以用这种能力完美与处于相同位面的其他御衡者进行交流。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Fate Drain.name: 命运流失 Fate Drain
Fate Drain.description:
被命运御衡者的触须伤害的生物必须成功通过一次@Check[will|dc:22]豁免，否则会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}。

只要生物处于呆滞状态，它就不能从幸运效果中获益。如果目标在对抗此能力的豁免上再次失败，那么状态值便会加1（最多到呆滞4）。次状态值每24小时减少1。

Wrath of Fate.name: 命运之怒 Wrath of Fate
Wrath of Fate.description:
命运御衡者以自身为中心释放一道@Template[cone|distance:60]的能量。锥形范围内的生物被各种命运的知识所吞没，这些知识包含着各种潜在的命运而缺乏通往这些潜在未来的明确途径。他们必须成功通过一次@Check[will|dc:26]豁免，否则无期限地陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。

受影响的生物在尝试攻击，豁免，技能检定时，掷骰两次，并取较低的结果。无论结果如何，该生物在进行掷骰后不再缓慢。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.QSy3KaLI1AYTR7rP]

命运御衡者不能在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Wrath of Fate]]{1d4轮}内再次使用命运之怒。

Theletos.name: 命运御衡者 Theletos
Theletos.publicNotes: 命运御衡者维持着既定天命和自由意志之间的平衡。命运御衡者近乎是一个水晶球体，从中延伸出四肢，每条肢体在肘部又分裂成两条有三根手指的手。其身体上还长有一对水晶触须。那些被命运御衡者触须所伤害的人，会陷入一个迷失的困境中，因为他们会感觉到要被迫做出一个单一抉择，然而同时又面临着无穷无尽的选项待选。命运御衡者比其他大多数御衡者更有可能去干扰非御衡者社会，尤其偏好严苛法典的区域。命运御衡者既关注个体的自由，又关注去限制这些个体的法律，即便（或者说尤其是）当两者对立时。

Unnatural Shriek.name: Unnatural Shriek
Unnatural Shriek.description:
The argorth emits a terrible howl not of the mortal world. Each non-aberration creature within 120 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:30|options:area-effect,inflicts:frightened] save. Regardless of the result, a creature is temporarily immune to the argorth's Unnatural Shriek for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is stupefed 1 for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is stupefed 2 for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Bloodsense.name: Bloodsense
Bloodsense.description: The argorth can detect any creature that has a heartbeat, such as most humanoids, or any creature that's consumed blood within 1 week, such as a vampire.

Death Slam.name: Death Slam
Death Slam.description:
Trigger The argorth is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect Before it's knocked out, the argorth makes a tail Strike against a random creature within reach.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description:
The argorth can only Constrict creatures @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by its tail.

@Damage[(2d8+7)[bludgeoning]], @Check[fortitude|dc:27|basic]

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Constrict]

Ground Pound.name: Ground Pound
Ground Pound.description: The argorth rears up its massive bulk and slams it downward with incredible force. Each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] takes @Damage[5d8[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:27|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:prone] save). A creature who critically fails this save is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Argorth.name: Argorth
Argorth.publicNotes:
An argorth is a huge, worm-like creature with three massive spiked mandibles surrounding its gnashing maw. It moves atop a series of hook-shaped bones protruding from its underbelly, supplemented by an occasional push with the back half of its 30-foot length. The mindless, eyeless argorth knows nothing but rage and destruction, making it more like a natural disaster than any known beast of the natural world.

Argorths are the incomprehensible spawn of dibrasgorths. They slough off fully formed from the parent creature's mass of tentacles, though scholars and sages don't know exactly when or why this process occurs. The study of such aberrations is hindered by their incredibly violent nature; not many can escape the fury of an argorth, let alone a molting dibrasgorth. Once birthed, an argorth immediately engages in the wanton destruction of everything around it. Though it has no eyes, both its ability to instinctively sense creatures with pumping blood as well as the thousands of tiny coarse hairs covering its body allowing it to "smell" the air around it ensure that nothing escapes its rampage.

Giant Leech.name: Giant Leech
Giant Leech.publicNotes: Capable of growing to lengths of nearly 5 feet, giant leeches have circular maws filled with hook-like teeth. They prefer to dwell in stagnant or slow-moving shallow water or in damp, moist undergrowth. Horses and larger animals are their favorite prey, but they won't balk at a chance to latch onto a human- or halfling-sized meal.

Blood Drain.name: Blood Drain
Blood Drain.description:
Requirements The giant leech has a living creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The giant leech drains blood from the creature it has grabbed or restrained. This deals @Damage[2d4[piercing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic] save). A creature that takes any damage from having its blood drained by a giant leech is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} until it receives any kind or amount of healing.

Adaptive Strike.name: 自适应打击 Adaptive Strike
Adaptive Strike.description:
纳乌奈特选择精金、寒铁或银；他的近战打击被视为该类型的材质，持续1分钟或直至他再次使用自适应打击为止

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.361dIAAhiZE0wg8v]

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
纳乌奈特呈现出任意小型、中型或大型动物、魔兽或类人生物的外观。这不会改变他的速度或其打击的攻击与伤害加值，但这有可能改变他的打击所造成的伤害类型。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Entropy Sense (Imprecise) 30 feet.name: 熵力感知（模糊）30尺 Entropy Sense (Imprecise) 30 feet
Entropy Sense (Imprecise) 30 feet.description: 幻蛇能通过对混乱的概率与机运的超自然洞察力来预测到生物最可能存在的位置。这会赋予它在所列范围内感知生物的能力。回避帷幕（Veil of privacy）可阻止生物被熵力感知自动侦测到（若未通过反制检定）。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Protean Anatomy 10.name: 幻蛇体质10 Protean Anatomy 10
Protean Anatomy 10.description:
幻蛇的要害器官会不断地变形和改变位置。当幻蛇承受酸蚀、电击或音波伤害后，它会立即获得抗力数据中所列数值的对应伤害抗力。这会持续1小时或直至幻蛇承受上述伤害类型中的其他种类为止（在这种情况下，幻蛇的抗力会再度变换并与该类型相匹配），以较先发生者为准。除非幻蛇自身自愿，否则它对变形效果免疫。若陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]，幻蛇会在它的下个回合结束时自动恢复，因为新的感受器官已经形成并取代了受损的器官。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.c6SiBB3mzV8lZUQr]

Confounding Slam.name: 错乱猛击 Confounding Slam
Confounding Slam.description: 被纳乌奈特的触手打击命中的生物会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}，持续[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}（@Check[will|dc:25]，通过则无效）。若该生物已经以此方式陷入呆滞，那么该效果的持续时间会延长1轮作为替代。

Naunet.name: 纳乌奈特 Naunet
Naunet.publicNotes:
好斗且肌肉壮硕的纳乌奈特是幻蛇军队中的斥候和普通士兵。

幻蛇是混沌以肉身构筑的表现形式，这些大漩涡的居民以蛇形的姿态表现着熵的原始力量。他们遵循的制度松散混乱、变化多端，但共享着可扩展又易消逝的理念。
Naunet.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Requiem Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).name: 古安魂龙施法者 Requiem Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster)
Requiem Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 安魂龙是灵魂之河（River of Souls）的守护者，负责引导灵魂抵达其在来世的最终归宿。灵魂的安全旅程对安魂龙至关重要，一些安魂龙会从灵魂首次进入灵魂之河开始，直到它们在骨园的审判，最终引导灵魂到达它们最终的安息之地。大多数安魂龙将自己与特定的位面绑定，负责守护所有进入该位面的灵魂，导致这些龙与天堂或地狱等地方相关联，尽管这些龙从不对这些位面宣誓效忠。安魂龙将它们的巢穴建在灵魂之河沿岸——这些巢穴是从其他位面拯救出来的沉重建筑拼接而成——并充满了无价的记录和伟大成就的纪念物。

Soul Journey.name: 灵魂之旅 Soul Journey
Soul Journey.description: 安魂龙花费1小时穿越位面通道进入灵魂之河，然后可以到达灵魂之河的任意位置。这具备@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]效果，但安魂龙能够精确到达任何主要位面上的地点。

Status Sight.name: 状态视觉 Status Sight
Status Sight.description: 安魂龙会自动知晓它能看到的所有生物的生命值。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Divine.name: 对抗神术全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Divine

Soul Anchor.name: 灵魂锚定 Soul Anchor
Soul Anchor.description:
触发 一个60尺内的生物的生命值将降至0

效果 安魂龙将触发生物的灵魂锚定于其躯体，该生物的生命值保持在1点，陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 2}，并获得与安魂龙等级相等的快速治疗，持续1分钟。该生物在24小时内暂时免疫灵魂锚定效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.k8bmDh3nWi2FUyz5]

Withhold Death.name: 阻止死亡 Withhold Death
Withhold Death.description:
触发 安魂龙被一次攻击重击

效果 安魂龙抵抗灵魂的松动，减少部分伤害。安魂针对触发攻击获得20点所有伤害类型的抗力。

Dooming Breath.name: 毁灭吐息 Dooming Breath
Dooming Breath.description: 安魂龙从口中喷出来自创生熔炉的能量，在@Template[type:line|distance:120]范围内造成@Damage[16d8[spirit]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。豁免失败的不死生物还必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:42|options:area-effect,inflicts:doomed]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 1}。如果目标已陷入毁灭，则毁灭值增加1（最多为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 4}）。安魂龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dooming Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用毁灭吐息。

Redirect River.name: 河流改道 Redirect River
Redirect River.description: 安魂龙利用自己的身体作为连接引导灵魂之河的一部分。河流在安魂龙周围涌动，形成@Template[type:emanation|distance:15]区域的灵性激流，持续1轮，该区域对其他所有生物视为困难地形。此外，在区域内开始回合或每轮首次进入区域的生物必须成功通过@Check[fortitude|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:drained,inflicts:doomed]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{力竭 Drained 1}与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 1}。如果目标已处于流失或毁灭状态，则其状态值增加1（最多为4）。安魂龙可以维持此效果。

Soul Shield.name: 灵魂护盾 Soul Shield
Soul Shield.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 安魂龙利用其生命精华在60尺内的一个生物周围创造出一个精魂能量护盾。此护盾与生物建立了一个连接，效果与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.d7Lwx6KAs47MtF0q]相似，区别在于该效果不会因距离而中断，并持续1小时。此外，该生物获得对物理和精魂伤害的10点抗力，适用于其所承受伤害的一半。安魂龙可以解消该效果。

Revived Retaliation.name: Revived Retaliation
Revived Retaliation.description:
Trigger The opossum is attacked or disturbed by a creature within reach while Feigning Death

Effect The opossum Strikes the triggering creature.

Grasping Tail.name: Grasping Tail
Grasping Tail.description: A giant opossum can drag a Small or Tiny creature it has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} with its tail along with it when it Strides.

+2 Circumstance to All Saves vs. Disease.name: +2 Circumstance to All Saves vs. Disease

Feign Death.name: Feign Death
Feign Death.description:
Trigger The opossum is reduced below 15 HP

Effect The opossum collapses. It is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and can use actions that require only its mind, but any other action ends the ruse.

A successful @Check[perception|dc:18|traits:action:seek] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} or @Check[medicine|dc:18|traits:action:recall-knowledge] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} is required to determine that the animal is not, in fact, dead.

Giant Opossum.name: Giant Opossum
Giant Opossum.publicNotes:
Larger species of opossum can eat nearly anything human-sized or smaller.

Few creatures have survived as long and in as many environments as the opossum.
Giant Opossum.allSaves: +2 circumstance to all saves vs. disease

Phase Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: 成年相位龙施法者 Phase Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)
Phase Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 没有任何地方能限制相位龙，甚至没有任何地方能够长时间吸引它们的兴趣；它们与生俱来的奥术联系使它们与传送和移位魔法紧密相连。作为探索者和学者，相位龙随心所欲地四处游荡，探索新的地点和传送的奥秘。它们常在反复造访的遥远之地建立多处巢穴。除了巢穴中常见的财富外，相位龙更倾向于珍藏旅途中具有情感价值的物品——比如当地特有的珍稀花卉，或当地艺术家的创作。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane.name: 对抗奥术的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane

Shoo!.name: 走开！ Shoo!
Shoo!.description:
触发 一个15尺内的敌人对相位龙造成伤害

效果 相位龙将该生物传送至最多25尺远的地方。目标位置必须为地面且位于无危害的空间。

Unerring Location.name: 精准定位 Unerring Location
Unerring Location.description: 相位龙自动尝试反制任何以其为目标的传送效果（反制环级7环级，反制调整值[[/r 1d20+25 #Counteract]]{+25}）。相位龙也可以选择正常受到影响。其他被同一效果选为目标的生物会照常受到影响。

Dislocating Breath.name: 错位吐息 Dislocating Breath
Dislocating Breath.description: 相位龙吐出一股将生物撕裂的能量旋涡，在@Template[type:cone|distance:40]范围内造成@Damage[12d6[force]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。相位龙可以传送任何豁免失败的生物，将其向任意方向传送最多40尺（若大失败则传送距离加倍）。目标位置必须为地面且位于无危害的空间。相位龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dislocating Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用错位吐息。

Phase Jump.name: 相位跳跃 Phase Jump
Phase Jump.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 相位龙传送最多75尺。如果它们正在空中飞行，它们将保持动量，这使它即使没有使用飞行动作，在回合结束时也不会坠落。

Portal Strike.name: 传送打击 Portal Strike
Portal Strike.description: 相位龙短暂开启一个小型传送门，对75尺范围内的一个生物进行一次爪抓打击。目标对该打击处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]状态。

Sprint.name: Sprint
Sprint.description:
Frequency once per minute

Effect The terror shrike Strides three times in a straight line

Stunning Screech.name: Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description:
The terror shrike unleashes a haunting screech that causes prey to freeze in fear. Each non–terror bird creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:19|options:inflicts:stunned] save. Regardless of the result, creatures are then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Sudden Charge.name: Sudden Charge
Sudden Charge.description: The terror shrike Strides twice. If it ends its movement within melee reach of one creature, it can make a melee Strike against that creature.

Tearing Clutch.name: Tearing Clutch
Tearing Clutch.description: The terror shrike's powerful beak can tear through flesh. On a successful beak Strike, the target takes 1 persistent bleed damage. This bleed damage increases to 1d8 on a critical hit.

Scuttle.name: Scuttle
Scuttle.description:
Trigger A creature that the giant crab can see targets the crab with an attack

Effect The giant crab scuttles to the side and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. After the attack resolves, the crab can Stride up to its speed in a straight line as part of the reaction.

Vulnerable to Prone.name: Vulnerable to Prone
Vulnerable to Prone.description: If a creature critically succeeds on a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the giant crab, the crab is flipped over onto its back in addition to the usual effects. A giant crab that is flipped onto its back has a particularly hard time defending itself; instead of taking the normal -2 circumstance penalty to AC for being @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard}, it takes a -4 circumstance penalty to AC.

Giant Crab.name: Giant Crab
Giant Crab.publicNotes:
Crabs are scavenging crustaceans known for their hard shells and iconic sideways gait. They use their claws to defend themselves, hunt, and fight other crabs for territory. When confronted with threats from outside their species, most crabs prefer to flee, but when retreat isn't possible, they clamp on to their foes as tightly as they can.

The statistics presented here represent giant crabs that live close to the water's surface. Crabs that live deeper underwater often exhibit more extreme adaptations to their environment. Crabs who live in the depths where little light reaches gain darkvision and cold resistance, and those adapted to the most hostile reaches of the deep sea can detect nearby creatures through subtle shifts in ocean currents.

These skittering creatures are prized for their delicious meat, but their size makes them dangerous targets for harvesting.

Smoke Vision.name: 烟雾视觉 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description: 烟雾不会妨碍灰烬龙的视觉；它能无视由烟雾造成的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]状态。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal.name: 对抗原能的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal

Boiling Blood.name: 沸血 Boiling Blood
Boiling Blood.description:
触发 灰烬龙被一次近战攻击重击

效果 灰烬龙的高热之血飞溅至攻击者。该目标受到@Damage[6d6[fire]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic]豁免）。

Reactive Strike (Jaws only).name: 反应打击（仅颚咬） Reactive Strike (Jaws only)

Pyre Breath.name: 烈焰吐息 Pyre Breath
Pyre Breath.description: 灰烬龙喷吐出一股灼热烈焰，在@Template[type:cone|distance:40]范围内造成@Damage[9d6[fire]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。豁免大失败的生物会着火，受到@Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]]伤害。随后该区域被黑烟笼罩1分钟，效果与薄雾相同，但仅覆盖该锥形区域。灰烬龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Pyre Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用烈焰吐息。

Stoke the Flames.name: 煽燃烈焰 Stoke the Flames
Stoke the Flames.description: 灰烬龙激化周围的火势。所有在60尺范围内并正承受持续火焰伤害的敌人，额外受到@Damage[3d6[fire]]伤害。

Cinder Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).name: 青年灰烬龙施法者 Cinder Dragon (Young, Spellcaster)
Cinder Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 在所有龙类之中，灰烬龙体型最为庞大，亦是最为凶猛的种类之一。它们通常性情暴躁易怒，要求他者给予敬畏——乃至臣服。灰烬龙的外貌正如其体内的烈焰，鳞片上常呈现红、橙、黄交错的火焰纹理。许多灰烬龙居住在活火山或其他同样炽热的地域之中。它们偏爱那些能承受高温的宝藏，因此宝石、黄金与白银常见于其囤积的财宝中。

+2 Status Bonus to Saves vs. Fear.name: +2 Status Bonus to Saves vs. Fear

Deflect Arrow.name: Deflect Arrow
Deflect Arrow.description:
Trigger The doprillu is the target of a physical ranged attack

Requirements The doprillu is aware of the attack, isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against it, and has a hand free

Effect The doprillu gains a +4 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack.

Mask of Power.name: Mask of Power
Mask of Power.description:
A doprillu's unique wooden mask is the source of its power.

A doprillu deprived of its mask loses its regeneration and its immunity to Enfeebled and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}, and it immediately becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}. The Enfeebled value increases by 1 at the start of each of the doprillu's turns, to a maximum of Enfeebled 4. If the mask is put back on, the doprillu immediately regains its abilities and loses the Enfeebled condition.

A creature can pull off the mask with a successful Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open}.

Volcanic Veins.name: Volcanic Veins
Volcanic Veins.description: Fiery magma runs through the doprillu's veins. A creature that starts its turn @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the doprillu takes @Damage[7d6[fire]] damage.

Whirlwind Throw.name: Whirlwind Throw
Whirlwind Throw.description:
Requirements The doprillu has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}

Effect The doprillu whirls the grabbed creature about, making a Body Strike against each creature in reach. After that Strike, the doprillu can hurl the grabbed creature up to 50 feet as a ranged Strike. This Strike has the same attack modifier and damage as Body Strike, but has the thrown 20 feet weapon trait.

Doprillu.name: Doprillu
Doprillu.publicNotes: The aberrations known as doprillus are hulks with banded muscles who wear ornate masks at all times that fill their wearers with magical strength and fighting spirit. Doprillus love to battle, especially by grappling, and are eager to start brawls. On neutral ground, a doprillu offers to duel the strongest-looking opponent, but when a doprillu's home turf is invaded, no rules apply to the confrontation. As befits the superheated blood that fuels them, doprillus make their homes in warm locations: hot jungles, sunny deserts, and underground caverns near sulfur vents.
Doprillu.allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. fear

Aerial Feint.name: 空中虚招 Aerial Feint
Aerial Feint.description: 空行者选定20尺内的一个生物，并以特技检定对抗目标的察觉DC。成功时，目标在接下来的1轮内对空行者的攻击处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]状态。

Dive Bomb.name: 俯冲轰炸 Dive Bomb
Dive Bomb.description: 枭鬼空行者以直线飞行至多两倍飞行速度，且下降高度不少于10尺，随后进行一次近战打击。

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: 枭鬼空行者的打击对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]的生物造成额外2d6精准伤害。

Strix Aerialist.name: 枭鬼空行者 Strix Aerialist
Strix Aerialist.publicNotes:
枭鬼空行者是天赋异禀的杂技好手。

枭鬼在自己的语言中被称为"伊塔瑞"（itarii），他们是一种有着鸟类特征的类人生物，生有宽长的黑色羽翼与尖锐的利爪。枭鬼们长有棱角分明的五官，其锐利的双目始终固定向前。

Faithful Weapon.name: Faithful Weapon
Faithful Weapon.description:
dagger, striking rune

A divine warden always wields its patron deity's favored weapon. If the weapon is a ranged weapon, the divine warden automatically generates new ammunition with each attack. For a divine warden of 4th level or higher, the deity's favored weapon gains the effects of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DxCuJKynlnMQZHgp]{Striking} rune while the divine warden wields it; at 12th level, these effects are of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.KCQRFvUgbyclvOGi]{Greater Striking} rune, and at 19th level, they're instead of a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.woxl2FrrgAcJDu0t]{Major Striking} rune.

Instrument of Faith.name: Instrument of Faith
Instrument of Faith.description: The divine warden is a beacon for its deity's faith. A cleric of the divine warden's patron deity can channel a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal} spell through a divine warden they can see within 60 feet. The cleric determines any targets or area for the spell as if they were standing in the divine warden's space.

Divine Destruction.name: Divine Destruction
Divine Destruction.description:
When the divine warden is reduced to 0 HP, it erupts with divine energy in a @Template[emanation|distance:30], dealing @Damage[7d6[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage per level. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21|options:area-effect,damaging-effect] save with the following outcomes.

Critical Success The creature takes half damage.

Success The creature takes full damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and becomes temporarily cursed by the patron deity. The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 day; this is a curse effect that uses the Will save DC as the counteract DC.

Critical Failure As failure, except the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2}.

Faith Bound.name: Faith Bound
Faith Bound.description: A divine warden can't attack a creature that openly wears or displays the religious symbol of the divine warden's patron deity unless that creature uses a hostile action against the divine warden first. If the divine warden is intelligent, it can also attack a creature it believes isn't faithful to its deity or who wears the religious symbol as a ruse (typically after succeeding at a Perception check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1xRFPTFtWtGJ9ELw]{Sense Motive}).

Mask of Fate.name: Mask of Fate
Mask of Fate.description:
The divine warden of Pharasma peers at a single creature within 60 feet through the eyes of its mask to alter its destiny. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes a –1 status penalty to the next saving throw it attempts within the next minute against a divine effect from a divine warden of Pharasma or worshipper of Pharasma.

Failure For the next saving throw the target attempts within the next minute against a divine effect from a divine warden of Pharasma or worshipper of Pharasma, it rolls twice and takes the worse result.

Critical Failure As failure, but the misfortune effect applies to all applicable saving throws.

Divine Warden of Pharasma.name: Divine Warden of Pharasma
Divine Warden of Pharasma.publicNotes: This divine warden serves Pharasma, the goddess of birth, death, and fate. It protects a temple or shrine to the Lady of Graves.

Wolf Skeleton.name: 骷髅狼 Wolf Skeleton
Wolf Skeleton.publicNotes:
没有了肉体的负担，骷髅狼以骇人的速度冲越战场。

在亡者的行列中，没有哪种不死有着如骷髅一般无穷的数量与种类。虽然大多数骷髅几乎完全由骨头构成，但少部分还保留着一些肉屑来帮助它们运动，比如翼膜。

Surge of Speed.name: 急速猛冲 Surge of Speed
Surge of Speed.description: 骷髅狼行走3次，但它直到它的下个回合开始前都@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

Wrench Spirit.name: 撕扯灵魂 Wrench Spirit
Wrench Spirit.description:
需求 有生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]于骨园鳄犬的颚部

效果 骨园鳄犬将目标从擒获中放开，但在这么做的同时撕扯并拽出对方的灵魂。该生物必须尝试@Check[will|dc:20]豁免。没有灵魂（比如大多数构装体）以及肉体与灵魂同为一体的生物（比如大多数天族、魔族和观察者）在豁免中掷出失败或大失败时能够得到成功的结果作为替代

大成功 目标不受影响

成功 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}

失败 骨园鳄犬用啃咬将目标的灵魂从其体内扯到自己的嘴里。2级或更低等级的无心智不死生物会被摧毁，其他不死生物会在1轮内陷入震慑，所有其他生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]。在其每个回合结束时，被该效果麻痹的生物能尝试1次新的豁免来终止该效果。当骨园鳄犬尝试颚打击或者说话时，该麻痹状态会自动结束

大失败 同失败，但是当生物陷入震慑或麻痹时，还会额外陷入呆滞2

Pounce.name: 猛扑 Pounce
Pounce.description: 骨园鳄犬行走然后作出1次打击。若他在开始该动作之前处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]状态，则打击之后依然维持藏匿状态。

Shepherd's Touch.name: 牧者之触 Shepherd's Touch
Shepherd's Touch.description: 招魂者的打击能如同具有 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]性能符文的效果一般影响虚体生物，对活物造成@Damage[1d6[void]]伤害，对不死生物造成@Damage[1d6[vitality]]伤害。

Esobok.name: 骨园鳄犬 Esobok
Esobok.publicNotes:
骨园鳄犬是野蛮的猎手和好斗的哨兵，他们的职责是骨园（the Boneyard）的看门狗。这些粗矮、强壮的四足生物的独特头部类似于鳄鱼的头骨，在头骨的周围生有一圈黑色羽毛构成的装饰。骨园鳄犬几乎不会打扰那些真正逝去之人，他们会警惕着周遭的危险并让骨园的亡者去做他们应尽之事。尽管骨园鳄犬在追寻骨园的威胁或者面对他们的招魂者训练员时会表现得很狡猾，但他们是招魂者之中智力最低下的存在，除了在咆哮着吼出威胁之时以外几乎不会开口说话。聪明人会在他们警告威胁之时安静聆听，因为这些生物不会重复第二遍。

许多招魂者都与骨园的庞大官僚机构有着密切的联系。 很少人追求仁慈、正义或个人利益；他们对法莱斯玛和骨园的职责是至高无上的。然而，个别招魂者以不同的方式解释他们的职责，这可能使他们与凡人之间发生冲突。

All This Has Happened Before.name: All This Has Happened Before
All This Has Happened Before.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger The samsaran anchorite is about to roll initiative

Effect The anchorite experiences a flash of recognition from a previous existence, gaining a +4 circumstance bonus to the triggering roll.

If this causes the anchorite to be the first creature to act, they also become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} for 1 round, but they can use the extra action only to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} or Step.

All This Will Happen Again.name: All This Will Happen Again
All This Will Happen Again.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger The samsaran anchorite fails or critically fails a Will save against an emotion effect

Effect Even in the face of overwhelming tribulation, the anchorite finds solace in the notion that all things are merely part of a never-ending cycle.They reroll the saving throw with a +1 status bonus; they must use the second result.

Sling Bullets.name: Sling Bullets
Sling Bullets.description: These are small metal balls, typically either iron or lead, designed to be used as ammunition in slings.

Cryptomnesia.name: Cryptomnesia
Cryptomnesia.description: A samsaran anchorite subconsciously retains bits of knowledge from their innumerable former lives, granting them a +1 circumstance bonus to skill checks that aren't listed in their skills above, and allowing them to attempt all skill actions that normally require the user to be trained.

Samsaran Anchorite.name: Samsaran Anchorite
Samsaran Anchorite.publicNotes:
A unique connection to the cycle of life and death defines the mortal lives of samsarans. With a tendency toward reclusiveness, samsarans have delicate builds, enigmatic and pupilless eyes, and blood as clear as water. When a samsaran dies, their body vanishes and their soul instantly reincarnates into a newborn child elsewhere on the same plane: usually another samsaran, but occasionally a humanoid of a different ancestry.

Though all samsarans have an innate understanding of their nature, they consciously remember little from their former lives. Some, however, are occasionally struck by disjointed memories or flashes of déjà vu linked to a previous existence that can earn them a reputation for preternatural wisdom and insight. Most samsarans prefer to lead studious lives filled with moments of deep reflection. Their sights remain set on the eternal and on enlightenment, reducing the appeal of the short-term material gains one can achieve in just one lifetime. A samsaran ceases their cycle of reincarnation only upon reaching perfect state of enlightenment-or falling so far from harmony that they proceed to a doomed afterlife.

The ancestral home of the samsarans lies in Zi Ha, a remote mountain nation in Tian Xia. These treacherous mountains help ensure the solitude most samsarans prefer, and they're further protected by misguiding illusions, defensive wards, and secure fortifications.

Ninkonda.name: 宁康达 Ninkonda
Ninkonda.publicNotes: 当曾经高尚的凡人堕入邪恶并犯下滔天暴行时，宁康达便会出发追捕他们。宁康达身着胸前镶有一面璀璨明镜的板甲，其上镶嵌着荆棘与钉刺，象征着其代天行狩的猎手身份。然而，宁康达通常并不会立即处决他们的猎物，而是会尽力帮助目标回心转意，并促使他们最终获得救赎。宁康达用它们的镜子映照出目标的罪愆，并展示其灵魂的状态，许多目标在瞥见这幅倒影后便会寻求改变。而那些不为所动者，很快就会发现自己要面对的是天堂猎手那无可言表的强大力量。

Aura of Refection.name: 倒影灵光 Aura of Refection
Aura of Refection.description:
60尺。宁康达的镜子映照出生物灵魂中的弱点。进入或在其回合开始时位于灵光内的生物必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:36|options:area-effect,inflicts:dazzled]豁免，否则在1轮内会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]，并且在对抗宁康达能力的意志豁免中承受–2减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.BmptyIaMhq7siOqR]

Refect Spell.name: 反射法术 Refect Spell
Refect Spell.description:
触发 宁康达成为一个远程法术攻击的目标

效果 宁康达尝试用其盔甲上的镜子反射该法术。它在对抗触发的攻击时AC获得+4环境加值。若攻击失手，法术将被反射回施法者，施法者必须使用自己的AC进行第二次远程法术攻击检定，以决定法术是否转而击中自己。

Nail Barrage.name: 钉矢弹幕 Nail Barrage
Nail Barrage.description: 宁康达散射出漫天的钉刺，在一个@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]范围内造成@Damage[14d8[piercing]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。它在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Nail Barrage]]{1d4轮}内不能再次使用钉矢弹幕。

Soul Reflection.name: 灵魂倒影 Soul Reflection
Soul Reflection.description: 宁康达将其盔甲上的镜面对准一个被其倒影灵光@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]的生物，迫使该生物凝视自己过去的罪愆。该生物必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:38]豁免，否则在反思其行为时获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1轮（若大失败则持续1分钟，因为其行为持续地压在心头）。一个圣洁生物或道德高尚的生物（由GM决定）在豁免检定中使用比其掷骰结果高一阶的成功度。豁免失败的生物随后在1分钟内对灵魂倒影暂时免疫。

Center of Destiny.name: 命运中心 Center of Destiny
Center of Destiny.description:
触发 一个30尺内的生物获得来自幸运效果的好处

效果 阴影环绕并攫走命运风暴，使其在被触发生物相邻的开放空间内重新现身。

Ebbing Cloud.name: 退潮云 Ebbing Cloud
Ebbing Cloud.description: 15尺。命运风暴周身萦绕着"被规避的命运"之念，形成浓稠的形而上学迷雾，令心智昏沉、抱负蒙尘。灵光区域内的生物若试图朝命运风暴移动，则会将灵光区域视为困难地形。

Unspeakable Insights.name: 不可言说的洞见 Unspeakable Insights
Unspeakable Insights.description:
即便只是短暂触及命运风暴的心智，也会被迫感知到关于未被记载的过往、现今与未来的庞大信息——其浩瀚之广非凡人心智所能理解或容纳，带来强烈而痛苦的认知冲击。每当有生物使用魔法心灵效果瞄准命运风暴时，它必须尝试@Check[will|dc:33]豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响，且在接下来24小时内对不可言说的洞见免疫。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标受到@Damage[3d6[mental]]伤害。

大失败 目标受到@Damage[6d6[mental]]伤害并且陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]1轮。

Divergent Potential.name: 歧路潜能 Divergent Potential
Divergent Potential.description: 命运风暴选择60尺内它能看见的两个生物，然后投掷两次耳语呢喃打击，每次各针对一个目标。在看到两次打击的结果后，命运风暴选择其中一个目标追击，可飞行至多60尺抵达所选择的目标，并应用所选打击的结果；未使用的打击则失效。若命运风暴因为被阻挡而无法接近所选的目标，则攻击被阻止，且所选攻击结果一并失效。

Sound Without Voice.name: 无声之音 Sound Without Voice
Sound Without Voice.description: 受命运风暴耳语呢喃打击伤害的生物，必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:33|basic]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}。

Swiftness.name: 迅捷 Swiftness
Swiftness.description: 命运风暴的移动不会触发反应动作。

Destiny Tempest.name: 命运风暴 Destiny Tempest
Destiny Tempest.publicNotes: 在气巨灵帝国（Jaathoom Empire）崛起之前，气元素位面曾由来自失夜之地的敬畏帝国（Reverient Empire of Lost Nights）的命运风暴所统治。当气巨灵大军击溃敬畏帝国后，他们将战败的命运风暴封印在散落于气元素位面的青铜球体之中——那是时间与永恒噩梦的牢笼。

Swim the Dead Roads.description: 通过1周时间，产子溯魂鳗可以通过只有其可以感知到的多元宇宙通道，从外层位面前往连接物质宇宙和骨园的死亡通路，然后它会从那里继续前往一个其可以生存的物质宇宙某个随机地点。
Swim the Dead Roads.name: 死路洄游 Swim the Dead Roads

Grind Soul.name: 咀嚼灵魂 Grind Soul
Grind Soul.description:
需求 产子溯魂鳗正吸附在一个生物的灵魂上

效果 产子溯魂鳗用其锯齿状的内部口器咀嚼吸附生物的灵魂，造成@Damage[2d8[spirit]]伤害（@Check[will|dc:16|basic]豁免）。豁免大失败的生物还会额外承受@Damage[1d4[persistent,spirit]]伤害。无论豁免结果如何，产子溯魂鳗都不再吸附于该生物。

Planar Adaptation (Monitor).name: 位面适应（观察者） Planar Adaptation (Monitor)
Planar Adaptation (Monitor).description: 产子溯魂鳗根据其吸收的位面能量获得天族和圣洁，魔族和邪秽，或是观察者特征。

Monitor Escape.name: 观察者逃脱 Monitor Escape
Monitor Escape.description: 溯魂鳗的形体闪烁，遁入多重宇宙。溯魂鳗传送至60尺内的一个空旷处。

Propulsive Launch.name: 推进起步 Propulsive Launch
Propulsive Launch.description: 溯魂鳗跳跃至多40尺，然后进行一次吸盘打击。如果它在空中且在打击后未附着于生物，则其坠落。

Soul Attach.name: 灵魂吸附 Soul Attach
Soul Attach.description: 当一个溯魂鳗成功对一个目标进行吸盘打击，并且该目标的灵魂会面对审判时，它会吸附在该生物的灵魂上。当吸附时，溯魂鳗和宿主陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，溯魂鳗随着宿主移动而移动，直到溯魂鳗死亡或宿主拉开溯魂鳗（[[/act escape dc=16]]）。如果宿主在溯魂吸附期间死亡，溯魂鳗立即消失，随着灵魂脱离宿主的肉体。如果生物在抵达其灵魂的终点前被复活，溯魂鳗也会跟着回来。

Tail Thrash.name: 猛烈尾扫 Tail Thrash
Tail Thrash.description:
需求 溯魂鳗正吸附于一个生物的灵魂上

效果 溯魂鳗对吸附的生物进行一次尾扫打击，然后对另一个跟宿主邻接的生物进行一次尾扫打击。这些打击会计入溯魂鳗的多重攻击减值，但在第二次打击完成之前不会生效。

Spawning Soulrider (Monitor).name: 产子溯魂鳗（观察者） Spawning Soulrider (Monitor)
Spawning Soulrider (Monitor).publicNotes:
当溯魂鳗吸收了足够的位面能量后，它们变得沉重，体内怀着无数微小的卵。这些溯魂鳗本能地通过死亡通路（Dead Roads）返回物质宇宙来产卵。这一过程过于形而上学，原理至今尚未被完全解明。那些渴望进入物质宇宙的魔族及其他生物已开始捕捉研究产卵期的溯魂鳗，但此类实验本身伴随着一定的风险，因为被阻止返回物质宇宙的溯魂鳗会因持续吸收位面能量体型变得越来越庞大。

一旦回到凡人宇宙，产子溯魂鳗会对它们那近乎透明的卵和幼体表现出极强的保护欲，并利用其鮣鱼一般的口器击退潜在的威胁。任何惊扰产子溯魂鳗的人都可能体会到灵魂被一片片撕裂的滋味。

溯魂鳗会使用它那无害的吸盘来搭生物灵魂的"便车"。这种生物外形酷似八目鳗或盲鳗，拖着一条长长的鞭状尾巴。吸盘吸附这种连接形式看似简单，实际上是超脱了物质形态直接附着在宿主的灵魂上，以随其一同前往灵魂所去之处。一旦抵达目的地，溯魂鳗就会离开宿主，吸收周围的位面能量，适应新环境并成长到足以产下子嗣。然而，它只能在普通的物质宇宙中生产，因此它必须寻找传送门或通过其他方式返回。通过这种循环，它们已经扩散到了每一个外层位面（Outer Sphere），以及许多凡人世界。

虽然溯魂鳗的活动范围很大，但它们其实才出现了一百多年。据传闻，曾有一名畸肉师（Fleshwarper）试图通过将数个无辜灵魂吸附在自己身上，来尝试欺瞒法莱斯玛的审判。自那以后，溯魂鳗就开始出现，数量呈爆炸式增长。

虽然溯魂鳗仅需空气即可生存，但它们本能地意识到自己对凡人灵魂的需求。尽管它们的吸盘是无害的，但感到威胁或变得焦躁时溯魂鳗会用鞭状尾巴解决掉宿主或其他威胁。

Feast.name: Feast
Feast.description:
Requirements The festrog's last action was a jaws Strike that damaged a living creature

Effect The festrog tears into the creature's flesh and gulps it down voraciously, dealing @Damage[1d4[slashing]] damage to the creature and gaining temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt. These temporary HP last for 1 minute.

Diseased Pustules.name: Diseased Pustules
Diseased Pustules.description: Whenever the festrog takes piercing or slashing damage, creatures adjacent to the festrog take @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:14|basic] save).

On All Fours.name: On All Fours
On All Fours.description:
Requirements The festrog has nothing in their hands

Effect The festrog Strides with a +10-foot circumstance bonus to their Speed.

Festrog.name: Festrog
Festrog.publicNotes:
Spawned from corpses of those who died of illness or starvation and were twisted by void energy, festrogs display a viciousness that rivals other undead. They resemble decaying humanoids, but with elongated arms, teeth, and bone-like spikes protruding from their upper backs. Festrogs' tendency to run on all fours has led to them gaining the moniker dog-ghouls, causing the unwary to mistake them for mindless predators.

Festrogs are in fact intelligent, stalking victims in packs and choosing hunting grounds that suit their abilities. They can often be found roaming farmlands, open forests, or wide plains, anywhere they can use their quadrupedal speed to overtake quarry. Belying their mindless appearance, festrogs use tactics similar to those of hunters with hounds: the leader of the pack often flushes prey from cover so that the victim can be brought down by the pack.

Researchers of the necromantic processes that create risen corpses have found that festrogs spawn more often from slow demises than sudden deaths. Festrogs typically animate from corpses afflicted with disease, while victims of violence are more likely to become more common undead, such as zombies. One well-documented way to create a festrog is to have scavengers feed on the dead flesh before animating it. This potentially explains why festrogs most often arise in remote areas stricken with famine and desperate predators.

Though most festrogs arise from humans and other prevalent humanoids, other creatures that die in the same circumstances can rise as festrogs. Festrogs that were once larger humanoids, such as ogres, hill giants, or trolls behave similarly to other humanoid festrogs and are simply larger and more powerful. More peculiar are the beastkin festrogs formed of quadrupedal animals, which typically have feet or hooves instead of hands, travel on all fours at all times, and have only animal intelligence. In fact, some humanoid festrogs capture and starve beastkin in hopes of the creatures rising as grotesque festrog pets.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: 相位龙以任意顺序进行两次爪抓打击和一次尾扫打击。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane.name: 对抗奥术的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane

Shoo!.name: 走开！ Shoo!
Shoo!.description:
触发 一个15尺内的敌人对相位龙造成伤害

效果 相位龙将该生物传送至最多35尺远的地方。目标位置必须为地面且位于无危害的空间。

Unerring Location.name: 精准定位 Unerring Location
Unerring Location.description: 相位龙自动尝试反制任何以其为目标的传送效果（反制环级9环级，反制调整值[[/r 1d20+32 #Counteract]]{+32}）。相位龙也可以选择正常受到影响。其他被同一效果选为目标的生物会照常受到影响。

Blinking Barrage.name: 闪现连击 Blinking Barrage
Blinking Barrage.description: 相位龙将其所有传送技巧集中到一系列令人惊叹的攻击上。相位龙可传送至多60尺到一个邻接某个生物的方格中，并对该生物进行一次爪抓打击。相位龙最多可如此做四次，每次都必须传送到不同的生物旁。每次攻击均计入多重攻击减值，但该减值在所有攻击完成前不会增加。相位龙在下一回合结束前不能再使用带有传送特征的动作。

Dislocating Breath.name: 错位吐息 Dislocating Breath
Dislocating Breath.description: 相位龙吐出一股将生物撕裂的能量旋涡，在@Template[type:cone|distance:50]范围内造成@Damage[17d6[force]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。相位龙可以传送任何豁免失败的生物，将其向任意方向传送最多50尺（若大失败则传送距离加倍）。目标位置必须为地面且位于无危害的空间。相位龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dislocating Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用错位吐息。

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之威势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: 相位龙的打击重击时，恢复错位吐息的使用次数，或恢复一个已消耗的传送法术。

Phase Jump.name: 相位跳跃 Phase Jump
Phase Jump.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 相位龙传送最多75尺。如果它们正在空中飞行，它们将保持动量，这使它即使没有使用飞行动作，在回合结束时也不会坠落。

Portal Strike.name: 传送打击 Portal Strike
Portal Strike.description: 相位龙短暂开启一个小型传送门，对90尺范围内的一个生物进行一次爪抓打击。目标对该打击处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]状态。

Phase Dragon (Ancient).name: 古相位龙 Phase Dragon (Ancient)
Phase Dragon (Ancient).publicNotes: 没有任何地方能限制相位龙，甚至没有任何地方能够长时间吸引它们的兴趣；它们与生俱来的奥术联系使它们与传送和移位魔法紧密相连。作为探索者和学者，相位龙随心所欲地四处游荡，探索新的地点和传送的奥秘。它们常在反复造访的遥远之地建立多处巢穴。除了巢穴中常见的财富外，相位龙更倾向于珍藏旅途中具有情感价值的物品——比如当地特有的珍稀花卉，或当地艺术家的创作。

Shade (Plane of Metal).name: 残影（金元素位面） Shade (Plane of Metal)
Shade (Plane of Metal).publicNotes:
金魂灵的外形与其凡人本体相似，却由各种金属（通常是锋利的金属）构成

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

Planar Incarnation - Plane of Metal (Met.name: 金元素位面位面塑形（金魂灵） Planar Incarnation - Plane of Metal (Metal Pneuma)
Planar Incarnation - Plane of Metal (Met.description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

金元素位面Plane of Metal（"金魂灵"Metal Pneuma） 金魂灵的外形与其凡人本体相似，却由各种金属（通常是锋利的金属）构成

  • 语言 金元素语
  • 额外能力 3点电击抗力
  • 近战 爪抓+7（金，多用P），伤害 1d8+2挥砍

Shade (Dreamlands).name: 残影（幻梦境） Shade (Dreamlands)
Shade (Dreamlands).publicNotes:
梦想者呈现出他们生前肉体的理想的外貌、年龄和性别

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

+1 Circumstance Bonus on all Saving Thro.name: 全豁免+1环境加值 +1 Circumstance Bonus on all Saving Throws

Planar Incarnation - Dreamlands (The Dre.name: 幻梦境位面塑形（梦想者） Planar Incarnation - Dreamlands (The Dreamers)
Planar Incarnation - Dreamlands (The Dre.description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

幻梦境 Dimension of Dreams（"梦想者" the Dreamers） 梦想者呈现出他们生前肉体的理想的外貌、年龄和性别

  • 语言 邪灵语
  • 额外能力 所有豁免有+1环境加值
  • 近战 拳击+7，伤害 1d8+2钝击

Temporal Reversion.name: 时间溯回 Temporal Reversion
Temporal Reversion.description:
触发 时空御衡者在一次检定中失败或大失败

频率 每日一次

效果 时空御衡者重掷触发检定并采用较好的结果。

Envisioning.name: 心相 Envisioning
Envisioning.description:
当时空御衡者传递信息时，它会使用无声的心能投影。该行动是一种具有100尺范围的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.kdhbPaBMK1d1fpbA]，且所有生物都可以理解，无论其是否掌握语言。

心相传递的含义对于非御衡者来说是模糊的，通常神秘晦涩。不过时空御衡者可以用这种能力完美与处于相同位面的其他御衡者进行交流。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Regeneration 15 (Deactivated by Spirit).name: 再生15（精魂使其无效） Regeneration 15 (Deactivated by Spirit)

Confusing Gaze.name: 困惑凝视 Confusing Gaze
Confusing Gaze.description: 30尺。在灵光范围的结束回合的生物必须尝试一次@Check[will|dc:34]豁免。如果失败，将陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]1轮（大失败时[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}）。

Aging Strikes.name: 衰老打击 Aging Strikes
Aging Strikes.description:
时空御衡者对单个目标进行两次拳头打击。如果两次打击都命中，目标必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|dc:37]豁免。不会随衰老变弱或不会衰老的生物免疫此效果（由GM酌情裁定）。

如果一个生物因为衰老打击陷入笨拙4，流失4，和力竭4，那么他就会因为衰老而死亡。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}，或则这几种状态值加1。该效果会因为时空御衡者的其他衰老打击叠加，最多到笨拙4，流失4和力竭4。

大失败 同失败，但是生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 2}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}，或是将这几种状态值加2。

Focused Gaze.name: 聚焦凝视 Focused Gaze
Focused Gaze.description: 时空御衡者将凝视聚焦在30尺内一个他能看见的生物上。目标必须尝试一次豁免对抗时空御衡者的困惑凝视。时空御衡者每回合不能对同一生物使用该能力超过一次。

Temporal Flurry.name: 时间乱击 Temporal Flurry
Temporal Flurry.description: 时空御衡者进行四次拳头打击。多重攻击减值如常随着每次攻击增加。

Temporal Strike.name: 时间打击 Temporal Strike
Temporal Strike.description:
时空御衡者接触一个生物或物体来将之从时间中挪动。目标尝试一次@Check[fortitude|dc:37|traits:damaging-effect]豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响

成功 目标周围的时间减慢；目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1轮

失败 目标从当前时间消失，并在同一位置于[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}后出现，如同它没有经历过这段时间一样。如果一个生物或物体在目标返回时占据了该空间，则目标出现在原始位置最近的可用空间中。

大失败 同失败，但目标在返回后陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续额外[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。

Bythos.name: 时空御衡者 Bythos
Bythos.publicNotes: 时空御衡者是时间与空间的守护者，任何时候都在搜寻那些滥用位面和时间魔法的人。时空御衡者是一种近似类人的生物，有四只手臂，身体由旋转的云雾组成。尽管外表如此，但它们的身体摸起来就像干燥的石头。时空御衡者寻找着那些不负责任的位面或维度旅行者引起的悖论，并修复那些位面之间变薄或受损的壁障。如果凡人坚持留在这些区域并且不能被说服停止他们的行为，那么时空御衡者就会毫无顾忌地清除他们。通过使用操纵时间的能力，时空御衡者可以通过加速对手周围的时间让对手迅速衰老而死，或则让目标从时间和空间中消失。
Bythos.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Wicked Bite.name: Wicked Bite
Wicked Bite.description:
Requirements The urdefhan damaged a creature with a jaws Strike on their last action

Effect The urdefhan maintains contact, turning the creature's flesh translucent around the site of the injury. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save or be affected by drain blood or drain vitality (the urdefhan's choice). If the jaws Strike was a critical hit, the creature is affected by both effects, using the same save result for both.

  • Drain Blood The urdefhan drinks some of the creature's blood. On a failed save, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and the urdefhan regains 5 HP (or, on a critical failure, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and the urdefhan regains 10 HP).

  • Drain Vitality The urdefhan draws out some of the creature's vital essence. The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 hour on a failed save (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 hour on a critical failure).

Arrows.name: Arrows
Arrows.description: 这些箭头是弓的弹药。箭杆是木制的。一端是羽毛保持飞行中的平稳，另一端是金属头。

Necrotic Decay.name: Necrotic Decay
Necrotic Decay.description: When an urdefhan dies, their translucent flesh quickly rots away and sublimates into a foul-smelling gas that fills a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] around the body. This gas deals @Damage[3d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in this area as their flesh curdles and rots (@Check[fortitude|dc:17|basic] save).

Ravenous Attack.name: Ravenous Attack
Ravenous Attack.description: The urdefhan makes one rhoka sword Strike and one jaws Strike against a single creature. Their multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after both attacks.

Urdefhan Warrior.name: Urdefhan Warrior
Urdefhan Warrior.publicNotes:
From the moment they're born, urdefhans are prepared for war. Urdefhan warriors are among the least powerful urdefhans one might encounter outside of their eerie underground cities.

The violent warmongers, occultists, and poisoners known as urdefhans dwell within the Darklands. They were created in eons past by the mysterious First Apocalypse Riders to serve as agents of the end times of the Universe. Urdefhans continue to honor their creators by worshipping the wretched beings who rule over the plane of Abaddon, and like their fiendish lieges, urdefhans exist for one reason and one reason alone: to kill.

While urdefhans are humanoid and dwell together in large groups, this is where their similarities to other ancestries end. Their visages are horrific, with transparent skin and musculature displaying their glistening entrails, gleaming bones, and perhaps worst of all, their baleful red eyes. This appearance, combined with their gaping maws full of sharp fangs, works to create the false impression that urdefhan are some sort of vampiric undead, not creatures of living flesh and blood. When an urdefhan's life comes to an end, their flesh quickly curdles and then bursts in a wave of awful corruption that spreads to the flesh of other creatures in the area. The typical urdefhan views their eventual demise as a disappointment, for once they're dead, their chances to kill will finally come to an end.

An urdefhan's translucent body allows onlookers to see the various organs and fluids within, while their blue blood often signals their mood and telegraphs possible dangers. The blood of an excited urdefhan ready to attack grows more vibrant and even glows with a faint light. When an urdefhan is prepared to meet their death and imminent soul detonation, their blood grows dark, almost black as pitch.

Urdefhans' primary concern is death and how to inflict it in the goriest, most painful, and widespread ways. Beyond this ethos of violence, urdefhans concern themselves only tangentially with matters such as formal modes of warfare or aspects of their damnable religion. When an urdefhan isn't actively engaged in violence, their giddy cruelty is tempered by only a sense of self-preservation that ensures they survive long enough to spread the "blessings" of their daemonic patrons. They pass the time between wars inventing new weapons, developing new diseases, and researching awful new magic, all in preparation for the next inevitable conflict.

Air Wisp.name: Air Wisp

Accord Essence.name: Accord Essence
Accord Essence.description:
Trigger An ally within 30 feet that benefited from the wisp's resonance in the last hour is targeted by an attack

Effect The wisp detonates themself in an elemental explosion. This grants temporary Hit Points equal to half the wisp's current Hit Points to allies within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} who have benefited from the wisp's resonance in the last hour. These temporary Hit Points last 1 hour.

A wisp that uses this reaction is permanently destroyed, and they can be restored by only a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish} ritual or similarly powerful effect. If an ability would prevent the wisp's destruction (for instance, if the wisp is summoned and would merely be dismissed), Accord Essence has no effect.

Resonance.name: Resonance
Resonance.description:
30 feet. All wisps vibrate at a frequency attuned to their element, resonating with and empowering all creatures and effects sharing that trait.

A creature in the area gains a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for effects with the air trait; a creature with the elemental and air traits gains this bonus to all attack and damage rolls.

In Concert.name: In Concert
In Concert.description: When an air wisp rolls a critical failure on a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid}, they get a failure instead, and when they roll a success, they get a critical success instead.

Air Wisp.publicNotes:
Air wisps are floating spheres of cloud and storm, perpetually humming a light, whispery tone. They're playful and capricious, with great curiosity toward strangers.

Wisps are tiny elemental beings that emerged during the creation of the Elemental Planes. The first wisps roamed the Inner Sphere in shifting symphonies that traded members with their every meeting. These symphonies of free wisps created music out of their combined resonances, but when the wicked Elemental Lords realized the value of the wisps' resonance, they captured whole symphonies for use as servants.

Wisps attune to each other and to those they surround themselves with. This attunement makes them naturally supportive allies. Free wisps still roam the Inner Sphere and the Universe, but they're usually shy and hide themselves from strangers. However, they happily offer their service to those who show them kindness. They especially find themselves drawn to spellcasters who practice elemental magic; these wisps usually watch from afar but sometimes approach those who seem safe to become familiars or comrades.

Free wisps who find one another become close almost immediately. They get especially excited when they find wisps of elements other than their own, showing none of the animosity sometimes exhibited between elementals of different planes. Instead, they join in an excited dance, emitting resonances that faintly echo the symphonies of ancient days.

Burning Rush.name: Burning Rush
Burning Rush.description: The striding fire stretches out its legs to an impossible length, propelling it forward. The striding fire Strides up to double its Speed in a straight line. Its movement during this Stride doesn't trigger reactions. Any creature the striding fire was adjacent to at any point during this Stride must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save. If it critically fails, it's knocked @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} by a wave of heated air. The striding fire can't use Burning Rush for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Smoke Vision.name: Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description: The striding fire ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Striding Fire.name: Striding Fire
Striding Fire.publicNotes:
An embodiment of the speed and chaos of a spreading blaze, a striding fire appears as a lithe and long-limbed humanoid composed of shifting-hued flames churning around a skeleton-like framework.

Destructive manifestations of the Plane of Fire, fire elementals sometimes incorporate burning materials into their being or superheated matter, such as molten rock or searing smoke. In combat, they tend to be aggressive and somewhat reckless. Their attacks can sometimes cause major destruction to the surrounding environment, and many fire elementals seem to enjoy seeing their flames spread far and wide.

Distracting Whisper.name: 干扰低语 Distracting Whisper
Distracting Whisper.description:
触发 低语龙成为攻击的目标

效果 一个神秘的声音在触发生物耳边低语，使触发攻击受到-2环境减值。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.qsvSWxRqVQofjDdH]

Cogitation Breath.name: 凝思吐息 Cogitation Breath
Cogitation Breath.description: 低语龙释放出一股迷惑性毒雾，在@Template[type:cone|distance:40]范围内造成@Damage[10d6[mental]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[will|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied]豁免）。豁免失败的生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}（大失败则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}），持续1分钟。低语龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Cogitation Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用凝思吐息。

Steal Knowledge.name: 窃取知识 Steal Knowledge
Steal Knowledge.description:
低语龙从60尺内一个生物的意识中摘取知识片段，选择一个技能作为影响目标。该生物必须进行@Check[will|dc:28]豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响。

失败 在接下来的1分钟内，该生物使用该技能的检定时承受-1状态减值，而低语龙在使用该技能的检定中获得+1状态加值。

大失败 同失败，但减值为-2，加值为+2。

Unveil Secret.name: 揭开秘密 Unveil Secret
Unveil Secret.description: 低语龙探知60尺内一个生物的思维，搜寻其秘密，除非目标通过@Check[will|dc:30]豁免，否则低语龙会知晓一个该生物会觉得尴尬或羞耻的事情。目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}，且在1分钟内或在低语龙揭露秘密前无法降低惊惧状态。当受影响生物尝试检定时，低语龙可用一个反应动作揭露其秘密使其难堪，迫使该生物投掷两次并取较差结果；这是一个厄运效果。

+2 to Sense Motive.name: 察言观色时+2 +2 to Sense Motive

Information Network.name: 信息网络 Information Network
Information Network.description: 低语龙可以尝试一个社群检定来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]以代替搜集信息检定，从先前的线人处回忆情报。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult.name: 对抗异能的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult

Diplomatic Solution.name: 外交解决 Diplomatic Solution
Diplomatic Solution.description:
触发 低语龙进行先攻检定

效果 低语龙将其视线内@Template[emanation|distance:60]范围内的所有敌人作为目标，施放环级等于低语龙等级一半（向上取整）的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.b515AZlB0sridKSq]（@Check[will|dc:28]豁免）。低语龙无需维持此效果，但如果低语龙对受到影响的生物采取任何敌对行动，则对所有生物终止该效果。

Whisper Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: 成年低语龙施法者 Whisper Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)
Whisper Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 低语龙是敏锐的谣言和秘密收藏家，花费几个世纪来磨练他们的信息网络和人际关系。它们这样做通常并非出于想要控制他人或利用这些信息来进行阴谋，而仅仅是因为学习和收集信息的过程本身就是一种满足。与其他龙的财宝相比，它们的巢穴较为简陋，因为它们真正的财富——秘密——都藏在它们的脑海中。

Compel Condemned.name: 致命诱惑 Compel Condemned
Compel Condemned.description:
卡崔娜迎魂使通过心灵感应强迫30尺内的生物靠近并让卡崔娜迎魂使亲吻他们，以准备使用死亡之吻。 目标必须尝试@Check[will|dc:22]豁免。

成功 该生物不受影响，并且在 24 小时内暂时免疫致命诱惑。

失败 该生物必须用它的每一个动作尽可能快地靠近卡崔娜迎魂使，同时避免明显的危险。 如果被强迫的生物与卡崔娜迎魂使相邻，它会保持停止并且不行动。 如果该生物受到任何伤害，则该效果结束并且该生物在24小时内暂时免疫致命诱惑。 此效果持续1轮，但如果卡崔娜迎魂使在随后的几轮中再次使用此能力，它会将所有受影响的生物的持续时间延长1轮。

大失败 如同失败，但伤害不会结束效果。

Kiss of Death.name: 死亡之吻 Kiss of Death
Kiss of Death.description: 卡崔娜迎魂使给一个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]或自愿的生物一个长而热情的吻，造成@Damage[3d6[void]]伤害。 任何被同一位卡崔娜迎魂使的死亡之吻连续3轮伤害的生物都会失去意识并陷入濒死1。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Calming Presence.name: 镇静灵气 Calming Presence
Calming Presence.description:
30尺。在该区域内开始其回合的生物必须尝试进行@Check[will|dc:18]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响，并且在24小时内暂时免疫镇静灵气。

成功 该生物的攻击骰承受-1状态减值，持续1轮。

失败 任何会影响该生物的情绪效果都会被抑制，该生物不能使用敌对行动。 如果该生物受到任何其他生物的敌意，它将不再受到镇静灵气的影响，并在24小时内暂时免疫镇静灵气。

大失败 如同失败，但敌对动作并不会结束效果。

Shepherd's Touch.name: 牧者之触 Shepherd's Touch
Shepherd's Touch.description: 卡崔娜迎魂使的打击能如同具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]性能符文的效果一般影响虚体生物，对活物造成@Damage[1d6[void]]伤害，对不死生物造成@Damage[1d6[vitality]]伤害。

Catrina.name: 卡崔娜迎魂使 Catrina
Catrina.publicNotes:
并非所有进入骨园的灵魂都意识到他们已经死亡。卡崔娜迎魂使会见这些灵魂，并帮助说服他们相信自己命运的终结，以减轻灵魂的逝去。当凡人不能接受自己的死亡时，卡崔娜迎魂使更有可能进行干预。他们执行任务是为了保持来世的平静，而不是出于对凡人悲痛的真正同情。卡崔娜迎魂使很少访问物质宇宙，除非是为了帮助一个极其重要的凡人离世。

卡崔娜迎魂使像骷髅，穿着鲜豔的花朵和五颜六色的衣服，给他们一个既喜庆又可怕的外表。虽然大多数卡崔娜迎魂使以女性形像出现，但男性卡崔娜迎魂使也会穿着鲜豔的颜色，带着花环。

许多招魂者都与骨园的庞大官僚机构有着密切的联系。 很少人追求仁慈、正义或个人利益；他们对法莱斯玛和骨园的职责是至高无上的。然而，个别招魂者以不同的方式解释他们的职责，这可能使他们与凡人之间发生冲突。
Catrina.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Venator.name: 追猎者 Venator
Venator.publicNotes:
与大多数御衡者不同，追猎者们常驻凡世物质宇宙。奇匠族打造这些由黄铜和齿轮构成的人形，用以追捕敌人。虽能独立作战，追猎者们却常为其他御衡者担任追踪者，或率领警戒者小队缉拿罪犯，或引导时空御衡者锁定目标。

每台追猎者在铸造时便已被分派目标，其护甲下轰鸣运转的齿轮中集成了奇匠族公式的碎片。目标由公式严苛限定，通常指向单个具名的目标、某个家族，或直接参与特定事件的小型团体。

追猎者追捕的目标鲜少公然威胁现实平衡，它们往往掌握着某些秘密或新兴魔法理论。

因此，即便是追猎者也鲜少知晓自己为何被指派特定目标。新近铸造的追猎者行事极其彻底，会系统性地摧毁目标的躯体及任何可能藏有秘密的临近物品（如笔记、书籍甚至涂鸦）。

成功的追猎者会因失去目标而被弃置，使其自生自灭。他们通常渴望找到新的使命，哪怕只是来自凡人召唤的临时任务。许多人最终会延伸原有使命，选择与先前目标相似的猎物，或在某些情况下，继续追逐原目标的灵魂。

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description: 比传统箭短，但结构相似，矢是弩使用的弹药。

Locate Target.name: 定位目标 Locate Target
Locate Target.description: 追猎者在被创造时会被分配单个目标或一小群目标。当追猎者与目标处于同一位面时，可感知其最近的目标所在的方向。如果无目标，则能感知其最多数目标所在的位面。

Discharging Bolt.name: 放电箭 Discharging Bolt
Discharging Bolt.description: 当追猎者用其弩伤害一个生物时，弩箭会嵌入目标体内，造成@Damage[2d6[persistent,electricity]]伤害。生物可以通过一个交互动作来移除弩箭并结束持续伤害，但在移除弩箭时会受到@Damage[1d6[electricity]]伤害。

Mark Target.name: 标记目标 Mark Target
Mark Target.description:
追猎者向60尺内一个目标释放出一个光球，用持续对追猎者可见的魔法灵光将其照亮。目标可以靠成功通过一次@Check[reflex|dc:30]豁免来避免被标记。当被标记旗舰，目标会难以应对追猎及其盟友。目标在对追猎者和其他御衡者的所有攻击上，以及在对抗来自追猎者和其他御衡者的效果的豁免上，承受-1状态减值。追猎者可以通过维持此效果，来指定至多5个其他生物作为可信赖的盟友，使目标对这些盟友同样承受上述减值。追猎者可以主动解消标记。否则，标记将在1天后自然消散。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.2TlbtDHEGcFG8NPF]

Overloaded Arc.name: 过载电弧 Overloaded Arc
Overloaded Arc.description: 追猎者从体内朝@Template[type:line|distance:120]范围施放闪电，造成@Damage[4d10[electricity]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic]豁免）。闪电还会产生电弧，对任何120尺内嵌入有追猎者弩箭的生物造成伤害，即便其不在线形范围内。追猎者随后陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1轮。

Furious Claws.name: Furious Claws
Furious Claws.description: The gug makes up to four claw Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks all count toward the gug's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after the gug makes all its attacks.

Eerie Flexibility.name: Eerie Flexibility
Eerie Flexibility.description: Despite its size, the gug's multiple joints allow it to fit through tight spaces as if it were a Medium creature. While @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeezing}, it can move at its full Speed.

Gug.name: Gug
Gug.publicNotes:
A gug's most horrid feature is its barrel-shaped head, which splits vertically to reveal numerous rows of sharp, yellow teeth and an open throat. Its eyes on either side of its head-jaw are small but keen. Bony ridges protect its eyes from the frantic flailing of its prey, as it prefers meals of raw and writhing meat over fungi and molds. It grips said prey with powerful arms that split at the elbow into a pair of forearms, giving it four clawed paws. These monstrous brutes are covered with shaggy black fur, often crusted with blood and gore.

Although gugs may seem bestial, they have keen and wicked intellects. Gugs lair far underground, but they sometimes come to the surface to hunt during dark nights, either alone or in small groups. As they possess voracious appetites, most gugs consume the creatures they catch, but some instead kidnap their victims and retreat below the surface, leaving only a lingering stench and odd, clawed paw-prints. Victims are taken to rancid lairs marked with strange runes and sacrificed to the gugs' wicked gods of blood, darkness, and nightmares. Dire rumors tell of lightless gug cities made of titanic blocks of stone far underground, where powerful gug leaders preach their vile doctrines to mobs of howling gugs.

Gugs have a strange relationship with ghouls, which seems to date from their shared origin in a distant subterranean world. Gugs live in fear of ghouls, despite towering over them; however, this strange fear doesn't apply to ghasts, whom gugs consume as voraciously as they do other creatures.

Gugs stand 16 feet tall and weigh 2,000 pounds, although they have an eerie, graceful gait that belies their immense size. Their light step and ability to squeeze through very small crannies makes gugs common bogeymen in tales of strange disappearances or bloody massacres.

Some particularly bloodthirsty gugs gain awful powers as gifts from their eldritch patrons. These monsters are known as savants, are never less than 12th level in power, and gain several occult innate spells. Though each savant's precise mix of spells varies, normally, these spells grant invisibility, offer power to manipulate and change rock, or invoke awful and destructive energies upon living flesh.

Weapon Master.name: 武器大师 Weapon Master
Weapon Master.description: 死墓骑士神卫无论持用何种武器，均可以使用该武器的重击专精效果。

Arrows.name: 箭矢 Arrows
Arrows.description: 这些箭头是弓的弹药。箭杆是木制的。一端是羽毛保持飞行中的平稳，另一端是金属头。

Clutching Armor.name: 缠结护甲 Clutching Armor
Clutching Armor.description:
触发 一个生物尝试远离死墓骑士

效果 死墓骑士的护甲活化并尝试擒获触发的生物。它进行一次用于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]的运动检定，使用死墓骑士的运动加值-2作为调整值。

护甲可以如常继续擒拿该生物。因为是护甲在抓着该生物，所以死墓骑士不需要空出一只手来使用此能力。

Channel Magic.name: 引导魔法 Channel Magic
Channel Magic.description: 死墓骑士将魔法能量重定向至它的护甲（盔甲），让它能够通过攻击传递魔法。死墓骑士施放一个花费1-2个动作、并需要一个法术攻击调整值的法术。这个法术的效果不会立即显现，而是被灌注到了一次攻击中。接着，死墓骑士进行一次武器或无武装的近战打击。那个法术与攻击相结合，使用攻击骰的结果来同时决定打击和法术的效果。在计算死墓骑士的多重攻击减值时，本能力算作两次攻击，但在此能力结算前减值不会应用。死墓骑士在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Channel Magic]]{1d4轮}内无法使用本能力。

Devastating Blast.name: 毁灭爆震 Devastating Blast
Devastating Blast.description:
死墓骑士神卫释放出@Template[cone|distance:30]能量。区域内的生物受到@Damage[9d12[fire]|options:area-damage]伤害，@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect]豁免。

死墓骑士神卫在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Devastating Blast]]{1d4轮}内无法使用此能力。

Graveknight's Curse.name: 死墓骑士诅咒 Graveknight's Curse
Graveknight's Curse.description:
诅咒会影响任何穿戴死墓骑士护甲超过1小时以上的生物。

豁免骰 @Check[will|dc:40]

潜伏期 1小时

阶段1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 1}且无法脱下盔甲（1天）

阶段2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 2}，速度承受-10尺状态减值，且无法脱下盔甲（1天）

阶段3 死亡并转化为盔甲的死墓骑士

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.6rnB7nK6J6zF4vea]

Ruinous Weapons.name: 破灭武器 Ruinous Weapons
Ruinous Weapons.description: 死墓骑士神卫所持用的任意武器或无武装攻击均获得+1高等强击和高等炽焰武器符文的效果。

Graveknight Champion.name: 死墓骑士神卫 Graveknight Champion
Graveknight Champion.publicNotes:
曾经是一位神祇的仆人，在他那为神明服务的生命被斩断后，死墓骑士神卫以不死之躯归来。

当一位可畏的斗士战死沙场，其一心复仇的魂魄有时会和他的护甲融合，创造出一名死墓骑士。

Stench.name: Stench
Stench.description:
30 feet. A creature entering the aura or starting its turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:30|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened,inflicts:slowed] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (plus @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for as long as it's sickened on a critical failure).
