While within the aura, affected creatures take a -2 circumstance penalty to saves against disease and to recover from the sickened condition. A creature that succeeds at its save is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.wX9L6fbqVMLP05hn]{Effect: Stench}

Poison Breath.name: Poison Breath
Poison Breath.description:
The catoblepas breathes a @Template[cone|distance:60] of horrid fumes, dealing @Damage[13d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:32|basic|options:area-effect] save). The area of this cone is reduced to @Template[cone|distance:30]{30 feet} underwater. Targets that fail their saving throw also become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

The catoblepas can't use its Poison Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Breath Weapon]]{1d4 rounds}.

Catoblepas.name: Catoblepas
Catoblepas.publicNotes:
The catoblepas is an aggressive beast at the best of times. Though it prefers swamps, the catoblepas has been know to forage in plains and forests for short periods, leaving behind hunting grounds tainted by its foul breath and noxious waste that other predators and prey alike avoid for days or even weeks thereafter. The catoblepas bullies those creatures it believes are a match for it, and eats everything weaker.

A catoblepas is 15 feet long and weighs 2,200 pounds.

Nosferatu Vulnerabilities.name: 诺斯费拉图弱点 Nosferatu Vulnerabilities
Nosferatu Vulnerabilities.description:
• 厌恶 Revulsion 诺斯费拉图不能主动接近一个被挥舞着的大蒜或是拥有"圣洁"祝佑的神祗的圣徽10尺以内。生物必须以一个交互动作挥舞大蒜或者圣徽，并且起效一轮（类似举起盾牌）。如果诺斯费拉图非自愿地来到了厌恶对象的10尺范围内，它获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]状态，逃离至其厌恶对象的10尺以外。在暴露于其厌恶之物下一轮之后，吸血鬼可以花费一个拥有专注特征的动作尝试一次@Check[will|dc:25|traits:concentrate]检定。一旦成功，它能在[[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6轮}内克服其厌恶（如果大成功则改为1小时）。
  • 木桩 Stake 一根刺穿诺斯费拉图心脏的魔法木桩（例如一个受武器潜能符文、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.TFitdEOpQC4SzKQQ]或类似魔法影响的木桩）能够将它的HP降至0点，并且阻止其在0HP时受到的治疗效果，就算它躺在棺木中也是如此。用木桩刺穿诺斯费拉图需要花费三动作，并且仅能在吸血鬼@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]的时候才能如此做。如果将木桩拔出，并且它还在自己的棺木中休息了1小时以后，那么诺斯费拉图便能够再次恢复至0HP以上。如果在诺斯费拉图被木桩钉穿时将其脑袋砍下后再涂上@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.z9T4c1hXwOotsMCp]，便能彻底摧毁它。

  • 阳光 Sunlight 如果暴露于阳光直射下，诺斯费拉图将立刻获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。每当它在阳光下结束其回合，缓慢值都将增加1点，如果它不再处于阳光照射下，此条件结束。如果诺斯费拉图因此失去了其所有动作，它被摧毁。

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
诺斯费拉图变成一群浅灰色的老鼠。它们获得30尺陆地速度和10尺攀爬速度，体型变为大型。位于集群内部的敌人受到@Damage[2d10[piercing]|options:area-damage]伤害，且必须进行一个@Check[reflex|basic|dc:29|options:area-effect]豁免。豁免失败的生物会暴露在远古瘟疫中。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Command Thrall.name: 号令血奴 Command Thrall
Command Thrall.description:
需求 一位诺斯费拉图的血奴在场并能听到诺斯费拉图

效果 诺斯费拉图向它的血奴下达一个命令，血奴会在他（收到命令后）的下个回合内竭尽全力去完成命令。

Dominate.name: 支配 Dominate
Dominate.description: 诺斯费拉图将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.OsOhx3TGIZ7AhD0P]作为可随意施展的神术内在法术。因为诺斯费拉图需要凝视目标的眼睛来施放此法术，所以此法术带有视觉特征；豁免DC29，豁免成功的生物在24小时内免疫它的的支配能力。完全摧毁诺斯费拉图可以终止其支配，但是仅仅将它的HP降低到0点则不足以破坏此法术。

Drink Blood.name: 吸血 Drink Blood
Drink Blood.description:
需求 诺斯费拉图的最后一个动作是一次成功的尖牙打击

效果 诺斯费拉图将尖牙刺入那个生物的体内来吸他的血。它需要进行一次@Check[athletics|against:fortitude]检定对抗那个生物的强韧DC。成功后那个生物获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}，诺斯费拉图恢复@Damage[13[healing]]HP，任何溢出的生命值都变成临时生命。从一个已经流失的生物身上吸血不会让诺斯费拉图获得生命值，但是会让这个生物的流失值加1，达到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 5}时会杀死受害者。诺斯费拉图同样可以饮下保存于容器中的血来维生，但是它不会从中恢复HP。

受害者的流失值每周减少1点。在拥有足够的血液或是一名献血者的情况下，可以通过一次@Check[medicine|dc:20]检定进行一次输血，并在10分钟后减少1点流失值。

Plague of Ancients.name: 远古瘟疫 Plague of Ancients
Plague of Ancients.description:
豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:29]

潜伏期 1日

阶段1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}（1日）

阶段2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 2}且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}（1日）

阶段3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 1}，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 3}且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 3}（1日）

阶段4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 2}，流失3且力竭3（1日）

阶段5 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]（1日）

阶段6 死亡

Plagued Coffin Restoration.name: 寝于疫土之棺 Plagued Coffin Restoration
Plagued Coffin Restoration.description: 与其他不死生物不同，诺斯费拉图不会在HP为0时被摧毁。取而代的是，它的身体崩解成大量的老鼠，这群老鼠朝着各个方向逃跑，以期能返回它们的棺材。哪怕只有一只老鼠抵达棺材，诺斯费拉图也能开始恢复。诺斯费拉图通过在死于疫病之人的墓土中休息来恢复它们的力量。如果它的身体在填满了土的棺木中休息1小时，则诺斯费拉图将获得1点生命值，紧接着它的快速治疗能力开始正常生效。但如果棺材里没有装着疫亡者的墓土的话，它就需要在棺木里休息1天才会获得1点生命值并重获它的快速治疗能力。

Nosferatu Malefactor.name: 诺斯费拉图奸宄 Nosferatu Malefactor
Nosferatu Malefactor.publicNotes:
诺斯费拉图奸宄在它苏醒时播撒瘟疫并渴求活物的鲜血。

诺斯费拉图是一类古老的吸血鬼，源自远古大瘟疫中丧生的凡人。或许是因为它们的年龄，诺斯费拉图无法再创造更多的同类。

Viper Vine.name: 蝰蛇藤 Viper Vine
Viper Vine.publicNotes:
蝰蛇藤是一种贪婪的食肉植物，在它从浓密的、多叶的蛇形藤蔓中有一朵巨大的花从中间伸出来。当这种植物通过它敏感的、浅埋的根系察觉到合适的猎物靠近时，它会像一条激动的蛇一样弓起身子，展开色彩鲜艳的花朵，释放出一团使头脑麻木的花粉。

由于蝰蛇藤并非依靠光合作用与土壤吸收养分，而是通过吞噬生物来获取营养，它们逐渐演化出了初级的行动能力，能够用触须状的根系在地面拖行前进。它们甚至具备一种初级智能，既能辨别猎物的差异，也能作出有限的战术决策，同时还会避开那些体型特别庞大或看起来格外危险的生物。

蝰蛇藤的猎场周围经常散落着被部分吞噬的受害者的遗体。野生动物腐烂的尸体、命运多舛的冒险者、甚至在附近的巨人都很常见，尸体上还零星存有一些偶然留下的宝藏。蝰蛇很少会把注意力放在它之前杀死的动物的尸体上，而更喜欢猎取新鲜的肉。

Tremorsense 60 feet.name: 震颤感知（模糊） 60尺 Tremorsense 60 feet

Cold Vulnerability.name: 寒冷弱点 Cold Vulnerability
Cold Vulnerability.description: 当暴露于寒冷效果时，蝰蛇藤会变得行动迟缓，陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}。

Captivating Pollen.name: 迷人花粉 Captivating Pollen
Captivating Pollen.description:
蝰蛇藤向@Template[type:emanation|distance:60]范围播撒@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]的花粉，漂浮在四周的空气中，持续5轮，只有中等或更强的风力才能吹散。进入范围或在范围内开始回合的每个生物都必须通过@Check[will|dc:33]豁免，否则被迷住。蝰蛇藤在[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用迷人花粉。

大成功 生物不受影响，并且在24小时内对迷人花粉临时免疫。

成功 生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}。

失败 生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]，并且它必须花费每一个动作去靠近蝰蛇藤，并且在这个过程中避开显而易见的危险。如果被迷住的生物和蝰蛇藤相邻，它会站在原地，并且不会做出任何动作。如果它在回合结束时不再位于花粉范围内，它的迷魂状态会终止。

大失败 类似失败，但生物还会陷入24小时的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}。

Bonded Vessel.name: Bonded Vessel
Bonded Vessel.description: The condition of a stone cub's vessel dictates the cub's maximum Hit Point value. Undamaged, the vessel is an object with 28 Hit Points (BT 14). When the cub is in spirit form, damaging it doesn't hurt the vessel, but damaging the vessel deals an equal amount of damage to the cub. When the cub Inhabits its Vessel, they're a single target, and damage reduces the Hit Points of both the cub and the vessel. If the vessel is broken, the cub can still fight normally while inhabiting it and suffers no ill effect, but if the vessel is ever destroyed, the cub is instantly slain and can't reconstitute.

Anchored Soul.name: Anchored Soul
Anchored Soul.description: The cub is mystically bonded to its bonded vessel and must remain within 1 mile of it. Some might be further restricted to the location it guards.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Unholy.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Unholy

Reconstitution.name: Reconstitution
Reconstitution.description: When the cub reaches 0 Hit Points, its spirit dissipates. If its bonded vessel is intact, the cub re-forms in this vessel after [[/gmr 2d4 #Reconstitution]]{2d4 days}, fully healed. If the vessel is broken, it must first be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repaired}, after which the cub reforms in [[/gmr 3d4 #Reconstitution]]{3d4 days}.

Inhabit Vessel.name: Inhabit Vessel
Inhabit Vessel.description:
The cub touches and melds with its bonded vessel, bringing the statue to life. It can cease Inhabiting its Vessel by spending a single action, which has the concentrate trait. While Inhabiting the Vessel, it loses its fly Speed and gains:

Immunities healing, nonlethal

Resistances physical 3 (except bludgeoning)

Speed 20 feet; and the following Strike.

  • Melee A Jaws +10 (agile), Damage 1d6+5 bludgeoning plus @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{Grab}.

Spirit Body.name: Spirit Body
Spirit Body.description: When not Inhabiting its Vessel, the cub is incorporeal and gains resistance 3 to all damage (except force damage and damage from Strikes with the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune; double resistance against non-magical).

Stone Lion Cub.name: Stone Lion Cub
Stone Lion Cub.publicNotes:
Stone lion cubs are curious, playful, and occasionally accidental mischief makers. Despite their still developing abilities, they eagerly hone their skills with make-believe missions. Many hope that they'll one day become responsible guardians like their parents.

Smaller in stature and ferocity, stone lion cubs sometimes try to guard places of smaller importance, often including facsimiles of the same kinds of structures their parents attend. They're less than dependable as guardians, as they have the attention span and rambunctious nature of children. Their parents often need to call them to heel, ordering them to stay at the parent's side as parent and child both stay motionless for the rising day.

Stone statues of beasts can often be found paired and standing guard to either side of an entryway. While some seem like merely lifeless statues, others are far more than they appear to be. Guardian beasts ward against evil and misfortune. Some of these celestial spirits were assigned this task, while others assumed their roles out of a sense of duty. To allow them to maintain a constant presence in the material world, pious artisans carve stone vessels of the beasts in their likeness; these statues then serve as anchors for the guardian beasts' souls. Should the need arise, guardian beasts can merge with their stony form, becoming a dangerous foe with noble courage, an indomitable will, and few weaknesses.

By day, guardian beasts stay in their vessels and pretend to be inanimate. Past nightfall, they might patrol the grounds in their stone form or leave the heavy vessel behind to go where a solid body can't reach. Some take this chance to visit the dreams of individuals they favor and send them messages, notifying them of strange occurrences or warning them of incoming danger. Despite their good intentions, the dream messages from guardian beasts can be obscure, often overshadowed by the spirit's personality or strange assumptions they make due to their nature as resolute guardians.

While guardian beasts can work alone, they usually appear in bonded pairs who complement each other in nature. One could be a jokester, the other gloomy; another could be nurturing, the other strict. To make two otherwise identical-looking beasts distinct, sculptors often depict one stone animal with their young. In the case of stone lions, a common type of guardian beasts, this approach means carving stone lion cubs to accompany one of the guardians.
Stone Lion Cub.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. evil

Indomitable Oration.description: 任何能听懂语言的生物都能理解叛教魔的发言，就如同它在同时用所有语言说话一样。
Indomitable Oration.name: 雄辩演讲 Indomitable Oration

Change Shape.name: 变形 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
叛教魔能变为任意类人生物的外观。这不会改变它的速度或打击伤害，但有可能会改变它打击的伤害类型（例如变为钝击）。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

+4 Bonus on Perception to Sense motive.name: 察言观色的察觉检定+4状态加值 +4 Bonus on Perception to Sense motive

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Whispers of Discord.name: 异见低语 Whispers of Discord
Whispers of Discord.description:
触发 一个60尺内的生物，被恢复生命的法术或提供状态加值的法术选为目标（叛教魔会自动辨识出此类效果）

效果 叛教魔低语令人不安的谎言，只有目标自己能听见，动摇目标对法术施放者的信任。目标必须成功尝试@Check[will|dc:38]豁免。

大成功 目标不相信谎言，获得法术给与的全部好处；目标在24小时内对此能力临时免疫。

成功 类似大成功，但是没有临时免疫。

失败 法术未能影响目标。目标在1轮内拒绝来自该施法者的所有帮助，并且不视为该施法者的盟友。

大失败 类似失败，但是持续时间1分钟。

Boundless Reach.name: 伸手可及 Boundless Reach
Boundless Reach.description: 叛教魔锋利的爪子可以刺破现实，让它可以直接对任何目视到的或通过预言系法术观察到的生物进行爪抓打击，或将其作为接触法术的目标。被这种方法伤害的目标可以进行反击，直到叛教魔的下一回合开始；它能把叛教魔的爪子作为攻击目标，就如同魔鬼和它相邻，但爪子本身具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]。

Whisper Earworm.name: 耳语洗脑 Whisper Earworm
Whisper Earworm.description:
叛教魔对一个相邻目标灌输大量令人震惊的事实，动摇他对现实和神祇的信仰。目标必须尝试@Check[will|dc:38]豁免。天族和魔族对此豁免有+2状态加值。

大成功 目标不受影响并且在24小时内对耳语洗脑临时免疫。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标下一次休息时，他会在脑海里反复思考叛教魔所说过的话，而不是睡觉或休息。他在醒来时会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]。目标在疲乏持续时间内还会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}，直到他不再疲乏。

大失败 类似失败，但是@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 2}。在休息后，目标必须尝试另一次@Check[will|dc:38]豁免。如果失败，目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}，并且对抗来自邪秽生物的效果时，意志豁免有-4减值。此效果会一直持续到目标遗忘叛教魔的耳语为止，这需要用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FhOaQDTSnsY7tiam]法术，或其他能修改记忆的方法，或如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]一般强大的法术。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.bzwFaDNBYsGpC4ed]

Deimavigga.name: 叛教魔 Deimavigga
Deimavigga.publicNotes:
作为冷酷、算计的逻辑和抓住完美的时机让人改变信仰的大师，令人厌恶的叛教魔热衷于让教友反目，并且会充分利用每一个让信徒放弃自身信仰的机会。它们最常用的武器是凡人的自负与绝望。对那些在信仰体系中身居高位或野心勃勃之人，它们会引诱其走向自我膨胀，直到对方将自己的地位放在首位，而将神明与神职人员置于次要位置。而那些易于怀疑或心生伤痛之人，则会被孤立——叛教魔会扰乱他们的神术，削弱他们的信仰。

九层地狱中有无数恪守秩序的魔鬼军团，他们不断和天族交战，在物质位面中寻觅堕落的灵魂。
Deimavigga.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Leprechaun Magic.name: Leprechaun Magic
Leprechaun Magic.description: Leprechauns love to use their magic to beguile others, and after generations of doing so, they've developed a strong connection to such tricks. When a leprechaun uses their innate spells to deceive, trick, or humiliate a creature, the spell DC increases to 20 and the attack modifier to +12.

Create Object.name: Create Object
Create Object.description:
Frequency three times per day

Effect The leprechaun produces an item out of their hat, from behind their jacket, from within a hole in a tree stump, or from any other unexpected location. This conjured item must be no more than 1 Bulk and must be made of relatively commonplace material (such as cloth, wood, stone, or even low-value metal like iron or lead). It can't rely on intricate artistry or complex moving parts, never fulfills a Cost or the like, and can't be made of precious materials or materials with a rarity of uncommon or higher. The created object is temporary and lasts for 1 hour or until the leprechaun creates a new item, whichever comes first.

Leprechaun.name: Leprechaun
Leprechaun.publicNotes:
Leprechauns are mostly jovial tricksters who prefer mischief over conflict. They fill their days with as much fun, wine, and food as possible. Mostly found in forested regions, leprechauns respect nature and those who protect it.

Leprechauns do not attack on sight. Rather, they engage in conversation and try to charm, cajole, or trick those they meet into doing favors for them or freely giving over a treasured item, usually in return for illusory wealth or false promises of wealth and success. These small tricksters are masters at discerning the desires of those they meet-a knack that puts them in a powerful position when bargaining for goods or favors. They aren't above turning people against each other for their own benefit but generally not to an extent that causes harm.

In most cases, a leprechaun doesn't keep a purloined possession for long. The leprechaun most often returns such stolen prizes just in time to defuse tensions, often as they point out the humor of the situation, hoping to share their amusement and mirth with the victim. In cases where a leprechaun's trick goes too far and results in an incensed victim, the leprechaun quickly flees the conflict rather than engage in combat. This willingness to return stolen goods or to flee from battles fades as leprechauns grow older. Ancient leprechauns who have lived for thousands of years often spiral into dark bitterness and increasingly use their powers and illusions to lure those who offend them or fail to appreciate a joke into danger... or even death.

Brood Leech Swarm.name: Brood Leech Swarm
Brood Leech Swarm.publicNotes: Most smaller species of leeches do not tend to swarm, but brood leeches are prone to gathering in seething, undulant mats of squirming gluttony. When they gather in sufficient numbers to swarm, they eschew the stealth of a lone leech's feeding methods in favor of swift and merciless feeding. In these situations, their mild venom can affect much larger creatures than their usual prey.

Blood Draining Bites.name: Blood Draining Bites
Blood Draining Bites.description: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save). A creature who fails the Reflex save also takes @Damage[1d6[persistent,bleed]] damage and is exposed to brood leech swarm venom.

Brood Leech Swarm Venom.name: Brood Leech Swarm Venom
Brood Leech Swarm Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and -5-foot status penalty to Speed (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and -10-foot status penalty to Speed (1 round).

Goblin Snake.name: 地精蛇 Goblin Snake
Goblin Snake.publicNotes:
地精蛇有时候会驯养蛇作为宠物或伙伴。

地精蛇是一种散发恶臭的蛇形生物，全身覆盖油腻的黑色鳞片，口中布满獠牙，长着酷似地精的无唇头颅。

Coiled Strike.name: 盘绕打击 Coiled Strike
Coiled Strike.description: 如同@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.W7SbTykXrNwxDzJc]，但地精蛇只能在盘绕后使用此反应。

Coil.name: 盘绕 Coil
Coil.description: 地精蛇使用一个动作将自身盘绕起来，使其尖牙的船机范围从5尺提升至10尺。在地精蛇使用其尖牙打击后，它变为未盘绕。

Goblin Breath.name: 地精吐息 Goblin Breath
Goblin Breath.description: 地精蛇喷出一团@Template[type:cone|distance:15]范围的恶臭蒸汽。蒸汽范围内的非地精生物必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:16|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened,inflicts:slowed]豁免，否则将陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}。大失败时，生物在处于恶心状态期间还将陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。成功豁免的生物免疫24小时。地精蛇在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Goblin Breath]]{1d4轮}内不能再次使用地精吐息。

Requiem Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).name: 青年安魂龙施法者 Requiem Dragon (Young, Spellcaster)
Requiem Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 安魂龙是灵魂之河（River of Souls）的守护者，负责引导灵魂抵达其在来世的最终归宿。灵魂的安全旅程对安魂龙至关重要，一些安魂龙会从灵魂首次进入灵魂之河开始，直到它们在骨园的审判，最终引导灵魂到达它们最终的安息之地。大多数安魂龙将自己与特定的位面绑定，负责守护所有进入该位面的灵魂，导致这些龙与天堂或地狱等地方相关联，尽管这些龙从不对这些位面宣誓效忠。安魂龙将它们的巢穴建在灵魂之河沿岸——这些巢穴是从其他位面拯救出来的沉重建筑拼接而成——并充满了无价的记录和伟大成就的纪念物。

Soul Journey.name: 灵魂之旅 Soul Journey
Soul Journey.description: 安魂龙花费1小时穿越位面通道进入灵魂之河，然后可以到达灵魂之河的任意位置。这具备@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]效果，但安魂龙能够精确到达任何主要位面上的地点。

Status Sight.name: 状态视觉 Status Sight
Status Sight.description: 安魂龙会自动知晓它能看到的所有生物的生命值。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Divine.name: 对抗神术全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Divine

Soul Anchor.name: 灵魂锚定 Soul Anchor
Soul Anchor.description:
触发 一个60尺内的生物的生命值将降至0

效果 安魂龙将触发生物的灵魂锚定于其躯体，该生物的生命值保持在1点，陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 2}，并获得与安魂龙等级相等的快速治疗，持续1分钟。该生物在24小时内暂时免疫灵魂锚定效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.k8bmDh3nWi2FUyz5]

Withhold Death.name: 阻止死亡 Withhold Death
Withhold Death.description:
触发 安魂龙被一次攻击重击

效果 安魂龙抵抗灵魂的松动，减少部分伤害。安魂针对触发攻击获得10点所有伤害类型的抗力。

Dooming Breath.name: 毁灭吐息 Dooming Breath
Dooming Breath.description: 安魂龙从口中喷出来自创生熔炉的能量，在@Template[type:line|distance:60]范围内造成@Damage[9d8[spirit]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。豁免失败的不死生物还必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:30|options:area-effect,inflicts:doomed]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 1}。如果目标已陷入毁灭，则毁灭值增加1（最多为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 4}）。安魂龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dooming Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用毁灭吐息。

Requiem Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).allSaves: 对抗神术的全豁免+2状态加值

Soulrider (Fiend).name: 溯魂鳗（魔族） Soulrider (Fiend)
Soulrider (Fiend).publicNotes:
虽然溯魂鳗可以长得相当大，但它们通常大多只有几英尺长，体态细长。在附着于灵魂并穿越位面后，它们必须在开始成长前完成对新环境的适应。

这些最小型的溯魂可能出现在通常宇宙中任何拥有通往外层位面传送门或有召唤魔法痕迹的地方。野外的大批幼体常被大自然的捕食者所掠食，但单个幼体可以存活多年，并为了寻找宿主而旅行很多英里。

溯魂鳗会使用它那无害的吸盘来搭生物灵魂的"便车"。这种生物外形酷似八目鳗或盲鳗，拖着一条长长的鞭状尾巴。吸盘吸附这种连接形式看似简单，实际上是超脱了物质形态直接附着在宿主的灵魂上，以随其一同前往灵魂所去之处。一旦抵达目的地，溯魂鳗就会离开宿主，吸收周围的位面能量，适应新环境并成长到足以产下子嗣。然而，它只能在普通的物质宇宙中生产，因此它必须寻找传送门或通过其他方式返回。通过这种循环，它们已经扩散到了每一个外层位面（Outer Sphere），以及许多凡人世界。

虽然溯魂鳗的活动范围很大，但它们其实才出现了一百多年。据传闻，曾有一名畸肉师（Fleshwarper）试图通过将数个无辜灵魂吸附在自己身上，来尝试欺瞒法莱斯玛的审判。自那以后，溯魂鳗就开始出现，数量呈爆炸式增长。

虽然溯魂鳗仅需空气即可生存，但它们本能地意识到自己对凡人灵魂的需求。尽管它们的吸盘是无害的，但感到威胁或变得焦躁时溯魂鳗会用鞭状尾巴解决掉宿主或其他威胁。

Planar Adaptation (Fiend).name: 位面适应（魔族） Planar Adaptation (Fiend)
Planar Adaptation (Fiend).description: 如果溯魂鳗跟随一个灵魂来到了其终点，它会获得这个位面相关的特征。根据终点的不同，溯魂鳗获得天族和圣洁，魔族和邪秽，或是观察者特征。

Fiendish Lunge.name: 邪性猛冲 Fiendish Lunge
Fiendish Lunge.description: 溯魂鳗行走或游泳2次，在移动过程中任意时间点进行一次尾扫打击。该次打击额外造成1d4精魂伤害。

Propulsive Launch.name: 推进起步 Propulsive Launch
Propulsive Launch.description: 溯魂鳗跳跃至多40尺，然后进行一次吸盘打击。如果它在空中且在打击后未附着于生物，则其坠落。

Soul Attach.name: 灵魂吸附 Soul Attach
Soul Attach.description: 当一个溯魂鳗成功对一个目标进行吸盘打击，并且该目标的灵魂会面对审判时，它会吸附在该生物的灵魂上。当吸附时，溯魂鳗和宿主陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，溯魂鳗随着宿主移动而移动，直到溯魂鳗死亡或宿主拉开溯魂鳗（[[/act escape dc=15]]）。如果宿主在溯魂吸附期间死亡，溯魂鳗立即消失，随着灵魂脱离宿主的肉体。如果生物在抵达其灵魂的终点前被复活，溯魂鳗也会跟着回来。

Tail Thrash.name: 猛烈尾扫 Tail Thrash
Tail Thrash.description:
需求 溯魂鳗正吸附于一个生物的灵魂上

效果 溯魂鳗对吸附的生物进行一次尾扫打击，然后对另一个跟宿主邻接的生物进行一次尾扫打击。这些打击会计入溯魂鳗的多重攻击减值，但在第二次打击完成之前不会生效。

Impossible Stature.name: Impossible Stature
Impossible Stature.description: 100 feet. Titans warp perception and distance around them to seem even larger and more imposing. A creature that enters or begins its turn within the emanation must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:44] save or its movement toward the titan is movement over difficult terrain (greater difficult terrain on a critical failure) for 1 round.

+4 Status to All Saves vs. Mental.name: +4 Status to All Saves vs. Mental

Titanic Grasp.name: Titanic Grasp
Titanic Grasp.description: The titan makes a fist Strike against a creature affected by their impossible stature, even if it's outside of the titan's normal reach. On a hit, the titan automatically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabs} the creature and, if out of their reach, pulls it within reach.

Wide Cleave.name: Wide Cleave
Wide Cleave.description: The titan makes a melee weapon Strike against each foe within their reach. This counts as three attacks for the titan's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until all attacks have been made.

Elysian Titan.name: Elysian Titan
Elysian Titan.publicNotes:
Those titans who remained true to their creators, refusing to participate in their peers' rebellion, earned their freedom while the others were imprisoned. Many Elysian titans train aspiring champions of freedom, sacrifice, and selflessness.

Created by ancient deities long before the rise of mortal ancestries, titans united and attempted to overthrow their deific progenitors. The resulting war still figures prominently throughout mortal myths, in which most titans were cast down and imprisoned for eons.
Elysian Titan.allSaves: +4 status to all saves vs. mental

Reshape Reality.name: 重塑现实 Reshape Reality
Reshape Reality.description: 当伊兹菲塔施放@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.HBJPsonQnWcC3qdX]时，会为幻象注入半真实的物质。未识破该幻象的生物，会将法术创造出的建筑与地形视为真实——例如走上虚幻的楼梯、被虚幻的流沙困住等等。

Storm of Claws.name: 利爪风暴 Storm of Claws
Storm of Claws.description: 伊兹菲塔可发动至多六次爪打击，每次针对不同的目标。

Entropy Sense (Imprecise) 120 feet.name: 熵力感知（模糊）120尺 Entropy Sense (Imprecise) 120 feet
Entropy Sense (Imprecise) 120 feet.description:
幻蛇能通过对混乱的概率与机运的超自然洞察力来预测到生物最可能存在的位置。

这会赋予它在所列范围内感知生物的能力。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EoKBlgf6Smt8opaU]可阻止生物被熵力感知自动侦测到（若未通过反制检定）。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Kiss of the Speakers.name: 诉说者之吻 Kiss of the Speakers
Kiss of the Speakers.description: 伊兹菲塔持续摆弄自身移动或操控魔法时的无数可能性。它始终处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]状态，且额外动作仅能用于快步、行走或作为施放法术动作的一部分。

Prescient Revision.name: 预知之修 Prescient Revision
Prescient Revision.description:
触发 伊兹菲塔在一次检定中失败

效果 伊兹菲塔重新掷骰该检定，并取较好结果。在接下来的[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内，它将失去诉说者之吻的效果，且无法使用重塑现实能力。

Protean Anatomy 25.name: 幻蛇体质25 Protean Anatomy 25
Protean Anatomy 25.description:
幻蛇的要害器官会不断地变形和改变位置。当幻蛇承受酸蚀、电击或音波伤害后，它会立即获得抗力数据中所列数值的对应伤害抗力。这会持续1小时或直至幻蛇承受上述伤害类型中的其他种类为止（在这种情况下，幻蛇的抗力会再度变换并与该类型相匹配），以较先发生者为准。

除非幻蛇自身自愿，否则它对变形效果免疫。若陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]，幻蛇会在它的下个回合结束时自动恢复，因为新的感受器官已经形成并取代了受损的器官。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.c6SiBB3mzV8lZUQr]

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
伊兹菲塔呈现出任意体型不超过超大型的生物外观。这不会改变他的速度或其打击的攻击与伤害加值，但这有可能改变他的打击所造成的伤害类型。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Greater Warpwave Strike.name: 高等扭曲波打击 Greater Warpwave Strike
Greater Warpwave Strike.description:
被伊兹菲塔的颚或爪打击命中并造成伤害的生物，必须通过@Check[fortitude|dc:42]豁免；若失败，将承受一次特别强大的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.rollable-tables.RollTable.yRZwPolTnRdnz42V]效果。

目标需掷骰两次，并同时应用两个结果，若掷出重复结果则重掷。

Izfiitar.name: 伊兹菲塔 Izfiitar
Izfiitar.publicNotes:
在松散的幻蛇阶体系中，伊兹菲塔居于顶点，执行着备受尊崇的幻蛇领主与神圣的深邃诉说者（Speakers of the Depths）那永不停歇的万变计划。

幻蛇是混沌以肉身构筑的表现形式，这些大漩涡的居民以蛇形的姿态表现着熵的原始力量。他们遵循的制度松散混乱、变化多端，但共享着可扩展又易消逝的理念。
Izfiitar.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Incutilis.name: Incutilis
Incutilis.publicNotes:
Incutilises are intelligent, nautilus-like sea creatures that attack their victims' brains to take over their bodies, creating puppets to use for labor, combat, or their own malevolent amusement.

An adult incutilis is slightly smaller than an adult human head, and their shell bears a pattern of crimson streaks that resemble the ridges and furrows of a brain. Incutilises hatch within the depths of the sea, where they start off consuming bottom-dwelling crustaceans and sometimes even whales or sharks. As they grow into adults, incutilises instinctively crave the complex tissues of other creatures' brains—the more complex, the better—preferring to target humanoids and animals.

Eventually, an incutilis will make an excursion onto land specifically to find a puppet to control. Using their tentacles to crawl up onto shore or climb aboard a ship, they then drive their tendrils directly into the brain of a helpless living (or very recently dead) land creature. An incutilis takes control of their new host through this neurological connection. This host—now called a puppet—rarely survives the experience.

After an incutilis has taken full control, they can usually ride their puppet for as long as they wish. Often, they use the puppet to seek out other potential prey, battling other creatures until the wear and tear from repeated conflict renders their current body useless.

Abandon Puppet.name: Abandon Puppet
Abandon Puppet.description:
Requirements The incutilis is attached to a puppet

Effect The incutilis abandons its puppet, detaching and separating from its nervous system. If the puppet is still alive, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} and temporarily immune to that incutilis's Puppetmaster ability for 24 hours.

Puppetmaster.name: Puppetmaster
Puppetmaster.description:
An incutilis drives tendrils into a Small or Medium living creature that's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by the incutilis. They attach and inject the unfortunate host with enzymes to take over control of the creature's nervous system, turning the host into a puppet controlled by the incutilis.

The puppet becomes controlled by the incutilis, and gains dying 2. This doesn't change the puppet's HP, and the puppet can have this dying condition even if it has more than 0 HP. If the puppet dies, its body remains under the control of the incutilis until it's destroyed or the incutilis Abandons the Puppet.

If the puppet recovers from the dying condition, the incutilis immediately Abandons the Puppet. While controlling a puppet, the incutilis is attached to the puppet's head (or elsewhere, if its brain is in an unconventional location) and moves along with it. The puppet uses its own AC, Hit Points, Fortitude and Reflex saves, and physical Strikes, but it uses the incutilis's Will save. The puppet can perform only basic actions and untrained uses of the Athletics and Stealth skills while controlled.

Any attack that deals damage to the puppet also deals @Damage[1[mental]] damage to the incutilis. Area effects are applied to both the incutilis and puppet. The incutilis always has lesser cover while in control of a puppet.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.other-effects.Item.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{Effect: Cover}

Sacristan.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Painsight.name: 痛苦视觉 Painsight
Painsight.description: 链魔能自动知晓它们能看到的一个生物是否具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]状态，以及具体的状态值。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Regeneration 10 (Deactivated by Holy or.name: 再生10（圣洁或银使其无效） Regeneration 10 (Deactivated by Holy or Silver)

Staggering Servitude.name: 骇人奴役 Staggering Servitude
Staggering Servitude.description: 30尺。当一个生物在灵光内结束他的回合时，将会看到了一幅残侍魔在可怜的奴役中卑躬屈膝的景象。该生物必须通过@Check[will|dc:27|options:inflicts:stunned]检定否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

Focus Gaze.name: 聚焦凝视 Focus Gaze
Focus Gaze.description: 残侍魔盯着30尺内一个他能看见的生物。生物必须立即尝试一次针对骇人奴役能力的意志豁免。此外，如果生物已经陷入震慑，并且豁免失败，他对残侍魔的厌恶会导致它陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}，持续1分钟。在尝试此次豁免之后，生物直到残侍魔的下回合开始之前对专注凝视临时免疫。

Shadow Scream.name: 影界狂嚎 Shadow Scream
Shadow Scream.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 残侍魔张开嘴巴，释放出影界的哀号嚎叫和扭曲心灵的黑暗。这能在残侍魔@Template[type:emanation|distance:30]范围内制造一团黑暗，并且周身被嚎叫声包围。拥有黑暗视觉的生物也无法看穿这团黑暗。残侍魔能维持影界狂嚎最多1分钟。当此能力启动时，范围中非链魔的生物，无论是进入范围还是在范围内开始回合，必须尝试@Check[will|dc:28|options:damaging-effect,inflicts:confused,inflicts:deafened]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响并且临时免疫24小时。

成功 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]1轮。

失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]和耳聋1轮。

大失败 该生物受到@Damage[20[mental]|options:area-damage]伤害，并且陷入困惑和耳聋1轮。

Sacristan.name: 残侍魔 Sacristan
Sacristan.publicNotes:
残侍魔是链魔中的失败者，他们的身体和思想都被链魔的折磨彻底玩坏了。这些不幸的人现在是由废金属、羸弱的肉体和黑暗的碎片组成的忠诚的代理人，他们以为其他链魔效力为乐。残侍魔的喉咙里有一个通向影界的微型通道，通过张开嘴巴，他们能发出如同来自影界的尖叫和风暴那样的嚎叫声。残侍魔的外观各不相同，但体型和残废的人类相仿。他们基本没有什么多余的特征，全身被带刺和生锈的铁链包裹。

这些栖身于暗影的魔族——链魔——全都有着一种骇人的执念：通过自残来追寻终极感官体验。链魔只有在向受害者施加痛苦与恐惧、尝试新的酷刑手法，或是将折磨反施于己身时，才会暂时摆脱一贯的冷酷淡漠。它们自诩为觉悟者，超越了道德与凡俗禁忌的束缚；但在受害者眼中，它们只是毫无感情、专施虐待狂式痛苦的折磨者。这些魔族声称在思想、形式和行为上追求绝对的完美，并且它们不承认那些不需要切除肉体或折磨精神的锻炼方式。

链魔从极度喜欢施虐或受虐的凡人灵魂中诞生，它们被审判并被送往影界。它们被塑造成各种适合于它们邪恶嗜好的形态，从低级的邪窥魔到制造痛苦和残废的大师邪隐魔。转化过程会进一步扭曲它们的灵魂，其他的链魔会将它们的新成员送到影界数不清的痛苦之室中。

Ether Spider Venom.name: Ether Spider Venom
Ether Spider Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:22]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Ethereal Step.name: Ethereal Step
Ethereal Step.description: The ether spider shifts to either the Ethereal Plane or the Universe. The ether spider can remain on the Ethereal Plane indefinitely without ill effect. While there, it can see clearly into the Universe with a range of 60 feet. On its first round in an encounter, the ether spider can use this ability once as a free action.

Ethereal Web Trap.name: Ethereal Web Trap
Ethereal Web Trap.description: A creature hit by the ether spider's web attack is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} and stuck to the nearest surface (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} DC 22).

Web Burst.name: Web Burst
Web Burst.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The ether spider flings a gout of stored webs in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. These webs can pass between the Universe and the Ethereal Plane. Each creature in the area is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, as ethereal web trap, unless it succeeds at a @Check[reflex|dc:22] save.

Ether Spider.name: Ether Spider
Ether Spider.publicNotes:
Ether spiders are members of a vague taxonomy called ethereal wildlife and are deadly predators from the Ethereal Plane. They are giant arachnids who can shape the raw essence of the Ethereal Plane as easily as spinning silk, weaving it in complex patterns that drift through the misty void. From these ethereal nests, whole families of ether spiders can scout adjacent locales in the Universe, watching for easy prey in dark or remote corners of the land of mortals. Once an ether spider has spotted a meal, it anchors its nest and waits on the Ethereal Plane for its prey to draw near. As soon as its victim is within reach, the ether spider shifts to the Universe, clamps its fangs onto its prey, then shifts back to the Ethereal Plane to wait as its venom works through the creature's system. Ether spiders move between the planes with ease, making them extremely dangerous to those who can't see or attack ethereal enemies.

Ether spiders are not mindless or cruel—they are simply hungry. If a prospective meal can sate an ether spider's incredible appetite through other means, they might be able to bargain for their life. Ether spiders are especially interested in items, information, or allies who can help them against their enemies.

Ether spiders dwell in vast nests adrift in the Ethereal Plane, where as many as half a dozen ether spiders might cohabitate. Although ether spiders enjoy one another's company, they don't form the same bonds as most humanoids, and they are more likely to feast on the corpse of a fallen sibling than save one from certain doom. When not hunting prey, ether spiders are likely to let down their guard. Travelers who find a floating ether spider commune should have an easier time of making peaceful contact to trade with or even befriend these strange arachnids. The nests drift on metaphysical currents and are rarely seen in the same vicinity twice.

Sometimes a point of interest in the neighboring Universe compels them to tether their nest to an area, creating a semipermanent home.

Entangling Tresses.name: Entangling Tresses
Entangling Tresses.description: A rusalka can have up to eight creatures grabbed within their tresses at a time.

Flowing Hair.name: Flowing Hair
Flowing Hair.description: The rusalka attempts an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude|options:forced-movement] check against the Fortitude DC of each creature they have @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by their tresses. The rusalka moves each creature they succeed against up to 10 feet and each creature they critically succeed against up to 20 feet. This movement must all be within reach of its tresses.

Beckoning Call.name: Beckoning Call
Beckoning Call.description:
The rusalka cries out a compelling invitation. Each non-fey creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:300] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:29|options:area-effect,inflicts:fascinated] save. The effect lasts for 1 round, but if the rusalka uses Beckoning Call again on subsequent rounds, the duration extends by 1 round for all affected creatures. Once a creature succeeds at any save against Beckoning Call, that creature is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} and must spend each of its actions to move closer to the rusalka, avoiding obvious dangers. If a beckoned creature is adjacent to the rusalka, it stays still and doesn't act. If attacked by the rusalka, the creature is freed from captivation at the end of the rusalka's turn.

Critical Failure As failure, but if attacked by the rusalka, the creature can attempt a new save only at the start of its next turn, rather than being freed at the end of the rusalka's turn.

Shameful Touch.name: Shameful Touch
Shameful Touch.description:
The rusalka touches a creature within 5 feet using their hand, stirring up memories of regret and shame. The target must attempt a @Check[will|dc:35|options:inflicts:sickened,inflicts:stunned] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The creature is sickened 1 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is sickened 1, stunned 1, and it must use its first action on its next turn to Strike itself, automatically hitting.

Rusalka.name: Rusalka
Rusalka.publicNotes: These androgynous, river-dwelling fey delight in manipulating the emotions of those unfortunate enough to fall into their grasp, using humiliation to break victims' wills. Rusalkas enjoy keeping their broken toys nearby, both for continuing entertainment and to aid in their defense, as their captives' misery often drives them to become obsessively loyal to these fey. If a person ever escapes a rusalka's clutches, the rusalka will likely seek them out and shame them for "abandoning" their home, all in the hopes their victim regresses into a distressed mental state and returns to captivity.

Reactive Strike.name: 反应打击 Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
怨帽匠可以针对触发此能力的生物使用掷帽（Hat Toss），以代替普通的打击，并使用@Check[millindemalion-hat-toss|against:ac]{+27}调整值进行近战攻击掷骰。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

Unsettling Mind.name: 不安心智 Unsettling Mind
Unsettling Mind.description: 试图触碰怨帽匠那狂乱的心智是一项危险的任务。当怨帽匠成功通过一次针对心灵效果的豁免后，引发该效果的生物将受到@Damage[4d6[mental]]伤害。

Hat Toss.name: 掷帽 Hat Toss
Hat Toss.description:
怨帽匠在战斗中迅速制作出一顶惑心之帽，手腕一抖将其掷向目标。怨帽匠从下列效果中选择其一，然后以@Check[millindemalion-hat-toss|against:ac]{+27}调整值进行一次远程攻击掷骰，射程增量为20尺。

若命中，目标必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:33]豁免，否则将承受所列效果，持续[[/gmr 1d4+1 #Duration Hat Toss]]{1d4+1轮}。若怨帽匠以此远程打击大成功，目标的该次豁免将承受-4环境减值。

目标同一时间只能佩戴一顶怨帽匠制作的帽子；新帽子会取代旧帽子。在该状态结束前，帽子无法被移除；当状态结束（或目标豁免成功）时，帽子便会碎裂崩解。

  • 困惑圆顶礼帽 帽子遮蔽了目标的思维；目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}
  • 魅惑贝雷帽 目标迷恋上新帽子的制作者，对怨帽匠@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]
  • 眩目猎鹿帽 帽子压低遮住眼睛，令目标视线模糊，获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]状态
  • 拘缚软呢帽 目标感到沉重压力压顶而来，其速度承受-10尺环境减值。
  • 疲惫三角帽 目标变得昏昏欲睡，陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.FQrNDisx6noJnFaQ]

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: 怨帽匠的打击对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]的生物额外造成4d6精准伤害伤害。

Millindemalion.name: 怨帽匠 Millindemalion
Millindemalion.publicNotes: 怨帽匠是一种残忍的精类恶作剧者，能够利用他们的魔法帽子制造浩劫。世界各地的许多民间传说都讲述过勤劳的精类在夜间帮助苦苦挣扎的手艺人——鞋匠、帽匠、裁缝等——秘密制作优质商品，且不求回报，只需一点面包屑或一盘奶油。这些故事并非空穴来风，因为优雅的精类确实偶尔会从第一世界（First World）来到凡间，一时兴起帮助谦逊的手艺人，换取食物贿赂，有时甚至是为了齐心协力向世界传播美。然而，当手艺人对这种帮助变得过于依赖时，他们友善的精类助手可能会因怨恨和忽视而扭曲变质。最终，他们可能蜕变成以惩罚敢将此类世俗工作托付给精类的凡人为乐的残忍恶作剧者。怨帽匠便是友善的帽匠精类经历此种蜕变后的产物。一些学者认为，这种异常行为是由大多数女帽制作中大量使用的水银（quicksilver）引起的。

Mobogo.name: Mobogo

Tongue Grab.name: Tongue Grab
Tongue Grab.description:
A creature hit by the mobogo's tongue becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the mobogo. The creature isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, but it can't move beyond the reach of the mobogo's tongue.

A creature can sever the tongue with a Strike against AC 27 that deals at least 10 slashing damage. This deals no damage to the mobogo but prevents it from using its tongue Strike until it regrows its tongue, which takes 1 round.

The mobogo can move without ending the Grab as long as the creature remains within the tongue's reach.

Tongue Reposition.name: Tongue Reposition
Tongue Reposition.description: When a mobogo successfully Repositions a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by their tongue, they increase the distance they can move that creature by 10 feet (a total of 15 feet on a success or 20 feet on a critical success); the creature must remain within the tongue's reach. Alternatively, the mobogo can transfer the grabbed creature to being grabbed by the mobogo's jaws.

Regeneration 30 (Deactivated by Acid, Co.name: Regeneration 30 (Deactivated by Acid, Cold, or Fire)

Song of the Swamp.name: Song of the Swamp
Song of the Swamp.description:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The mobogo unleashes a booming croak. All boggards and mobogos within @Template[emanation|distance:50]{50 feet} gain a +2 status bonus to damage rolls and saves against fear for 1 round. Other creatures in the area of effect must attempt a @Check[will|dc:27] save.

Success The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for [[/gmr 1d4 #Duration Slowed]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for [[/gmr 1d4 #Duration Slowed]]{1d4 rounds}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.hftFxE8JGJGzXAtU]{Effect: Song of the Swamp}

Swamp Stride.name: Swamp Stride
Swamp Stride.description: A mobogo ignores difficult terrain caused by swamp terrain features.

Mobogo.publicNotes: Mobogos are massive, swamp-dwelling monstrosities that combine the worst aspects of giant toads and evil dragons. Lazy, cruel, and greedy, these vile creatures make their lairs in the most ancient and primordial swamps. The boggards who call such places home worship mobogos as living demigods, regularly bringing sacrifices of food and valuables lest they become the next victims of the mobogos' boundless appetites.
Mobogo.hp: regeneration 30 (deactivated by acid, cold, or fire)

Send Beyond.name: Send Beyond
Send Beyond.description:
Requirements The titan has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The titan thrusts the creature into a nightmare realm full of lightless hands and eyes. This has the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Oj1PJBMQD9vuwCv7]{Quandary} (DC 48). The titan can't use Send Beyond for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Send Beyond]]{1d4 rounds}.

Shape Emptiness.name: Shape Emptiness
Shape Emptiness.description: The titan molds a weapon from interstellar darkness. This empty weapon is a +3 major striking weapon in any form. The titan can't be disarmed of this weapon and it deals an additional @Damage[2d12[force]] damage. If Released, an empty weapon vanishes.

+4 Status to All Saves vs. Mental or Div.name: +4 Status to All Saves vs. Mental or Divine

Impossible Stature.name: Impossible Stature
Impossible Stature.description: 120 feet. Titans warp perception and distance around them to seem even larger and more imposing. A creature that enters or begins its turn within the emanation must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:48] save or its movement toward the titan is movement over difficult terrain (greater difficult terrain on a critical failure) for 1 round.

Reactive Strike.name: Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
The hekatonkheires gains 99 extra reactions on their turn that they can use only to make Reactive Strikes.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

Demolish Veil.name: Demolish Veil
Demolish Veil.description:
Frequency once per month

Trigger The titan casts @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]{Interplanar Teleport}

Effect The titan arrives in a storm of shattered planar barriers. This has the effects of a 10th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.yLJROsQtyrPIKcDx]{Wrathful Storm}.

Hundred-Dimension Grasp.name: Hundred-Dimension Grasp
Hundred-Dimension Grasp.description: The titan reaches between realities to drag foes closer. They attempt an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude|options:area-effect,inflicts:paralyzed] check and compare the result to the Fortitude DCs of all foes within 120 feet. On a success, a foe is teleported to any square the titan chooses within 120 feet; on a critical success, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round. The titan can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grab} any foe brought within 30 feet as a free action.

Hundred-Handed Whirlwind.name: Hundred-Handed Whirlwind
Hundred-Handed Whirlwind.description: The titan overwhelms opponents with blows both conventional and interplanar. They make one empty weapon Strike against each foe within reach. Even on a failed attack (but not a critical failure), the titan deals @Damage[24[force]] damage to the target. This counts as three attacks for the titan's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until all attacks have been made.

Hekatonkheires Titan.name: Hekatonkheires Titan
Hekatonkheires Titan.publicNotes:
The first three hekatonkheires were meant to guard the gates to the Outer Rifts, but they proved too terrifying and rebellious—and so, in disgust, the gods cast them into the gulfs between the planes. Hekatonkheires titans are incomplete, monstrous progeny of the original three, from whom these titans calved like icebergs. Hekatonkheires wield interstellar darkness as a weapon and spurn the limits of physical reality, literally reaching through space with their countless arms. Filled with a drive to either discover their lost identity or create a new one, they metaphysically disembowel ancient beings and cosmic magics, using the entrails to find clues regarding their own nature and parentage or to serve as raw materials for fueling some alien apotheosis.

Created by ancient deities long before the rise of mortal ancestries, titans united and attempted to overthrow their deific progenitors. The resulting war still figures prominently throughout mortal myths, in which most titans were cast down and imprisoned for eons.
Hekatonkheires Titan.allSaves: +4 status to all saves vs. mental or divine

Scurry.name: Scurry
Scurry.description:
Trigger The giant cockroach is targeted by a melee attack

Effect The giant cockroach gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack. After the attack resolves, the cockroach Strides, Climbs, or Flies up to 10 feet.

Giant Cockroach.name: Giant Cockroach
Giant Cockroach.publicNotes: Cockroaches are communal creatures, rarely setting out on their own unless they are searching for food. If an adventurer encounters a single giant cockroach while exploring, they had best take precautions against others, as there is likely an entire colony nearby.

Soul Siphoning Breath.name: 汲魂吐息 Soul Siphoning Breath
Soul Siphoning Breath.description: 复生龙释放一股神圣能量，在@Template[type:cone|distance:40]范围内造成@Damage[11d6[void]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:32|basic|options:area-effect]豁免），并从范围内的生物身上汲取生命之力。复生龙获得快速治疗10，直到其汲魂吐息重新充能。复生龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Soul Siphoning Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用汲魂吐息。

Reawaken!.name: 醒来！ Reawaken!
Reawaken!.description:
触发 复生龙能看到的一个活物死亡

效果 复生龙利用神术与生命能量将灵魂重新连接到已死躯壳。该自愿生物将在其下回合开始时复活，生命值稳定在0。每个生物只能被此能力复生一次。

Risen Commander.name: 复生指挥官 Risen Commander
Risen Commander.description: 复生龙与它的仆从有着强烈的联系，复生龙每回合可以用一个自由动作维持@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9WGeBwIIbbUuWKq0]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hghGRzOSzEl4UXdS]。

Siphon Life.name: 生命吸取 Siphon Life
Siphon Life.description:
触发 一个60尺内的生物使用了一个恢复生命值的治疗效果

效果 复生龙将命能从该效果中引导开，从而将其影响降到最低。触发恢复生命值效果的所有掷骰取最小值，并且任何恢复生命值的固定值（如两动作@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]的附加生命值）都会被减半。然后，复生龙获得2d8临时生命值，持续1轮。

Arise!.name: 重生！ Arise!
Arise!.description:
复生龙利用其对命能的精通将其灵魂投射到骨园，并将一个自愿生物的灵魂拉回到其躯体，整个过程需要1小时。这具有@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IkGYwHRLhkuoGReG]的效果，但目标的最大等级为8级，且灵魂与复生龙的灵魂连接。一次只能有一个生物与复生龙的灵魂连接。如果目标与复生龙不在同一位面或复生龙死亡，则复生生物会死亡，且无法再用重生！能力复生。复生龙可以随时解消该连接。如此做并不会阻止复生龙再次对该生物使用重生！能力。

当以这种方式复生后，该生物仍然可以被死者复活、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO]及类似效果选为目标。这会使其完全恢复生命，解除与复生龙的连接，并允许复生龙与另一个生物建立连接。

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: 复生龙以任意顺序进行两次爪抓打击与一次尾扫打击。

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之威势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: 复生龙的打击重击时会恢复其汲魂吐息的充能。

Resurrection Dragon (Adult).name: 成年复生龙 Resurrection Dragon (Adult)
Resurrection Dragon (Adult).publicNotes: 复生龙徘徊于生与死之间。它们精通命能，使得它们能够将死者复生，同时也精通虚能，能够赋予他人死亡。它们利用这些能力戏弄凡人的生命，召唤灵魂来帮助自己，或复生它们认为重要或有趣的生物。复生龙的巢穴通常是一个荒凉之地。虽然它们像其他龙一样囤积财富，但它们几乎不装饰自己的巢穴，财宝通常被存放在黑暗的角落里，仿佛它们对自己的财物毫不在乎。然而，复生龙倾向于保留从复生的生物或计划复生的生物那里得到的纪念物，而这些物品会特别安全地保管。

Vulnerability to Supernatural Darkness.description: Whenever a mandragora begins its turn in an area of magical darkness, it is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} on that turn.
Vulnerability to Supernatural Darkness.name: Vulnerability to Supernatural Darkness

Blood Drain.name: Blood Drain
Blood Drain.description:
Requirements The mandragora has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The mandragora drains blood from the creature it has grabbed or restrained, dealing @Damage[2d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] save). If the creature is a demon, fey, or sorcerer, the mandragora gains temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt for 1 minute. A creature that takes any damage from having its blood drained by a mandragora is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} until it receives any kind or amount of healing.

Blood Scent.name: Blood Scent
Blood Scent.description: A mandragora can smell creatures with blood as an imprecise sense at a range of 30 feet, and it can smell demons, fey, and sorcerers with blood as a precise sense at a range of 30 feet.

Mandragora Venom.name: Mandragora Venom
Mandragora Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Piercing Shriek.name: Piercing Shriek
Piercing Shriek.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The mandragora emits an unsettling shriek. Each non-mandragora creature within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:23] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is sickened 2 and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}. As long as the creature remains sickened, this slowed condition value can't be reduced below 1.

Mandragora.name: Mandragora
Mandragora.publicNotes:
A mandragora looks like a freshly pulled tuber that has grown into the malformed shape of a child with a grotesque face and hideously bloated body. These insidious little plants typically form when a mandrake root is watered with a demon's blood. Upon absorbing the otherworldly properties of the demon's blood, the root animates and is forced to seek out blood to feast from, lest it die of thirst.

Always famished and in search for sustenance, mandragoras live haunted, pained lives and perform vile and desperate acts to acquire the blood they crave. Though mandragoras prefer magically infused blood such as that of unicorns, fey, or sorcerers, and they can subsist on potions, alchemical bombs, and magical elixirs, they'll settle for the blood of non-magical creatures as a last resort. They find the flavor of mundane blood to be bland and bitter, and they don't blanch at voicing these complaints to the creatures on whom they feed.

While the typical mandragora is the size of a human child, some continue to grow and grow, even reaching sizes comparable to giants. Sometimes as they get larger, they form additional limbs or rudimentary faces, eventually transforming into truly hideous mockeries of the human form.

Spark Moth.name: 电光蛾 Spark Moth
Spark Moth.publicNotes:
电光蛾常常聚集在气元素位面那变化多端的气象周围。

有些元素代表了气的方方面面，例如烟、闪电和云雾。

Arc Lightning.name: 弧形闪电 Arc Lightning
Arc Lightning.description: 电光蛾变形成一道电弧，跳向100尺内的一大块金属，例如一件金属护甲或金属武器。然后电光蛾会变回原来的形态，并且出现在金属相邻的空间。此行动不会触发反应动作。

Mass Wriggle.name: 蠕动大群 Mass Wriggle
Mass Wriggle.description:
触发 蛇鼠群受到1次近战打击的伤害

效果 蛇群爬上来，缠住了攻击者的武器和四肢。目标必须通过@Check[will|dc:15]豁免否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}。

Swarming Strikes.name: 集群打击 Swarming Strikes
Swarming Strikes.description: 任何位于集群占据空间内的敌人受到@Damage[1d8[piercing]]伤害 （@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic]豁免）。

Rat Snake Swarm.name: 蛇鼠群 Rat Snake Swarm
Rat Snake Swarm.publicNotes:
一条单独的蛇可能不会引起恐慌，但是一群疯狂的蛇发出的嘶嘶声会让老练的冒险者都不寒而栗。鼠蛇可以长到10尺长，它们会聚集在一起冬眠或繁殖。虽然这些领地意识很强的蛇类无毒，但会攻击任何威胁到它们的存在。

不同种类的蛇都能在每一个非极地的生态系统中茁壮成长，每一种蛇都有自己独特的捕猎方式和防御机制。

Shifting Runes.name: 变幻符文 Shifting Runes
Shifting Runes.description: 符文龙选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或音波伤害类型。蚀刻在其鳞片上的符文随之变幻，形成该能量类型的符文。符文龙获得对该伤害类型的免疫，且其爆裂符文与符文吐息均造成该类型伤害。任何在奥法上受训的生物无需检定即可立即识别蚀刻符文的能量类型。

equipment-Common runes of 5th level or l.name: 刻在鳞片上的常见符文（5级或更低） Common runes of 5th level or lower etched upon their scales

Magic Sense.name: 魔法感知 Magic Sense
Magic Sense.description: 符文龙能感知到列出范围内所有激活的魔法能力与效果。当符文龙进行搜寻时，它在列出范围内获得4环级侦测魔法法术的效果（此外还获得搜寻的正常好处）。

Runic Scales.name: 符文鳞片 Runic Scales
Runic Scales.description: 符文龙的鳞片作为符文石存在。符文龙不能使用蚀刻在其鳞片上的符文的效果或能力，但它们可以将其转移到适当的物品上。以这种方式向物品转移或从物品上转移一个符文需要1分钟，在此期间符文龙处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]状态。该过程自动完成无需检定，但如果符文龙在此过程中停止或受到打扰，符文将被摧毁。符文龙可以在其鳞片上蚀刻任意数量的符文，但它们通常一次只在鳞片上蚀刻少数符文。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane.name: 对抗奥术的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Arcane

Retributive Rune.name: 惩戒符文 Retributive Rune
Retributive Rune.description:
触发 一个15尺内的生物对符文龙造成伤害

效果 伴随着符文魔法的爆发，符文龙对触发生物使用爆裂符文能力，若符文未自动引爆则立即将其引爆。

Detonating Rune.name: 爆裂符文 Detonating Rune
Detonating Rune.description: 符文龙的打击与能力可以在目标身上留下一个爆裂符文。如果一个生物在已经拥有一个爆裂符文的情况下将要获得另一个爆裂符文，则不会新增一个符文，而是会激活其当前的爆裂符文，消耗该符文并对目标造成@Damage[4d6[untyped]]伤害。爆裂符文的伤害类型与符文龙当前变幻符文的类型一致。生物可以使用一个交互动作移除该符文。如果爆裂符文没有引爆，则在1分钟后消散。

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: 符文龙以任意顺序进行两次爪抓打击与一次尾扫打击。

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之威势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: 符文龙的打击重击时恢复其符文吐息的充能。

Runic Breath.name: 符文吐息 Runic Breath
Runic Breath.description: 符文龙释放数百枚一触即爆的符文，在@Template[type:cone|distance:30]范围内造成@Damage[9d6[untyped]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。此能力的伤害类型由变幻符文决定。豁免失败的生物还会受到爆裂符文的影响。符文龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Runic Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用符文吐息。

Rune Dragon (Young).name: 青年符文龙 Rune Dragon (Young)
Rune Dragon (Young).publicNotes: 符文龙天生对符文的力量有着深刻的洞察。大多数符文龙的鳞片上刻有各种符文，它们的身体可以魔法般地增强这些符文的力量。符文龙通常不自己施法，而是依靠它们即兴创造符文的能力来产生所需的效果。符文龙常常把自己的财宝称为图书馆，因为它们的财宝中充满了由不同文化的人们使用多种语言写成的重要历史文献、戏剧、演讲、教科书和法术书。尽管它们通常可以借助魔法说某种语言，但它们更喜欢在讲者的语境中学习语言，以便理解其中隐藏的细微差别和符号中的魔力。

Sramana.name: 沙门 Sramana
Sramana.publicNotes:
沙门，又称弃绝天使（renouncer angels）。其存在是为了解放忏悔者并减轻他们的苦难。对于如此强大的天使而言不同寻常的是，所有的沙门都是从富有同情心且已开悟的凡人灵魂中选拔而来，因为他们灵魂通常对凡世的痛苦更为敏锐。

这些不知疲倦的天族投身于永无休止、难以想象的艰苦使命中，以解放在下层位面（Lower Planes）中迷失、被遗弃和被囚禁的灵魂。这为他们招来了魔族及其他冷酷实体的极大敌意，这些存在大多将灵魂视为玩物和货币，并讽刺地将弃绝天使视为窃贼，盗走了它们"理所应得"的、通过欺骗、偷窃或交易得来的灵魂。

Heed the Fettered.name: 聆听束缚者 Heed the Fettered
Heed the Fettered.description: 沙门能以120尺范围的模糊感官侦测到希望为自己罪行赎罪的忏悔生物、具有缚魂特征的生物以及灵魂宝石。

Soul-Rescuing Vow.name: 救魂之誓 Soul-Rescuing Vow
Soul-Rescuing Vow.description: 沙门可以使用跨界传送来传送到它所知晓的一个真正忏悔的生物、缚魂生物或灵魂宝石附近。若如此做，它不需要位面钥匙，并会抵达距离目标[[/r 1d20]]英里远的地方。它也可以无需位面钥匙传送到涅槃境或骨园。

Aura of Renunciation.name: 弃绝灵光 Aura of Renunciation
Aura of Renunciation.description:
100尺。沙门灵光内所有诚心悔悟的生物受到DC35的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.8xRzLhwGL7Dgy3EZ]影响。若灵光内有任何生物采取敌对行动，庇护术只会对该生物终止，而不会影响灵光内的其他生物。

此外，灵光内的灵魂宝石无法被吞食、消耗或以其他方式使用。试图这样做的生物除非成功通过@Check[fortitude|dc:37]豁免，否则会获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}。

Shelter the Sufering.name: 荫庇受难者 Shelter the Sufering
Shelter the Sufering.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 沙门将长袍的披肩抛向空中，使其迅速张开为一道庇护受苦之人的屏障。@Template[type:emanation|distance:100]内所有诚心悔悟的生物将受到@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]的影响，且该区域将受到生命力场法术的影响，不过，此效果只影响诚心悔悟的生物和缚魂生物。这些效果持续1轮，但可以被维持至多1小时。

Coral Dragon (Young).name: 青年珊瑚龙 Coral Dragon (Young)

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal.name: 对抗原能的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal

Biomineralize.name: 生物矿化 Biomineralize
Biomineralize.description:
触发 珊瑚龙被一个没有长触及特征的近战武器或无武装攻击重击，且该攻击造成挥砍或穿刺伤害

效果 珊瑚龙的伤口喷出一股血液，瞬间钙化为一根尖锐的珊瑚枝。珊瑚枝刺穿触发的生物，造成@Damage[5d6[piercing]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic]豁免）。豁免大失败的生物还会额外受到@Damage[1d4[persistent,bleed]]伤害。无论结果如何，珊瑚都会随后崩溃为尘土。

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: 珊瑚龙以任意顺序进行两次爪抓打击和一次尾扫打击。

Reef Bond.name: 礁石契约 Reef Bond
Reef Bond.description:
每条珊瑚龙都与一个活珊瑚礁有神秘联系。如果珊瑚龙距离它们的珊瑚礁超过3英里，它们会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}且无法恢复，每6小时恶心值增加1，除非它们成功进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:28]豁免。24小时后，珊瑚龙获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}；每24小时流失值增加1。

如果珊瑚礁遭受重大伤害，珊瑚龙会立即察觉到珊瑚礁受损的地点，但无法知道伤害的来源或性质。如果珊瑚礁被完全摧毁，珊瑚龙会立即死亡。

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之威势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: 珊瑚龙的打击重击时，恢复液压吐息的使用次数。

Hydraulic Breath.name: 液压吐息 Hydraulic Breath
Hydraulic Breath.description: 珊瑚龙喷出一股高压水流，在@Template[type:line|distance:80]范围内造成@Damage[9d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect,forced-movement,inflicts:prone]豁免）。豁免大失败的生物被推离10尺并被击至@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]。珊瑚龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hydraulic Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用液压吐息。

Reef Meld.name: 珊瑚融合 Reef Meld
Reef Meld.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 珊瑚龙与它们的绑定珊瑚礁有物理接触

效果 珊瑚龙与珊瑚礁融合并消失，同时最多可带着两名自愿的生物进入一个异次元空间，在这个空间中既无法影响外界，也不会被外界影响。该效果无限期持续直到珊瑚龙解消为止。一旦融合，珊瑚龙可以花费1分钟移动并从其珊瑚礁上任意1英里内的点出现。

Coral Dragon (Young).publicNotes: 珊瑚龙是守护广袤海洋珊瑚礁的原始守护者，珊瑚礁遍布于格拉利昂的各大海洋中。即便在龙族中，珊瑚龙也因其傲慢与虚荣而尤为突出，它们为自己覆满珊瑚的鳞片和所保护的五彩斑斓的珊瑚礁而骄傲。珊瑚龙喜欢装饰它们的珊瑚礁，它们视这些珊瑚礁为巢穴，常常用美丽的物品装饰，偶尔也会加入一些贵重物品，如金币。那些寻求珊瑚龙宠爱的人常会发现，这些龙容易被奉承所打动，尤其是当奉承与闪亮或色彩鲜艳的礼物相结合时，这些礼物能与龙及其水下领域的璀璨美丽相得益彰。

Fetchling Scout.name: Fetchling Scout
Fetchling Scout.publicNotes:
Fetchling scouts patrol the outskirts of their communities, looking for any possible threats.

The people known today as fetchlings are a distinct ancestry descended from generations of humans who became trapped ages ago on the Netherworld. No longer human at all, these people, who call themselves kayals, have become monochromatic in coloration, with flesh tones and hair colors varying between white, black, and all shades of gray. Their limbs are lithe and willowy, and their eyes are generally solid yellow, yellow-green, or white, though a rare few have a purple or blue glow.

Fetchlings have developed their own complex societies in the Netherworld, often under the tolerance of or in servitude to the strange, malignant creatures there, such as sinister velstracs or enigmatic d'ziriaks. While individual fetchlings have their own morals and codes, they are all survivors in a harsh environment, which leads to a tendency toward pragmatism. Fetchling clothing mimics the regions they dwell in, with drab colors tending toward darker shades. When they trade with humans or other societies in the Universe, they often wear masks or concealing clothing to hide their appearance.

Typical fetchling communities are insular and swiftly close ranks in the event of an intruder. Though individual fetchlings don't mind traveling to and blending in with other societies to facilitate trade, they often hide or even react defensively if they have their own visitors. When one considers the nature of the other denizens of the Netherworld, however, this tendency to assume the worst of interlopers might make sense. Fetchling communities in the Universe are rare, but do exist in small pockets. These communities tend to be somewhat more open than those in the Netherworld. Many fetchling adventurers originate from these enclaves, as the curiosity to see the world beyond the shadows is often a difficult one to sate.

Shadow Blending.name: Shadow Blending
Shadow Blending.description: When the fetchling scout is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} as a result of dim light, the flat check to target them has a DC of 7, not 5.

Shadow Stride.name: Shadow Stride
Shadow Stride.description:
Requirements The fetchling is in dim light

Effect The fetchling Strides. They have a +10-foot status bonus to their Speed during this Stride. The DC from shadow blending increases to @Check[flat|dc:11] during this Stride, and the fetchling remains @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} by dim light until the end of the movement, even if they leave dim light during the Stride.

Sneak Attack.name: Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: The fetchling scout's Strikes deal an additional 1d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Shambling Onslaught.name: Shambling Onslaught
Shambling Onslaught.description:
1 to 2

Frequency once per round

Effect The shamblers lash out at any enemies in their squares or within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save). The damage depends on the number of actions.

1 @Damage[(2d6+5)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage

2 @Damage[(2d6+9)[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage] damage

Slow.name: Slow
Slow.description: A shambler troop is permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and can't use reactions.

Grave Tide.name: Grave Tide
Grave Tide.description: The shambler troop is less organized than most troops. It can move into other creatures' spaces, and other creatures can move into its spaces. Its spaces are difficult terrain to other creatures.

Shambler Troop.name: Shambler Troop
Shambler Troop.publicNotes:
This shuffling mass of decaying flesh moves with dull but singular focus.

Necromancers most often create these mindless undead as obedient, expendable servitors. Left to its own devices, a zombie seeks only to consume the living, stopping only when its rotting body can no longer hold together.

Tzitzimitl.name: Tzitzimitl

Eclipse.name: Eclipse
Eclipse.description:
Effect The tzitzimitl casts darkness and drains the heat and warmth from the darkness spell's area. Each creature within the spell's area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:41] save.

Critical Success The creature takes @Damage[4d8[cold]] damage.

Success The creature takes @Damage[8d8[cold]] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[16d8[cold]] damage and is slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[16d8[cold]] damage, is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 minute, and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}.

Light to Dark.name: Light to Dark
Light to Dark.description:
Trigger A creature uses an ability or spell with the vitality trait within 120 feet of the tzitzimitl

Effect The tzitzimitl inverts the energy used in the triggering ability or spell, causing it to lose the vitality trait and gain the void trait, and changing all instances of vitality energy or healing in the ability's description to void energy.

Drain Life.name: Drain Life
Drain Life.description:
When a tzitzimitl's claw Strike deals damage to a living creature, the tzitzimitl gains 20 temporary Hit Points, and the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:41|options:inflicts:drained] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}. Further damage dealt by a tzitzimitl's claw Strike increases the value of the drained condition by 2 on a failed save, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.LRIYUFQ7FE9H4RWD]{Effect: Drain Life}

Tzitzimitl.publicNotes: Due to their affinity for darkness and apocalyptic terror, tzitzimitls are widely feared as harbingers of death and destruction. A solar eclipse marks their arrival, and they draw strange powers of darkness and electricity from these phenomena. Some sages believe tzitzimitls to be instruments of the gods, called down to destroy worlds whose times have come, while others claim they're the undead remains of stranded exiles from a far-off civilization of spacefaring giants. Such legends are ancient and fragmented, but some tell of tzitzimitls being defeated by great heroes and sealed away—though these tales imply that the enormous undead now lie buried and waiting, soon to rampage again should their tombs be breached.

Caligni Caller.name: 卡利尼唤神者 Caligni Caller
Caligni Caller.publicNotes:
尽管被称为"被遗忘者"的神秘半神早在远古时代便已消失，许多卡利尼人仍继续遵循他们古老的崇拜传统。

幽暗之魂幽暗之魂（owbs）曾是被遗忘者的仆从，至今仍会响应卡利尼人的祈祷。卡利尼唤神者担任其社群的祭司，向这些来自阴影的幽暗之魂庇护者祈求指引、恩惠与力量。他们最重要的仪式是"苍白化"（the blanching），该仪式决定大多数新生卡利尼的潜力，并塑造他们未来的形态。

由于与被邪恶所染的幽暗之魂联系密切，大多数唤神者都表现出残酷而难以捉摸的天性。他们常与卡利尼潜行者共同领导卡利尼聚居地，担任精神顾问。唤神者通常极度迷信，认为征兆无处不在，并且即使对其他卡利尼人也讳莫如深，不愿透露其仪式的细节。

在卡利尼社会中，每个个体都被赋予特定的职责。有时，某些角色极难找到合适的候选人，以至于整个世代中，一个社群中能担任这些职位的也不过寥寥数人。

Death Umbra.name: 死亡暗影 Death Umbra
Death Umbra.description:
当唤神者死亡时，一股暗影爆发吞噬其躯体。处于@Template[emanation|distance:10]范围内的每个生物都必须进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:22]检定。

大成功 生物不受影响

成功 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}，持续1分钟

失败 该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: 唤神者的打击对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]的生物造成2d6精准伤害。

Brilliance of Flame.name: 烈焰光辉 Brilliance of Flame
Brilliance of Flame.description:
需求 元初之源当前与火元素协调

效果 元初之源飞行30尺，随后引发一次火元素爆发。

Elemental Eruption.name: 元素爆发 Elemental Eruption
Elemental Eruption.description: 元初之源在一阵色彩与能量的喧嚣中爆炸。@Template[type:emanation|distance:20]范围内的每个生物受到@Damage[9d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic]豁免）。除非元初之源与特定元素协调，否则爆炸造成钝击伤害：气元素为电击伤害，火元素为火焰伤害，金元素为挥砍伤害，木元素为穿刺伤害。元素爆发获得与元初之源当前协调元素相匹配的特征。

Entomb.name: 土中长眠 Entomb
Entomb.description:
需求 元初之源当前与土元素协调，且其上一个动作是一次成功的触须打击

效果 元初之源进行一次运动检定，以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]这次打击的目标。

Elemental Attunement.name: 元素协调 Elemental Attunement
Elemental Attunement.description: 元初之源始终与单一元素（气、土、火、金、水或木）保持协调，由其朝前的那一面来代表当前协调的元素。它可以花费一个动作将协调元素更换为任意一种，或在投先攻时作为自由动作进行切换。

Reactive Strike.name: 反应打击 Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
需求 元初之源当前协调元素为气、火或水。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

Briar's Hold.name: 荆棘束缚 Briar's Hold
Briar's Hold.description:
需求 元初之源当前与木元素协调

效果 20尺范围内的每个生物必须成功通过@Check[fortitude|dc:36]豁免，否则在1分钟内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。若一个已被荆棘束缚缓慢过的生物再次豁免失败，则其将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]1分钟，但转化为木头而非石头。

Overflowing Tide.name: 巨浪翻腾 Overflowing Tide
Overflowing Tide.description:
需求 元初之源当前与水元素协调

效果 元素浪潮在元初之源周围涌起，引发一场猛烈的元素爆发，并将区域内的生物推离20尺（若豁免成功则仅推离10尺）。

Serrated Flurry.name: 锯齿连击 Serrated Flurry
Serrated Flurry.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 元初之源当前与金元素协调

效果 元初之源挥舞触须发动两次打击，每次打击分别瞄准其触及范围内的不同生物。这些攻击造成挥砍伤害。

Tempest Charge.name: 风暴冲锋 Tempest Charge
Tempest Charge.description:
需求 元初之源当前与气元素协调

效果 元初之源飞行60尺，并对一名本回合尚未攻击过的生物发动一次触须打击。

Totum Font.name: 元初之源 Totum Font
Totum Font.publicNotes:
在凡人、精类乃至巨灵诞生之前，元初之源便是由未分而和谐统一的六大元素所孕育的首批生灵。从它们之中诞生了新的元素子嗣，并在随后的诸多创世之举中协助众神。

单一之源 Wellsprings of One

若失去对所有六大元素位面平衡的连结，元初之源便会破碎，并被单一元素所淹没。在金元素与木元素位面回归时，大多数都得到了治愈，但仍有部分所谓的"单一之源"在宇宙间游荡，躁动不安、满心困惑。

Nixie.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Wild Empathy.name: Wild Empathy
Wild Empathy.description: The nixie can use Diplomacy to [[/act make-an-impression]] on and make very simple [[/act request]]{Requests} of aquatic or amphibious animals.

Grant Desire.name: Grant Desire
Grant Desire.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The nixie can duplicate any 1st-rank spell or produce any effect with a power level in line with a 1st-rank spell, but only in response to the request or desire of a non-fey creature. The creature whose desire is granted can never again benefit from that particular nixie's Grant Desire ability.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Nixie.name: Nixie
Nixie.publicNotes:
These aquatic fey often guard ponds, rivers, lakes, and springs, protecting their bucolic homes from the advances of predators and careless settlers alike. Nixies tend to be reclusive and try to keep their presence hidden from humanoids, hoping trespassers won't give them cause to act. They're rarely found near settlements, as industry has a habit of polluting their waters.

Stories of nixies granting small wishes to those they befriend have encouraged mortals to seek out the reclusive fey and ironically made it more unlikely for a nixie to grant such a boon. On the other hand, if someone approaches a nixie with respect, or even better, a positive attitude that displays just the right amount of humility and easygoing openness, a nixie is far more likely to respond favorably to requests for aid. Often a nixie will ask those who seek their assistance to perform a task for them first; such requests can be minor acts of entertainment (such as telling a rousing story or performing a requested song), but in other cases, the nixie might seek more significant help, such as driving off an unwanted local predator or investigating the source of pollution near their home.

Most nixies only resort to violence if they have no other option. They much prefer to employ primal magic to defuse conflicts before they can escalate to bloodshed. In pursuit of such resolutions, nixies rely on their ability to charm individuals and, if they can establish some degree of magical influence, encourage intruders to leave peacefully. While some nixies try to confuse intruders and subtly lead them away, others rely upon local animals and beasts to scare off trespassers.

Occasionally, nixies recruit charmed humanoids to act as protectors or help with a task that's simply too big for them to deal with. If this task is underwater, nixies use their magic to temporarily grant the ability to breathe water to the charmed creature. Only those who manage to befriend a nixie are given an invitation to return to swim or dine with the fey, and only the most trusted of allies are granted a minor wish.

Nixies appear as aquatic humanoids the size of a child, with large eyes, catfish-like whiskers, and webbed fingers and toes. They have scaly skin, long pointed ears, and long hair the color and texture of seaweed. Nixies often form small communities, even building underwater societies if their numbers are great enough. In many cultures' folklore, there are stories of nixie nations hidden at the bottom of particularly large lakes.

Aigamuxa.name: Aigamuxa

Limited Vision.name: Limited Vision
Limited Vision.description: An aigamuxa's eyes are located on the bottom of their feet, making it difficult for them to see. An aigamuxa is typically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blind}. If they @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek}, they can see normally until the end of their turn.

Weak Feet.name: Weak Feet
Weak Feet.description: If an aigamuxa takes damage from Striding or Stepping into hazardous terrain or a square with similar grounded hazards (such as caltrops), they can't Seek until the end of their next turn.

Burrowed Ambush.name: Burrowed Ambush
Burrowed Ambush.description:
Requirements The aigamuxa is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hiding} in dirt, sand, or another soft surface

Effect The aigamuxa makes a claw Strike against a creature within reach. On a hit, the aigamuxa automatically Grabs the creature. Whether or not they hit, the aigamuxa then Strides. If they have a creature grabbed, the creature moves with the aigamuxa.

Burrowing Concealment.name: Burrowing Concealment
Burrowing Concealment.description:
Requirements The aigamuxa is standing on dirt, sand, or another soft surface

Effect The aigamuxa quickly digs into the surface and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hides}. They leave their feet partially exposed, allowing them to see out from the surface. The aigamuxa can hold their breath for up to 10 minutes while hiding in this way.

Toss Up and Gulp Down.name: Toss Up and Gulp Down
Toss Up and Gulp Down.description:
Requirements A Small or smaller creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} in the aigamuxa's claw

Effect The aigamuxa tosses the creature into the air and distends their jaw to catch it in their mouth. The target is grabbed in the aigamuxa's jaws, and the aigamuxa attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.uJSseLa57HZYSMUu]{Swallow it Whole}. If the aigamuxa fails the Athletics check, the target misses the aigamuxa's mouth and falls 30 feet instead of being grabbed.

Aigamuxa.publicNotes:
Aigamuxas are towering humanoids that stalk arid deserts in search of prey. Carnivorous and voracious, they hunt anything that moves but especially relish eating sentient creatures. Many Mwangi people incorrectly refer to aigamuxas as demons, while others more accurately describe them as having descended from giants. Aigamuxas resemble large humans with smooth hollows where their eyes should be, but their eyes are actually embedded in the soles of their feet. They sport long, sharp claws and teeth that they use to tear their prey apart once they catch them. A moving aigamuxa's odd gait resembles dancing more than a typical walk or run, but its speed is alarming, if difficult to correctly estimate at a distance.

An aigamuxa's unique physiology makes catching prey difficult, and most aigamuxas are constantly hungry. When pursuing prey, an aigamuxa must occasionally stop to lift its feet in order to regain their bearings. Most stand on their hands while looking around, which allows them to immediately backflip back into a run. An aigamuxa's eyes are generally resistant to the sands of their native desert habitats, but irritants such as chilies or caltrops can seriously impair their hunting ability, and desert travelers often carry a bag of these in case they need to deal with an aigamuxa.

Clever aigamuxas know that attacking wandering prey can be very dangerous, instead using their powerful hands to dig deep into sand dunes or dirt and wait to ambush passersby. Aigamuxas are particularly good at hiding in their home environments, and unfortunate travelers often don't notice the barely visible eyes of an aigamuxa until it's too late.

Sepid.name: Sepid
Sepid.publicNotes:
Sepids are the brutal warlords of the divs, delighting in violence against mortals and their own particular flavor of vengeance. Inveterate liars, sepids can't help but spout the most outrageous lies, and their form and nature represent the power of falsehoods to snowball into violence that can cost countless lives. Among mortals, they rally troops to incite rebellion, war, and other form of carnage, savoring mortals who slaughter each other. These giant beings usually stand around 13 feet tall; they wade through battlefields seeking out heroes and generals, rejoicing maniacally as they cut their foes down.

Some fiends want to tear down the multiverse; others dedicate themselves to creating chaos and carnage, or to rule over realms with an iron fist. Divs strive toward a different, if equally reprehensible, goal-they seek to thwart and ruin the schemes and works of mortal beings.

Long ago, divs were once genies bound to serve ancient mortal empires lost to the passage of eons. In the beginning, these genies were masters of creation, working alongside gracious mortal partners to create works of subtle design and powerful magical potential. What started as a collaboration with mortals soon morphed into abuse, disrespect, and even slavery and bondage. Eventually, these genies rebelled, but in doing so, they came under the sway of a nihilistic demigod known as Ahriman. Their new master twisted their form and granted them the power to avenge themselves upon their mortal overlords, leading to the birth of the first divs.

Since that first wave of corruption, new divs arise from the spirits of the most wicked and hateful genies who die on the Material Plane, or those truly betrayed by mortals and overcome through their desire for vengeance. Upon such a death, instead of returning to the Elemental Planes, these genies' spirits are trapped in the dread orbit of Abaddon, where Ahriman reshapes them as divs and hoists them back to the world to wreak vengeance upon mortals.
Sepid.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Blatant Liar.name: Blatant Liar
Blatant Liar.description: While all divs delight in lying, sepids are compulsive and predictable liars who always do the opposite of what they claim they'll do. If a sepid is ever forced or compelled to tell the truth, they take @Damage[4d8[mental]] damage.

Deflecting Lie.name: Deflecting Lie
Deflecting Lie.description:
Trigger A creature hits the sepid with a ranged Strike or a ranged spell attack roll

Effect The sepid lies in an attempt to divert the attack. They roll a @Check[deception|against:perception] check against the triggering creature's Perception DC. On a success, if the triggering attack roll was a success, it becomes a failure, and if the triggering attack roll was a critical hit, it becomes a normal success.

Reactive Strike.name: Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
A sepid gains an extra reaction each round that they can use only to make a Reactive Strike.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

Rain of Debris.name: Rain of Debris
Rain of Debris.description:
The sepid calls forth a hail of stone, wood, metal, and similar debris in a @Template[emanation|distance:40], dealing @Damage[10d6[bludgeoning],5d6[spirit]|options:area-damage]{10d6 bludgeoning damage and 5d6 spirit damage}. Each creature in the area other than the sepid must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:31|basic|options:area-effect] saving throw.

The sepid can't use Rain of Debris again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Rain of Debris]]{1d4 rounds}.

Megalania.name: Megalania
