They have been known to occasionally ally with giants, but these truces tend to be nebulous.

Regurgitate Gastrolith.name: Regurgitate Gastrolith
Regurgitate Gastrolith.description: The irlgaunt violently regurgitates a melon-sized clot of brittle stone supernaturally infused with digestive enzymes. The stone and acid explode on impact within a range of 30 feet, dealing @Damage[7d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage and @Damage[7d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic] save). The irlgaunt can't Regurgitate Gastroliths for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Stone Step.name: Stone Step
Stone Step.description: The irlgaunt ignores difficult terrain composed of rocks and stone.

Tupilaq.name: 图皮拉克 Tupilaq
Tupilaq.publicNotes:
图皮拉克是一种用动物骨骼（通常是鲸骨或海象骨）精心雕刻而成的构装体，其存在的唯一目的就是肢解其创造者的仇敌。它由仇恨的魔法驱动——只有那些坚信自己遭受了严重冤屈的人，才可能创造出这样的东西。当一位技艺精湛、通晓正确仪式的雕刻师遭遇了可怕且不可饶恕的罪行时，这位受创者可以将自己的悲痛与憎恨倾注于低语的咒语中，从而唤醒一只图皮拉克。

不幸的是，用来创造图皮拉克的同样情绪，往往会引发更大的悲剧。虽然从机能上来说图皮拉克近乎不朽，但它只为复仇而生——它缺乏理性与判断力，除了执行创造者赋予的目标外，不会去做任何其他事。若创造者的愿望是彻底毁灭敌人，图皮拉克可能会屠戮整个聚落，直到将所有与原始罪犯哪怕只有一丝关联的人都杀死为止。许多故事都描述了图皮拉克最终为其创造者带来的悲剧，甚至超过了当初催生它的那场罪行。最常见的传说，是图皮拉克最终因某个远亲关系（而无人知晓）而杀害了创造者的配偶或家人。

图皮拉克的驱动能量并不受其初始功能限制，它通常能比创造者、受害者乃至所有记得其起源的人活得更久。在完成眼前复仇后，它可能会陷入某种休眠状态，但在很多情况下，这些构装体会重新苏醒，继续对毫不知情的无辜者展开杀戮。

施法者偶尔也会召唤这些构装体。被强行从复仇使命中拖出来的图皮拉克，会变成近乎疯狂的战士，倾泻其全部攻击能力以挣脱束缚。这些反应并非出于策略或思考，而是一种本能的、几乎被编程的需要——回归其真正的目标。召唤师应当警惕图皮拉克使用那些可能反过来伤害自己的法术，例如一枚"意外"放置的火球术，将施法者烧成灰烬，并将构装体送回它来的地方。

Construct Armor (Hardness 8).name: 构装护甲（硬度8） Construct Armor (Hardness 8)
Construct Armor (Hardness 8).description:
与普通的物体一样，图皮拉克同样拥有硬度。硬度可以减少其所受到的任何伤害，其数值等同于硬度的数值。

一旦图皮拉克的生命值降低至一半以下，或是受到重击伤害后，其构装护甲将会破损，移除其硬度并将其AC降低至22。

Carver's Curse.name: 雕刻师的诅咒 Carver's Curse
Carver's Curse.description: 当图皮拉克被创造时，其创造者所施加的诅咒会显现为一种单一的3环级原能法术，该图皮拉克每天可施展此术三次。具体法术取决于创造者复仇愿望的性质。对于被发现或被召唤的图皮拉克，默认情况下此法术为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sxQZ6yqTn0czJxVd]。

Animated Colossus.name: Animated Colossus
Animated Colossus.publicNotes:
Animating a 100-foot-tall statue is worth the cost for spellcasters guarding immense dungeons.

Many animated objects have useful functions but become dangers when uncontrolled.

Construct Armor (Hardness 15).name: Construct Armor (Hardness 15)
Construct Armor (Hardness 15).description: Like normal objects, an animated colossus has Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage the colossus takes by an amount equal to the Hardness. Once an animated colossus is reduced to fewer than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, its construct armor breaks, removing the Hardness and reducing its Armor Class to 35.

Enormous.name: Enormous
Enormous.description: An animated colossus takes up a space of 6 squares by 6 squares (30 feet by 30 feet) and is 100 feet tall.

Colossus's Grasp.name: Colossus's Grasp
Colossus's Grasp.description:
The colossus can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.Tkd8sH4pwFIPzqTr]{Grab} a creature using only one hand.

It can move normally with a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} in its fist, carrying the creature along. If it has two creatures grabbed in this way, it can't use its fist Strike.

Hārakasura.name: 二性修罗 Hārakasura
Hārakasura.publicNotes: 二性修罗以两个相互交织、动作完全一致的形象出现。实际上，它们是一个拥有分裂的心灵和意志的单一存在，在行善与违背神意的毁灭之间摇摆不定。二性修罗首先是仁慈和良善的存在，然而它们每做一件善事，都凸显了世界的矛盾本质——因为如果人人都能得到所需，行善也就无从谈起。因此，二性修罗自称为盗贼和掠夺者，从世界的这一角窃取，给予另一角，它们在帮助人们的忠诚和对人们在没有帮助下无法生存的可怕现实的绝望之间挣扎。

Dual Mind.name: 二性相生 Dual Mind
Dual Mind.description:
触发 二性修罗在对抗心灵效果的豁免中失败

效果 二性修罗将效果转移到其中一个心灵，使其暂时失去知觉。他们将检定结果改为成功，但其中一个身体会无力地垂落，直到其下一个回合结束。在此期间，二性修罗获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 2}；速度承受-10尺环境减值；并且无法使用"二性相生"、"毁灭之舞"或"反应打击"。

Reactive Strike.name: 反应打击 Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
触发 你触及范围内的一个生物使用操作或移动动作，进行远程攻击，或者使用移动动作时离开一个方格。

你攻击露出破绽的敌人。对触发此动作的目标进行一次近战打击。如果该攻击为重击，并且触发此动作的是一个操作动作，则打断此动作。这次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，你的多重攻击减值也不应用于此次打击。

Dance of Destruction.name: 毁灭之舞 Dance of Destruction
Dance of Destruction.description:
需求 二性修罗的上一个动作是打击并造成伤害

效果 二性修罗行走至多10尺并进行一次打击。

Glorious Visage.name: 光明相 Glorious Visage
Glorious Visage.description: 阿修罗使自己圣化为圣洁或邪秽，获得相应特征并失去相反特征；其打击、法术和能力也获得相应特征。阿修罗还获得对相反特征的5点弱点，并失去对其所选法相的任何弱点。此选择永久有效，除非阿修罗再次使用此能力改变其法相状态。

Wound Thief.name: 窃伤 Wound Thief
Wound Thief.description: 二性修罗触碰一个相邻且正在承受持续流血伤害的生物。如果二性修罗具有圣洁特征，它会立即终止持续流血效果，并恢复目标2d6点HP；这是一个治疗和命能效果。如果二性修罗具有邪秽特征，能使目标立即受到相当于其持续流血值的伤害，而二性修罗获得等于所造成的伤害值的临时HP，直至其下一个回合开始。

Imentesh.name: 埃门特西 Imentesh
Imentesh.publicNotes:
这些健谈的幻蛇被人称为埃门特西，他们为了推进幻蛇的终极大业——现实的崩解——而但当传教士、间谍和混沌的先驱。

幻蛇是混沌以肉身构筑的表现形式，这些大漩涡的居民以蛇形的姿态表现着熵的原始力量。他们遵循的制度松散混乱、变化多端，但共享着可扩展又易消逝的理念。
Imentesh.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Entropy Sense.name: 熵力感知 Entropy Sense
Entropy Sense.description: 幻蛇能通过对混乱的概率与机运的超自然洞察力来预测到生物最可能存在的位置。这会赋予它在所列范围内感知生物的能力。@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.EoKBlgf6Smt8opaU]可阻止生物被熵力感知自动侦测到（若未通过反制检定）。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Protean Anatomy 15.name: 幻蛇体质15 Protean Anatomy 15
Protean Anatomy 15.description:
幻蛇的要害器官会不断地变形和改变位置。当幻蛇承受酸蚀、电击或音波伤害后，它会立即获得抗力数据中所列数值的对应伤害抗力。这会持续1小时或直至幻蛇承受上述伤害类型中的其他种类为止（在这种情况下，幻蛇的抗力会再度变换并与该类型相匹配），以较先发生者为准。

除非幻蛇自身自愿，否则它对变形效果免疫。若陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]，幻蛇会在它的下个回合结束时自动恢复，因为新的感受器官已经形成并取代了受损的器官。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.c6SiBB3mzV8lZUQr]

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
埃门特西呈现出任意大型或更小生物的外观。这不会改变他的速度或其打击的攻击与伤害加值，但这有可能改变他的打击所造成的伤害类型。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Inflict Warpwave.name: 发射扭曲波 Inflict Warpwave
Inflict Warpwave.description: 埃门特西对100尺内的一个生物发射扭曲波，@Check[fortitude|dc:29]豁免。

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: 埃门特西的打击对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]的目标造成额外2d6点精准伤害。

Warpwave Strike.name: 扭曲波打击 Warpwave Strike
Warpwave Strike.description: 任何生物若遭到埃门特西的啃咬打击并受到伤害的话，必须成功通过@Check[fortitude|dc:29]豁免，失败则要承受扭曲波的效果。

Warpwaves.name: 扭曲波 Warpwaves
Warpwaves.description:
许多幻蛇都能使用混沌之力扭曲敌人心智中的现实，制造被称为扭曲波的心灵涟漪。

当有生物在豁免中失败并且受到扭曲波影响时，投掷[[/r 1d8]]并参考后述表格来查看该生物承受的特殊效果。

除非另有说明，否则扭曲波效果会持续[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}，新产生的扭曲波效果会使得对应生物之前遭受的扭曲波效果结束。

d8 扭曲波效果
1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 2}（大失败时@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 3}）
2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]且获得[[/r 4d6 #Temporary Hit Points]]{4d6临时生命值}
3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]（大失败时永久）
4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}（大失败时@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 3}）
5 被能量丝@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]
6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]（仅能用于行走，打击或快步）
7 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}
8 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}（大失败时@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 3}）

Vishkanya Infiltrator.name: 蝮血裔渗透者 Vishkanya Infiltrator
Vishkanya Infiltrator.publicNotes:
这些蝮血裔能够融入人群，悄然潜入原本禁止进入之处，也能在不引人注意的情况下离开。

从远处看去，蝮血裔和人类有许多相似之处。然而靠近观察就能够发现蝮血裔那宛如蛇类的双眼会呈现为金色或白色、舌尖分叉、皮肤上细小且光滑的鳞片排布成蜿蜒的图案。即便如此，大多数旁观者都会讲这些视为魔裔血脉或龙类魔法的特征，从不会认为他们所猜测的对象会是真正稀奇之物。

外界对蝮血裔血脉所知甚少，只知道蝮血裔的血液和唾液中含有强效毒素，这些知识引起了一知半解的恐惧和猜忌。为了避免被迫害，蝮血裔将扎根于自身选择的社会深处，训练诡秘技艺。这种隐秘的生活方式，会吸引蝮血裔投身于那些能让他们充分发挥自身技能的工作。蝮血裔通常会担任间谍、佣兵、保镖、甚至刺客。部分闻名于世的行会会雇佣蝮血裔，这包括无情的红螳螂刺客（Red Mantis Assassins）、以及那知名的为不可思议之国扎摩诔（Jalmeray）的侍臣服务的大萨雷特学会（Grand Sarret academy）。大多数情况下，这些雇主知道手下雇员的真实身份，但并非总是如此。

由于必须采取措施来确保自身种族的存续，蝮血裔不会进行公开集会。他们会进行秘密会面，建立支援网络和咨询机构。主持这些会面的是最具威望的蝮血裔女性，她们会为了维持血脉和传统的活力而努力工作。这些地下社区发展缓慢，离开这些社区意味着放弃蝮血裔仅有的那一点点社会和文化的支持。因此，仅有少数蝮血裔会离开她们的乌笃剌（Vudran）家园，移民到内海地区或者其他大陆。

+2 to Fortitude Saves vs. Poison.name: 对抗毒素的强韧豁免+2 +2 to Fortitude Saves vs. Poison

Envenom.name: 涂毒 Envenom
Envenom.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 蝮血裔使用血液或唾液来将蝮血毒应用至他正持用的1把武器上。要使用自身的血液，他必须已经受伤或者以该动作的一部分来对自身造成@Damage[1[slashing]]伤害。

Flexible.name: 柔韧 Flexible
Flexible.description: 蝮血裔渗透者擅长应对被拘束的情况。他们在@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]检定上获得+1环境加值。

Proficient Poisoner.name: 投毒专家 Proficient Poisoner
Proficient Poisoner.description: 蝮血裔渗透者不会由于打击大失败而失去武器上的毒素。

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: 蝮血裔渗透者的打击对@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]的生物造成1d6额外精准伤害。

Vishkanyan Venom.name: 蝮血毒 Vishkanyan Venom
Vishkanyan Venom.description:
豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段1 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害（1轮）

阶段2 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]（1轮）

阶段3 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害，措手不及且速度承受-5尺减值（1轮）

Trollhound.name: 巨魔犬 Trollhound
Trollhound.publicNotes:
巨魔犬淌着口水并且贪得无厌，它们看起来就像是变成小型犬类形态的巨魔。由于需要大量进食来维持它们提供再生能力的新陈代谢系统，成群的野生巨魔犬在它们所居住的山麓间徘徊，贪婪的饥饿感驱使它们捕食任何能遇到的猎物。在一些地区，巨魔们将巨魔犬当做宠物，利用它们敏锐的嗅觉来协助狩猎。

浑身散发着恶臭、遍布着流脓的脓包，巨魔犬是一种被称为燃血热疫的衰竭性传染病的携带者。被巨魔犬咬伤的生物会承受剧烈的体内疼痛，就好像受害者的血液在燃烧了一般。其他并发症包括失去肌肉协调性、充满浓汁的水泡、全面性的嗜睡和疲乏。除了会承受一些皮肤问题，巨魔和巨魔犬免疫燃血热疫。

巨魔犬在狩猎和战斗时无所畏惧，依靠它们的再生能力来坚持战斗。甚至火焰的威胁也不足以让他们退却，因为这些野兽根本就无法意识到火焰所意味着的危险。不过，火焰依然是对付巨魔犬最有效的工具之一；精明的猎人们知道要烧掉每一块可能是属于巨魔犬的残骸，因为它们的再生能力着实是过于可怕。

虽然巨魔们自己成功地驯化、训练了巨魔犬，甚至将其作为朋友对待，但对其他想要成为巨魔犬主人的人而言就不一样了。无论是因为会持续接触在巨魔犬带病的口水而受到阻碍（因为它们似乎永远都无法满足的饥饿），还是单纯因为它们恶劣的秉性和二话不说就咬人的性格，大多数想要以巨魔犬代替其他更为可靠的守护者的尝试都以痛苦、悲惨、外加一大群逃往内陆的巨魔犬而告终。

如果放任自流，一群巨魔犬会以相当快的速度繁殖，一小群巨魔犬在不到一年的时间里就会繁殖成对村庄拥有巨大威胁的群体。就如那些失败者所说，最好把巨魔犬留给巨魔！
Trollhound.hp: 再生15（电击或火焰使其无效）

Regeneration 15 (Deactivated by Electric.name: 再生15（电击或火焰使其无效） Regeneration 15 (Deactivated by Electricity or Fire)

Flailing Bite.name: 挣扎撕咬 Flailing Bite
Flailing Bite.description:
触发 巨魔犬受到电击或火焰伤害

效果 巨魔犬对触及范围内的一个随机生物发动一次颚打击。若巨魔犬正承受持续火焰伤害，它可尝试一次@Check[flat|dc:15]检定以移除该伤害。

Bloodfire Fever.name: 燃血热疫 Bloodfire Fever
Bloodfire Fever.description:
巨魔和巨魔犬免疫此疾病

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

阶段1 携带但无症状（1日）

阶段2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}（1日）

阶段3 力竭1且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}（1日）

阶段4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 2}（1日）

阶段5 力竭2，笨拙2且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]（1日）

Pack Attack.name: 一拥而上 Pack Attack
Pack Attack.description: 巨魔犬的打击对处于至少两名巨魔犬盟友触及内的生物造成额外1d6伤害。

Hodag.name: Hodag
Hodag.publicNotes:
Because they're often fantastically described in the wild tall tales of loggers or miners, hodags are considered by many to exist only in local folklore. However, some individuals have actually encountered these dangerous beasts firsthand, though even fewer have lived to tell the tale.

Hodags are reptilian creatures the size of bulls. Their vicious claws can tear creatures apart in seconds. Their backs sport dozens of long spines, running from their snouts all the way down the length of their powerful tails. Their wide mouths are full of sharp, twisted rows of teeth, not unlike those of a shark. The hodags' rough, scaly hides carry hues of green and brown, allowing them to blend into their forest surroundings where they ambush prey. Only their glowing red eyes reveal their presence, though hodags have learned to use this to their advantage by drawing attention to their eyes in one area, closing them, and stealthily moving to another area to discombobulate prey.

Because hodags are rarely seen, their biology is a matter of some mystery. While they may have evolved as natural beasts, rumors persist that they spring from curses or as punishment for mistreating livestock.

In the wintertime, when snow and ice blanket a region, hodags grow a foul-smelling coat of greasy, dark-brown fur that sprouts in tufts from between their scales. A typical hodag measures over 10 feet long from snout to tail and weighs upward of 700 pounds.

Trackless.name: Trackless
Trackless.description: A hodag sweeps the ground behind it with its tail as it moves, obscuring its tracks. The DCs of checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.EA5vuSgJfiHH7plD]{Track} a hodag are increased by 10.

Rip and Tear.name: Rip and Tear
Rip and Tear.description: The hodag makes two claw Strikes and one jaws Strike in any order.

Toss.name: Toss
Toss.description:
The hodag Strides, then makes a Strike against a target in reach. If it moves at least 20 feet and succeeds at its Strike, the hodag deals damage normally and then attempts an Athletics check against the creature's Fortitude DC to toss the enemy into the air. On a success, the tossed creature is thrown 10 feet in a straight line in the direction of the hodag's choice and then lands @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

If the creature is knocked into a solid object, it takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage before landing prone. The hodag can instead toss a creature straight up in the air. The creature lands in the same square where it started, takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage, and falls prone.

Xiuh Coatl.name: 火焰羽蛇 Xiuh Coatl
Xiuh Coatl.publicNotes:
火焰羽蛇比比其他羽蛇更凶猛，专司追捕邪恶生物，并给予它们最后一次赎罪的机会。

羽蛇是蛇形的天族，它们在诸位面间不遗余力地帮助凡人发挥最大潜能。有些作为仁慈神祇的中介者效力，有些则按自己的意愿为正义事业而战。
Xiuh Coatl.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

Thoughtsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 思维感知（模糊） 60尺 Thoughtsense (Imprecise) 60 feet

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Instrument of Retribution.name: 报应之器 Instrument of Retribution
Instrument of Retribution.description: 火焰羽蛇变形成任意简易或军用武器。该武器总是一件+2高等强击炽炎电击武器，且可以是任意尺寸，由火焰羽蛇在变形时选择。处于武器形态时，火焰羽蛇获得等同于所变形武器的硬度，并保留其生命值，豁免，感官，心灵感应，和特征。火焰羽蛇可以通过维持来变回通常形态。

Volcanic Lightning Breath.name: 火山闪电吐息 Volcanic Lightning Breath
Volcanic Lightning Breath.description: 火焰羽蛇吐出一道@Template[type:line|distance:80]的火焰和闪电，造成@Damage[5d8[electricity],5d8[fire]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。火焰羽蛇在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Volcanic Lightning Breath]]{1d4轮}内不能再次使用火山闪电吐息。

Wrap in Coils.name: 蛇身盘绕 Wrap in Coils
Wrap in Coils.description:
需求 1个中型或更小体型的生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]于火焰羽蛇的颚中

效果 火焰羽蛇将该生物挪进自己盘绕的蛇身之中，松开牙使其之后可以进行攻击，之后对该生物使用紧勒。火焰羽蛇所处的空间可以容纳多少生物，他那盘卷的蛇身就可以勒住多少生物。

Xiuh Coatl Venom.name: 火焰羽蛇毒 Xiuh Coatl Venom
Xiuh Coatl Venom.description:
对于邪秽生物，这是一种诅咒而非毒素，造成精魂伤害而非毒素伤害

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段1 @Damage[2d8[poison]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}（1轮）

阶段2 @Damage[2d10[poison]]伤害，力竭1且所有速度承受-5尺状态减值（1轮）

阶段3 @Damage[3d8[poison]]伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}且所有速度承受-10尺状态减值（1轮）

对抗邪秽

豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:32|traits:curse,holy|overrideTraits]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段1 @Damage[2d8[spirit]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}（1轮）

阶段2 @Damage[2d10[spirit]]伤害，力竭1且所有速度承受-5尺状态减值（1轮）

阶段3 @Damage[3d8[spirit]]伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}且所有速度承受-10尺状态减值（1轮）

Soulrider (Celestial).name: 溯魂鳗（天族） Soulrider (Celestial)
Soulrider (Celestial).publicNotes:
虽然溯魂鳗可以长得相当大，但它们通常大多只有几英尺长，体态细长。在附着于灵魂并穿越位面后，它们必须在开始成长前完成对新环境的适应。

这些最小型的溯魂可能出现在通常宇宙中任何拥有通往外层位面传送门或有召唤魔法痕迹的地方。野外的大批幼体常被大自然的捕食者所掠食，但单个幼体可以存活多年，并为了寻找宿主而旅行很多英里。

溯魂鳗会使用它那无害的吸盘来搭生物灵魂的"便车"。这种生物外形酷似八目鳗或盲鳗，拖着一条长长的鞭状尾巴。吸盘吸附这种连接形式看似简单，实际上是超脱了物质形态直接附着在宿主的灵魂上，以随其一同前往灵魂所去之处。一旦抵达目的地，溯魂鳗就会离开宿主，吸收周围的位面能量，适应新环境并成长到足以产下子嗣。然而，它只能在普通的物质宇宙中生产，因此它必须寻找传送门或通过其他方式返回。通过这种循环，它们已经扩散到了每一个外层位面（Outer Sphere），以及许多凡人世界。

虽然溯魂鳗的活动范围很大，但它们其实才出现了一百多年。据传闻，曾有一名畸肉师（Fleshwarper）试图通过将数个无辜灵魂吸附在自己身上，来尝试欺瞒法莱斯玛的审判。自那以后，溯魂鳗就开始出现，数量呈爆炸式增长。

虽然溯魂鳗仅需空气即可生存，但它们本能地意识到自己对凡人灵魂的需求。尽管它们的吸盘是无害的，但感到威胁或变得焦躁时溯魂鳗会用鞭状尾巴解决掉宿主或其他威胁。

Planar Adaptation (Celestial).name: 位面适应（天族） Planar Adaptation (Celestial)
Planar Adaptation (Celestial).description: 如果溯魂鳗跟随一个灵魂来到了其终点，它会获得这个位面相关的特征。根据终点的不同，溯魂鳗获得天族和圣洁，魔族和邪秽，或是观察者特征。

Celestial Flare.name: 天界之火 Celestial Flare
Celestial Flare.description: 溯魂鳗30尺内的每个敌人承受@Damage[2d6[spirit]]伤害（@Check[will|dc:17|basic]豁免）。在豁免中失败的生物还会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]，持续1轮。溯魂鳗在1分钟内无法再次使用天界之火。

Propulsive Launch.name: 推进起步 Propulsive Launch
Propulsive Launch.description: 溯魂鳗跳跃至多40尺，然后进行一次吸盘打击。如果它在空中且在打击后未附着于生物，则其坠落。

Soul Attach.name: 灵魂吸附 Soul Attach
Soul Attach.description: 当一个溯魂鳗成功对一个目标进行吸盘打击，并且该目标的灵魂会面对审判时，它会吸附在该生物的灵魂上。当吸附时，溯魂鳗和宿主陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]，溯魂鳗随着宿主移动而移动，直到溯魂鳗死亡或宿主拉开溯魂鳗（[[/act escape dc=15]]）。如果宿主在溯魂吸附期间死亡，溯魂鳗立即消失，随着灵魂脱离宿主的肉体。如果生物在抵达其灵魂的终点前被复活，溯魂鳗也会跟着回来。

Tail Thrash.name: 猛烈尾扫 Tail Thrash
Tail Thrash.description:
需求 溯魂鳗正吸附于一个生物的灵魂上

效果 溯魂鳗对吸附的生物进行一次尾扫打击，然后对另一个跟宿主邻接的生物进行一次尾扫打击。这些打击会计入溯魂鳗的多重攻击减值，但在第二次打击完成之前不会生效。

Mimic.name: Mimic
Mimic.publicNotes:
Thought to be the result of a failed experiment meant to animate furniture or possibly a sinister alghollthu creation, mimics are clever monsters that can take the form of common manufactured objects. While rumored to prefer to be doors, any object that another creature will eventually interact with is an acceptable form to take. Mimics are ambush predators and voracious eaters, surprising their prey through their uncanny ability to imitate the form of ordinary furniture and other common miscellany. They remain disguised until unsuspecting adventurers happen by, then they lash out in ambush.

Mimics possess complex alien minds, and while often cruel and self-serving, they also enjoy conversation with their prey from time to time. For unknown reasons, they're especially interested in humanoids, and tales tell of the occasional mimic who has even formed a partnership with them for larger, shared goals. Mimics have a strong dislike for others of their kind and tend to live alone. Mimics can remain in their alternate form for an extremely long period of time, sometimes remaining disguised in a dungeon chamber for decades. Regardless of how long they wait, mimics remain vigilant and alert, ever ready to ensnare an unsuspecting victim.

Object Lesson.name: Object Lesson
Object Lesson.description:
Trigger A creature touches or physically interacts with the mimic while the mimic is transformed using Mimic Object

Effect The mimic makes a jaws Strike against the triggering creature. If initiative hasn't yet been rolled, the mimic then rolls initiative. Object Lesson can't be used again until the mimic escapes and takes on a new disguise.

Mimic Object.name: Mimic Object
Mimic Object.description: The mimic assumes the shape of any Medium object. This doesn't change the mimic's texture or overall size but can alter their coloration and visual appearance. They have an automatic result of 28 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as the object that they're mimicking.

Mobile Morph.name: Mobile Morph
Mobile Morph.description: The mimic transforms part of their body into climbing claws, wings, or paddles. Until the end of their turn, they gain a climb, fly, or swim Speed of 40 feet. This speed is halved if the mimic has a creature swallowed. If they're in the air at the end of their turn, they fall as normal.

Khravgodon.name: Khravgodon
Khravgodon.publicNotes:
Few creatures can shrug off an ankhrav's acid and crunch its chitin like a khravgodon.

Few creatures have survived as long and in as many environments as the opossum.
Khravgodon.allSaves: +2 circumstance to all saves vs. disease

+2 Circumstance to All Saves vs. Disease.name: +2 Circumstance to All Saves vs. Disease

Feign Death.name: Feign Death
Feign Death.description:
Trigger The khravgodon is reduced below 70 HP

Effect The khravgodon collapses. It is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and can use actions that require only its mind, but any other action ends the ruse.

A successful @Check[perception|dc:18|traits:action:seek] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} or @Check[medicine|dc:18|traits:action:recall-knowledge] check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} is required to determine that the animal is not, in fact, dead.

Revived Retaliation.name: Revived Retaliation
Revived Retaliation.description:
Trigger The khravgodon is attacked or disturbed by a creature within reach while Feigning Death

Effect The khravgodon Strikes the triggering creature.

Crush Chitin.name: Crush Chitin
Crush Chitin.description:
Requirements The khravgodon has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The khravgodon bites the creature, dealing @Damage[(2d12+9)[piercing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic] save) that ignores the first 5 of the target's Hardness or resistance to physical damage. On a failed save, the target also takes a -2 circumstance penalty to AC for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.7OJrBAEah6YFLzcK]{Effect: Crush Chitin}

Grasping Tail.name: Grasping Tail
Grasping Tail.description: A khravgodon can drag a Large or smaller creature it has @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} with its tail along with it when it Strides.

Poppet Mage.name: 人偶法师 Poppet Mage
Poppet Mage.publicNotes:
通过注入额外的时间、关怀和耐心，人偶可以被编织入魔法，使它们成为才华横溢的小施法者。

人偶是一种简单的构装体，被设计用来协助其创造者完成简单的任务。

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description: 比传统箭短，但结构相似，矢是弩使用的弹药。

Magic Hat.name: 魔法帽子 Magic Hat
Magic Hat.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 人偶法师有一只空闲手

效果 人偶法术拉出它的帽子，随着一个潇洒的动作，它从帽子里取出了以下物品之一：一瓶次等黏胶炸弹，一个次等发烟球，或一瓶下等治疗药水。这个物品会在1小时后失效。

Wihsaak.name: Wihsaak
Wihsaak.publicNotes:
These gaunt and insectile sahkils torment their foes by focusing on a widespread fear of insects and creeping, crawling vermin. Unlike their more subtle cousins, wihsaaks don't lurk in the periphery and instead directly engage their targets, using their unnerving buzzing to disorient and terrify.

When encountering multiple foes, wihsaaks attempt to spread fear to everyone before slashing at them with their devastating claws.

Ages ago, when this cycle of the multiverse was still adolescent, a cabal of psychopomps who already felt bored and restrained in their role of ushering souls to their ultimate resting place rebelled against their station. It was this corruption of the cycle of souls that spawned the first sahkils.

Ambivalent to the prescribed order of the multiverse and spiteful of mortals, sahkils delight in spreading fear and unease to all beings, clogging up the metaphysical cycle with anxiety-ridden mortals too scared to achieve their potential. These fiends have drastically changed from their dedicated psychopomp predecessors. They are creatures of spite and torment, fear and disgust. They exploit the most common and rare fears for their own perverse satisfaction, and they want nothing more than to frighten mortals and make them quetion their reason for existence.

Most sahkils lurk on the Ethereal Plane, but they frequently invade the Material Plane to torment mortals and spread terror. They use their innate ability to slip between the veils of the Ethereal and Material effortlessly, often stalking their targets for days or weeks before enacting their devious plots.

Easy to Call.name: Easy to Call
Easy to Call.description: A wihsaak's level is considered 2 lower for the purpose of being conjured by the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2ykmAVKrsAWcazcC]{Binding Circle} ritual (and potentially other rituals, at the GM's discretion), but it is always free to attack or leave instead of negotiate unless the primary caster's check is a critical success.

Swarmwalker.name: Swarmwalker
Swarmwalker.description: Swarms of animals and other unintelligent creatures instinctively leave a wihsaak alone. A wihsaak is immune to the damage from and effects of swarms with an Intelligence of –5.

Droning Distraction.name: Droning Distraction
Droning Distraction.description:
Effect The wihsaak beats its wings rapidly, creating a buzzing drone that numbs creatures' minds. Each creature within @Template[emanation|distance:100]{100 feet} must attempt a @Check[will|dc:23|options:area-effect,inflicts:confused,inflicts:stupefied] save. They are then temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is confused for 1 round and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute.

Skip Between.name: Skip Between
Skip Between.description: The sahkil moves from the Universe to the Ethereal Plane or vice-versa. While in the Ethereal Plane, they're unable to affect anything in the Universe, and they cannot be seen by beings or abilities in the Universe, unless these have an ability that can gaze into the Ethereal Plane. While on the Material Plane the inverse is true for anything on the Ethereal Plane. A summoned sahkil can't use Skip Between.

Baomal.name: Baomal
Baomal.publicNotes: Few sea monsters are as dreaded and feared as the two-headed baomal. These massive predatory beasts typically dwell in the deepest waters and compete with krakens and other monsters for food. They feed on whales and other large sea creatures, sometimes following them to the water's surface. Near the surface, baomals that encounter ships quickly learn that they contain a variety of tasty morsels. The creatures use their devastating spikes to rip open the ships' hulls, then leisurely feed on the helpless sailors.

Doubled Reaction.name: Doubled Reaction
Doubled Reaction.description: A baomal gains an extra reaction each round that it can use only to make a Reactive Strike. It must use a different head for each one it attempts, and it can't make more than one Attack of Opportunity for the same triggering action.

Psychic Static Aura.name: Psychic Static Aura
Psychic Static Aura.description: 120 feet. All creatures, except aberrations, that begin their turn in the area take @Damage[5d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage.

Two Heads.name: Two Heads
Two Heads.description: Any ability that would sever a baomal's head (such as a critical hit with a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.6xaxxKfvXED6LfIY]{Vorpal} weapon) severs one head at random. Losing one head doesn't kill a baomal, but it does prevent the baomal from making Strikes with the lost head and from using Double Reaction or Two-Headed Strike.

Breath of the Sea.name: Breath of the Sea
Breath of the Sea.description: A baomal can inhale tremendous amounts of water, drawing everything in the sea nearby closer. All creatures and objects in the water within @Template[emanation|distance:60]{60 feet} of the baomal (including ships) are pulled toward it. Creatures must succeed at a @Check[athletics|dc:42|options:forced-movement] check or be pulled up to 20 feet toward the baomal (40 feet on a critical failure). For ships, use the captain's Sailing Lore in place of Athletics. Unattended objects are automatically pulled.

Shell Rake.name: Shell Rake
Shell Rake.description: The baomal Swims or Strides alongside a creature or the hull of a vessel, dealing damage with the strong spikes on its shell. Each creature or ship the baomal is adjacent to at any point during its movement takes @Damage[(6d6+10)[slashing],(6d6+10)[piercing]]{6d6+10 slashing and piercing damage} (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic] save). Against vessels, Shell Rake ignores the first 5 Hardness and creates an explosion of splinters that deals @Damage[(3d6+5)[untyped]|options:area-damage] damage to every creature within @Template[burst|distance:10]{10 feet} of the deck's edge (@Check[reflex|dc:42|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Two-Headed Strike.name: Two-Headed Strike
Two-Headed Strike.description: The baomal makes a Strike with each set of jaws, each against a different creature. These Strikes count as one attack for the baomal's multiple attack penalty, and the penalty doesn't increase until after both attacks.

Kappa.name: Kappa
Kappa.publicNotes:
Mischievous by nature, kappas delight in playing pranks on unsuspecting travelers. While usually not overtly malicious, they can be a significant nuisance, stealing clothes from unsuspecting bathers or snatching unattended food from campfires. Kappas also enjoy proving their worth in competitions of strength and, despite their propensity for trickery, are known to be honorable competitors who keep their word and remain polite in conversation.

While kappas vary in physical attributes from region to region, they're all amphibious, turtle-like humanoids with beaked mouths, webbed hands and feet, and slimy scales that range in color from bluish green to pale yellow. They often have black hair, arranged in a ring to accommodate the central depression atop their head. Water from a kappa's home lake, stream, or river fills this depression, or head bowl, which is believed to be the source of their strength. Younger kappas are easily tricked into bowing and accidentally emptying the water from their own head bowls. Losing this water makes a kappa lethargic. The longer a kappa's head bowl remains empty, the weaker they grow. While this rarely poses a serious danger for a kappa living near their home body of water, it can prove fatal to a more adventurous kappa wandering afar.

Kappas aren't inherently hostile and have been known to befriend lonely children and lend aid to stranded adventurers by providing directions or minor medical treatment. Still, many areas where kappas dwell feature posted signs warning of their presence that encourage travelers venturing near water to toss in a cucumber—kappas' favorite food—in exchange for safe passage. Kappas sometimes put up these signs themselves to increase the likelihood of receiving a tasty treat.

Head Bowl.name: Head Bowl
Head Bowl.description:
The depression atop a kappa's head is filled with water. Spilling, evaporating, or otherwise removing all the water from the top of a kappa's head reduces all their Speeds to 5 feet until the basin is again filled with water. A kappa who becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:15] save or spill their water, and a kappa who becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} automatically spills their water.

If a kappa is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, or stunned, another creature can attempt to spill the water from their bowl by spending a single action, which has the attack and manipulate traits, to attempt an Athletics check against the kappa's Fortitude DC. On a success, the creature spills the kappa's water.

Pull Arm.name: Pull Arm
Pull Arm.description: The kappa pulls one of their arms, gaining 10-foot reach with that arm. The opposing arm shrinks to little more than a hand extending from their shell. The kappa can still use their shortened hand to hold things, but they can't use that hand to wield a shield or weapon. By spending a single action to pull their opposing arm, the kappa can return their arms to their original length.

Golem.name: 魔像 Golem
Golem.publicNotes:
很久以前，古代宗教的祭司们掌握了一项让他们能更加接近其神祇的技艺：将粘土活化为活物。这些粘土造物被称为魔像，其活化方式是将写有祭司所信奉神祇之名讳的纸片置于其口中（或者在某些情况下，是将神圣词语雕刻在魔像的额头上）。尽管魔像因神之赐福而具备了智能，但它通常只有在接受命令时才会行动，而且罕有具备语言能力的个体——此乃神明仅会赋予其造物的恩赐。取而代之的是，它们会运用其知能在仅有最虔诚的信徒才能知晓的神圣仪式中，协助其制造者与神祇进行沟通。

在部分遭受压迫的社群中，魔像充当着抵御外部暴力的保护者，以化解紧张局势为首要目标，将战斗作为最后的手段。在其他时候，魔像会担任神殿的守卫或圣人的助手。在罕见的情况下，若魔像未能得到每周一日的休息的话，它便会陷入狂怒。这种狂怒能对魔像本应保护的社群造成极大的破坏，因此其制造者必须尽力妥善地照料其造物。

关于魔像的传说在内海地区及更遥远的地方都有着多种多样且极为广泛地流传。部分传说中提到魔像被赋予了更为奇异的能力，比如召唤死者魂灵。拥有此类能力的魔像无疑是由最神圣的祭司所创造，它们与其神祇的契合程度远远超出了凡人的期望。

Day of Rest.name: 休息日 Day of Rest
Day of Rest.description: 魔像每周需要休息一日，否则会变得不受控制。失控魔像无法施放法术，而且会在使用感知的检定中承受-2环境减值，这也包括意志豁免。在处于失控状态时，魔像会失去对睡眠的免疫。直至魔像进行整日休息为止，它都会处于失控状态。

Faithful.name: 忠诚 Faithful
Faithful.description: 当魔像未处于失控状态时（见前文），它会忠诚地为其创造者服务。当魔像处于忠诚状态时，它会遵循其创造者的命令，即便该命令会对自身造成损害也如此。当魔像维持对其创造者的忠诚时，它不会因其创造者之外的任何生物而陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]。

Hefty Helper.name: 壮硕助手 Hefty Helper
Hefty Helper.description: 魔像在陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]前能携带13负载，至多能携带18负载。

Consecrated Fists.name: 受祝之拳 Consecrated Fists
Consecrated Fists.description: 在魔像施放一个圣洁法术后，其打击能造成额外1d8点精魂伤害，并且获得神术和圣洁特征。这些增益会持续至魔像的下个回合结束为止。

Rampage.name: 狂怒 Rampage
Rampage.description:
需求 魔像正处于失控状态

效果 魔像对触及范围内的每个生物作出1次打击，无论该生物是否是盟友。这些攻击如常计入多重攻击减值，但是在所有打击都处理完成前该减值不会增加。

Vermlek.name: 虫裂魔 Vermlek
Vermlek.publicNotes:
虫裂魔，也被称为蠕虫恶魔，从亵渎死者的凡人灵魂中显现出来，比如盗墓者或死灵法师。这些恶魔将他们的侵犯行为推向了一个新的极端，利用他们的恶魔力量，可怕地将他们的活体受害者的心脏挖出来，然后穿上剩下的肉壳。

在其自然形态下，虫裂魔类似于一个超大的粉红色蠕虫，有四条长尾巴，末端是蠕动的纤维。它的嘴分成四段，像一朵亵渎的郁金香，里面有一排排的尖牙。然而，通常情况下，只有在虫裂魔爬进一个死去的类人生物的身体并将被挖空的肉体作为临时宿主之后才会遇到。虫裂魔利用其欺骗和伪装的能力潜入凡人的定居点，影响他们身所穿戴的身体中不知情的熟人。特别聪明或狡猾的虫裂魔甚至可能在军队或政府的队伍中达到真正的权力地位，这时，他们真实形态的暴露会在被他们彻底愚弄的民众中造成破坏。

Recoil from Wasted Opportunities.name: 错失良机的反噬 Recoil from Wasted Opportunities
Recoil from Wasted Opportunities.description: 虫裂魔无法忍受看到眼前出现一顿美餐却被迅速夺走。每当虫裂魔视线范围内的濒死生物被移除其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]状态，虫裂魔就会受到@Damage[1d6[mental]]伤害。

Abandon Body.name: 废弃躯体 Abandon Body
Abandon Body.description:
需求 虫裂魔处于占据躯体状态

效果 虫裂魔从它所居住的身体中爬出来，吞噬身体中剩余的大部分肉体，并在这个过程中恢复了@Damage[10[healing]]生命值。它留下的尸体仅剩空壳。

Inhabit Body.name: 占据躯体 Inhabit Body
Inhabit Body.description:
需求 虫裂魔尚未处于占据躯体状态

效果 虫裂魔爬进一个相邻的、死亡不超过一周的中型类人生物的身体，吞噬受害者的大部分骨骼和内脏，并将自己塞进里面。只要它居住在身体里，虫裂魔就会失去它的啃咬攻击，可以像类人生物一样挥舞武器，AC 获得+3环境加值，并且在[[/act impersonate options=impersonate-inhabited-creature]]它占据的生物时，欺骗检定获得+3环境加值。

Unsettling Movement.name: 惊人异变 Unsettling Movement
Unsettling Movement.description: 每当虫裂魔放弃或占据到一个身体上时，@Template[emanation|distance:30]范围内所有能看到虫裂魔的生物必须通过@Check[will|dc:19|options:inflicts:frightened,inflicts:sickened]豁免，否则就会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1} ；如果大失败，生物会陷入惊惧1和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}。不管结果如何，生物都会在24小时内免疫同一只虫裂魔的惊人异变。

Zhuraita.name: Zhuraita
Zhuraita.publicNotes:
Zhuraitas are dedicated to the freedom of academic and scientifc inquiry, protecting the creativity and inventiveness of scholarly felds. Many good-hearted academics have breakthroughs due to a zhuraita's inspiration, notably with projects that have lasting positive impacts on others. Zhuraitas also travel to defend important centers of knowledge when they are in danger of destruction.

Zhuraitas despise those who would use research as a tool of oppression, and there are even rumors of them sabotaging such projects, hindering their completion. The azatas are known to sometimes hide away knowledge they believe to be harmful or dangerous. They don't outright destroy such knowledge, however, and instead choose to seal it away in places they can defend. On rare occasions, a zhuraita will recognize that such knowledge might actually be of some use for a trusted ally and share the information, though only under the zhuraita's supervision.

Deconstruct.name: Deconstruct
Deconstruct.description:
Trigger The zhuraita is targeted by an efect with the linguistic or mental trait

Effect The zhuraita critiques their enemy's theoretical underpinnings, attempting a counteract check with a bonus of [[/r 1d20+28#Counteract]] (counteract rank 8). If the efect is counteracted, the triggering enemy becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} if the zhuraita critically succeeded).

Revealing Hypothesis.name: Revealing Hypothesis
Revealing Hypothesis.description:
Requirements The zhuraita hits a creature with its thesis

Effect The zhuraita's thesis opens, with the pages futtering at an unnatural speed. It then slams shut, with the cover now showing the image of the creature it hit. The zhuraita's Strikes against that creature deal an additional 2d6 precision damage. The zhuraita can only have one creature as the focus of its Revealing Hypothesis, which lasts until they target someone else.

Thesis Shield.name: Thesis Shield
Thesis Shield.description: A spinning circle of tomes surrounds the zhuraita, lasting until the start of their next turn. While Thesis Shield is active, the zhuraita gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and has the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition.

Dragonblood Occultist.name: 龙裔异能者 Dragonblood Occultist
Dragonblood Occultist.publicNotes:
龙裔异能者从他们的兆命龙恩主那里汲取力量。这种异能连接使异能者能够预见未来的一瞥。

当龙类通过施展威能或化形混居的方式在某个社群中产生影响力时，可能会有新生儿展现出该龙类的生理或心智特征。这些后裔被称为龙裔，通常带有揭示其血统的龙类特征。龙裔可以出现在所有族裔中，尽管许多龙裔要么是人类，要么本身便与某种现存的龙有联系，例如与龙类关系密切的狗头人。

龙裔通常拥有一些能够揭示他们龙类本质的生理特征。这些特征可能较为微妙，如类似爪子的修长指甲或独特的眼睛颜色。但对于许多龙裔来说，这些特征更加明显，会以龙角、龙尾、龙翼或龙鳞的形式呈现。有些龙裔甚至完全像是双足行走的龙，这常常导致许多人误以为他们是狗头人、蜥蜴人或其他爬行类族裔。对于没有明显特征的龙裔来说，他们仍然偶尔会在情绪激荡时短暂流露出龙类特征。

龙裔可以追溯到特定龙类原型。其生理特征与能力始终与龙类原型相匹配。例如，如果一个龙裔的龙类原型是灰烬龙，他们可能会表现出赤红鳞片或喷火能力。龙对与自己有关系的龙裔的看法可能有所不同。大多数龙通常对龙裔不感兴趣。仁慈且善于社交的龙则往往会在得知有龙裔存在时感到亲近。然而，也有些龙视龙裔为低等存在，因为龙裔并不是真正的龙，龙类原型对此并不在意。

Bolts.name: 弩矢 Bolts
Bolts.description: 比传统箭短，但结构相似，矢是弩使用的弹药。

Draconic Willpower.name: 龙之意志 Draconic Willpower
Draconic Willpower.description: 当龙裔异能者在对抗恐惧效果的豁免检定中成功时，改为获得大成功。

Light of Fate.name: 命运之光 Light of Fate
Light of Fate.description:
需求 龙裔异能者手持一盏点燃的提灯

效果 龙裔异能者将提灯的光芒照射到20尺内的一个生物，揭示尚未发生的创伤。然后，龙裔异能者选择钝击，心灵，穿刺伤害或挥砍伤害类型，目标将获得对该伤害类型的4点弱点，直到龙裔异能者下个回合结束。

Zebub.name: 蝇魔 Zebub
Zebub.publicNotes:
蝇魔是地狱的使者和密探。它们能向其他生物分享自己所见景象的能力特别有用——不仅是对于其他魔鬼，对于凡人施法者来说也是如此。一些地狱领主会对毫无防备的地区释放数量庞大而吓人的蝇魔群，用来腐化肉体和土地，同时收集那些地狱之主可能用得上的秘密。蝇魔会利用任何机会操纵意志薄弱或容易被诱惑的凡人，让它们服务于自己的心血来潮。

虽然傲慢且满嘴谎话，蝇魔缺乏大多数恶魔的自信和狡诈，因此它们的计划往往专注于自我陶醉式的满足，和自我毁灭式的野心。蝇魔往往由魔鬼大公巴尔泽布（Baalzebul）在冰冷而肮脏的地狱第七层库凯图斯（Cocytus）用幼稚和怯懦的人类灵魂塑造而成，
Zebub.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Cocytan Filth.name: 库凯图斯污秽症 Cocytan Filth
Cocytan Filth.description:
豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

潜伏期 [[/gmr 1d4 #days]]{1d4日}

阶段1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}（1日）

阶段2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}（1日）

阶段3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 3}（1日）

Diabolic Eye.name: 炼狱之眼 Diabolic Eye
Diabolic Eye.description:
蝇魔能记录下它们所看到的一切，并且可以将其传递给其他生物，虽然在这之后它们就不再记得任何观察到的东西。

蝇魔可以将10分钟的目击事件回放给一个自愿接受的生物，它将会看到闪回的记忆。通过维持链接，蝇魔可以花费额外3个动作来回放更多的信息。

当它们将幻象传递给另一个生物之后，它们将永远无法再次回忆起那些事件。

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: 蝇魔对陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]的生物造成额外1d6精准伤害。

Grimple.name: 垢鼠小魔怪 Grimple
Grimple.publicNotes:
垢鼠小魔怪甚至比大多数小魔怪都更讨厌文明留下的痕迹：酒馆里传出的吵闹的歌声、马厩里马匹的嘶鸣、教堂尖顶上叮当作响的钟声。垢鼠小魔怪活着就是为了破坏这些：把酒馆的招牌扔到顾客身上，在集雨桶里撒尿，打开马厩的门。当所有方法都不管用时，它们真的会把呕吐物吐在路人身上来表达自己的蔑视。

垢鼠小魔怪就像是人形的、浑身长满疥癣的负鼠，嘴里有野猪一样的獠牙，帮助它们在垃圾堆里翻找食物。它们是敏捷的攀登者，依靠四肢之间松弛的皮肤在屋檐间滑翔。精明的小魔怪猎人知道通过寻找垢鼠小魔怪身上脱落的毛皮碎片来定位它们。

小魔怪很久以前就在第一世界出现了，它们是大自然消耗、侵蚀和分解能力的具现。在物质位面，他们与凡人文明的遭遇将他们扭曲成制造混乱、破坏和陷阱的生物，每种小魔怪都专精于某种特定的混乱。

equipment-Satchel for Holding Rocks.name: 一小包石头 Satchel for Holding Rocks

Gremlin Lice.name: 小魔怪虱 Gremlin Lice
Gremlin Lice.description:
每当一个活体生物接触垢鼠小魔怪或被垢鼠小魔怪接触（包括通过一次成功的无武装近战打击），它必须成功通过一次@Check[reflex|dc:13]豁免，否则会感染小魔怪虱。

在感染时，目标生物会因瘙痒的分心而获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}；他可以使用一个交互动作来捉虱子，在[[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4轮}内压制虱子引起的呆滞状态。

虱子的侵扰在24小时后结束，或直到该生物淹没在水中或暴露在严寒环境中，取其先者。

Putrid Vomit.name: 腐臭呕吐 Putrid Vomit
Putrid Vomit.description: 垢鼠小魔怪喷出@Template[type:line|distance:30]的呕吐物。线形内的每个生物必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:16]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}（如果大失败，则@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 2}）。垢鼠小魔怪在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Putrid Vomit]]{1d4轮}内不能再使用腐臭呕吐。

Hound Topiary.name: 猎犬绿雕 Hound Topiary
Hound Topiary.publicNotes:
在阿维斯坦（Avistan），许多贵族庭院都能看到这种威严的猎犬雕像守护着入口——在有些地区，这是对劫掠的地精团伙的警示；而在其他地方，则是对凯登·凯连（Cayden Cailean）或迪斯帕特（Dispater）庇护的虔诚祈求。在野外，猎犬绿雕常见于枝叶茂密的地区，以便让兽群能隐蔽起来。无论出现在何处，猎犬绿雕均由那些生前对同伴极度忠诚、充满保护欲的灵魂所形成，如今则致力于守护它们所选择的领地的安宁。

绿雕在格拉利昂各地都极为常见，尤其常见于贵族那经过精心修剪的光洁草坪上。当灵魂在原能魔法浓厚的地区孤独逝去时就有可能产生活化绿雕，其灵魂迸发进入到周遭的植物中，致使植物聚合生长为动物的形态——具体形态通常会受到濒死之人的性格影响。一旦完全成形，活化绿雕便失去了原本的记忆；然而，它们的内心会被保护诞生之地的欲望所充满，会驱离那些入侵者以及有可能伤害当地动植物的人。

Pack Attack.name: 群起攻之 Pack Attack
Pack Attack.description: 若猎犬绿雕攻击的任何生物至少同时还处于猎犬绿雕的另外两个盟友的触及之内，那么猎犬绿雕会对该生物造成@Damage[1d6[untyped]]额外伤害。

Pruning.name: 自我修剪 Pruning
Pruning.description: 猎犬绿雕扭曲并改变自身形态，根据需要脱落枝条和叶片，变为中型或更小的动物绿雕的样子。直至下一次它行动为止，绿雕都会在呈现为普通绿雕的欺骗检定和DC中得到30的自动结果。

Walk Through Plants.name: 穿越植被 Walk Through Plants
Walk Through Plants.description: 猎犬绿雕忽略由于茂密植被而产生的困难地形。

Warning Howl.name: 警示嚎叫 Warning Howl
Warning Howl.description:
触发 猎犬绿雕使用隐秘投掷先攻

效果 猎犬绿雕动起来并嚎叫起来，不过它既没有呼吸，口中也无法发出声音。30尺内的生物必须尝试@Check[will|dc:17]豁免，失败则会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}。之后这些生物免疫所有猎犬绿雕的警示嚎叫，持续1小时。

Sportlebore.name: 拟餐虫 Sportlebore
Sportlebore.disable: 一名发现拟餐虫的生物可以使用一个交互动作把它从藏身的食物中剔除。
Sportlebore.hazarddescription: 拟餐虫会藏在一盘食物或一袋干粮内

Mimic Food.name: 拟态食物 Mimic Food
Mimic Food.description:
触发 一名生物食用了拟餐虫藏身其中的食物

效果 拟餐虫在宿主胃部快速增殖，使得宿主暴露在拟餐虫感染的影响下。

Sportlebore Infestation.name: 拟餐虫感染 Sportlebore Infestation
Sportlebore Infestation.description:
豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic]

阶段1 携带者无症状（1日）

阶段2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}（1小时）

阶段3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}（1小时）

阶段4 @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning]]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:25|basic]豁免）与此同时宿主痛苦地呕吐出一团拟餐虫群并回到阶段1。

Cockroach Swarm.name: Cockroach Swarm
Cockroach Swarm.publicNotes: While cockroaches tend to gather in cramped spaces, a disturbed colony is sometimes prone to swarming, where hundreds or even thousands of the insects scurry out of their hiding places in a raft of shiny brown and black carapaces on thousands of skittering legs. Given how disgusting many find cockroaches to be, encountering such a swarm can be alarming to even the most seasoned adventurers. The creatures are relentless when disturbed; in contrast to the insects' normally skittish and harmless nature, as swarms they pursue the creature or creatures that provoked them and harry them with thousands of stinging bites.

Swarming Bites.name: Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[1d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Shade (Dead Vault).name: 残影（死亡地窟） Shade (Dead Vault)
Shade (Dead Vault).publicNotes:
囚人会被送往洛瓦古格的监牢位面，也就是死亡地窟；它们的外观看上去就像是被锁链束缚的生前版本，只是它们的脸孔看上去像是极其狰狞的虫类

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

Planar Incarnation - Dead Vault (The Cag.name: 死亡地窟位面塑形（囚人） Planar Incarnation - Dead Vault (The Caged)
Planar Incarnation - Dead Vault (The Cag.description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

死亡地窟 Dead Vault（"囚人" the Caged） 囚人会被送往洛瓦古格的监牢位面，也就是死亡地窟；它们的外观看上去就像是被锁链束缚的生前版本，只是它们的脸孔看上去像是极其狰狞的虫类

  • 祝佑 邪秽
  • 语言 恶魔语
  • 额外能力 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary-srd.Item.3JOi2cMcGhT3eze1]，噬咬
  • 近战 噬咬 +7，伤害 1d8+2 穿刺

Munavri Spellblade.name: Munavri Spellblade
Munavri Spellblade.publicNotes:
Although the subterranean Darklands are known for the cruel and domineering civilizations led by fiend-worshipping peoples who dwell within those sinister caverns, not every such subterranean society is ruled that way. Munavris are perhaps the best example of a people who tend to treat new arrivals to their Darklands territories with good temper, fairness, and respect.

These humanoids are the descendants of humans who survived the world-ending cataclysm called Earthfall—mariners who were abducted by alghollthus and dragged down through the ocean depths until they emerged on the other side of the seafloor, amid the Sightless Sea in the lightless realm of Orv.

Gradually, munavris' bodies adapted to their new home: they began to demonstrate telekinetic powers and came to develop highly sensitive vision and beautiful crystalline growths along their skin, which is said to be a representation of their psychic abilities. These early munavris eventually settled on a mysterious archipelago of jade islands—mystical green landforms that seemed to resonate with strange and powerful psychic energies that repelled their alghollthu captors. Safe from their abductors and nurtured by the strange powers of their jade islands, munavris have remained free to hone their telekinetic abilities into substantial psychic prowess.

Every munavri has the ability to concentrate psychic energy upon an object and immediately ascertain what it is and how best to use it. Such amazing natural intuition doesn't come easily, however. Using this power requires munavris to expend a large portion of their limited psychic energy, and sleep is the only way for them to replenish this psychic well.

Today, nearly all munavris still dwell on the jade archipelago and ply the waters of the Sightless Sea. Their predominant culture promotes nobility of both deed and heart, and many munavris dedicate their lives to waging war against those who sow discord in the Darklands.

Addling Strike.name: Addling Strike
Addling Strike.description:
Frequency once per turn

Requirements The munavri's most recent action was to Cast a Spell

Effect The munavri Strikes. This Strike gains the occult trait and deals an additional 1d4 mental damage.

Intuit Object.name: Intuit Object
Intuit Object.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect By concentrating their psychic energy on a held object, the munavri intuits its use and understands how to effectively wield it. If they focus on a weapon, they can roll twice and take the better result for the next Strike they make with it before the end of their next turn. If they focus on a tool, they can roll twice and take the better result for the next skill check they attempt with that tool within the next minute.

Anguished Flame.name: 痛苦之火 Anguished Flame
Anguished Flame.publicNotes: 古老的传说讲述，元素领主奥特雷亚（Atreia）创造了他的六翼子嗣，以将凡人的祈祷引渡至它的神域。这些元素生物与天族及魔族的神仆携手合作，接受祭品与供奉；同时，它们也会赐予悔过的凡人以赦免与净化，帮助他们改变死后注定的命运。

Eternal Luminosity.name: 永恒光辉 Eternal Luminosity
Eternal Luminosity.description: 痛苦之火会自然地散发出如火炬般明亮的光亮。当其他生物以痛苦之火为目标时，会自动忽视黑暗、浓雾、薄雾或烟尘而导致的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]状态。

Purifying Flame.name: 净化之火 Purifying Flame
Purifying Flame.description: 痛苦之火可以在没有医疗工具包的情况下进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]动作。它们会用自身温柔的光辉触碰伤者，以此进行治疗。

Solar Flare.name: 太阳耀斑 Solar Flare
Solar Flare.description: 30尺。当一个生物在该灵光范围内结束其回合时，会受到@Damage[2d6[fire]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:dazzled]豁免）。豁免失败时，该生物还会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]，直至其下一回合结束。痛苦之火可以使用一个带有专注特征的单动作来开启或关闭此灵光。

Vulnerable to Blasphemy.name: 亵渎弱点 Vulnerable to Blasphemy
Vulnerable to Blasphemy.description: 若一个痛苦之火能够看见并听见的生物，花费1个带有语言特征的动作对诸神进行亵渎，则痛苦之火会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}，直至它从该生物处收集到一次祈祷为止。

Collect Prayer.name: 收集祈祷 Collect Prayer
Collect Prayer.description:
痛苦之火强制一名它能看见的、距离不超过60尺的生物进行检定，该生物必须尝试一次@Check[will|dc:30|options:inflicts:slowed]豁免。

大成功 生物不受影响。

成功 该生物立即使用其反应进行祈祷。

失败 该生物进行祈祷，并且在1分钟内陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}且无法使用反应动作。

大失败 效果同失败，但该生物陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}。

Focus Gaze.name: 凝视焦点 Focus Gaze
Focus Gaze.description:
需求 痛苦之火的太阳耀斑灵光处于启动状态

效果 痛苦之火将其燃烧的双目锁定在一只它能看见的、距离不超过30尺的生物身上。目标必须立即对痛苦之火的太阳耀斑能力进行一次强韧豁免。若该生物在尝试豁免前已因太阳耀斑而@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]，则豁免失败会导致它在下一回合结束前陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]。

Lampad.name: 冥灯仙女 Lampad
Lampad.publicNotes:
冥灯仙女守护着地底晦暗无光的隐匿之所。她们不仅保护地下洞穴免受威胁，也同样保护善意的无辜者免遭潜藏在地表之下的危险。冥灯之名源于她们常携一缕魔法之光，指引迷途之人前往安全之所，引诱威胁之物通向破灭之地。冥灯仙女反复无常的天性使得她们反应难以被预测，不过她们极少会在受到充分的挑衅前显露明显的恶意。

宁芙是守护着大自然的精类，拥有着极致的美丽和形态，融汇了令人惊叹的类人特征与她们所守护的自然元素。宁芙仙后是拥有强大力量的宁芙，统治并且守护着更为广袤的未被染指的原始荒野。例如，一位冥灯仙女可能守护着一个美丽的地下洞穴，而一名冥灯仙后则会将整个洞穴系统称为自己的领土。

Cavern Dependent.name: 洞窟依存 Cavern Dependent
Cavern Dependent.description:
冥灯仙女与一个特定的洞窟或是其他独立的地底区域有着神秘的关联，并且必须待在其300尺范围内。

如果她移动超出了这个范围，她将会变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}，且无法移除此状态。她必须每小时都尝试通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:19]豁免，否则恶心的状态值将增加1（最高值恶心4）。

24小时后，她将变为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}，并且此状态值每24小时增加1点。一名冥灯仙女可以进行一个耗时24小时的仪式将自己与一个新的洞窟建立关联。

Weep.name: 悲泣 Weep
Weep.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 冥灯仙女开始一阵揪心的悲泣，引起附近生物共情的抽噎。每一名@Template[emanation|distance:30]范围内听见冥灯仙女悲泣的非冥灯仙女生物必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:20]豁免，否则将会因为不由自主的抽泣而在1轮内无法使用反应动作并且在其下一轮陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。

Shade (Boneyard).name: 残影（骨园） Shade (Boneyard)
Shade (Boneyard).publicNotes:
死者的外观看上去像是生前物种的活化骨架

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

Planar Incarnation - Boneyard (The Dead).name: 骨园位面塑形（死者） Planar Incarnation - Boneyard (The Dead)
Planar Incarnation - Boneyard (The Dead).description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

骨园 Boneyard（"死者" the Dead） 死者的外观看上去像是生前物种的活化骨架

  • 语言 招魂语
  • 额外能力 穿刺和挥砍抗力3
  • 近战 爪抓+7，伤害 1d8+2挥砍

Jotunborn Sage.name: 巨人裔贤者 Jotunborn Sage
Jotunborn Sage.publicNotes:
巨人裔是体型庞大的类人生物，与泰坦等远古巨人有着间接的渊源。在古代，巨人裔曾作为守望者侍奉诸神，守护新生的世界。他们居住在一处位于物质宇宙与灵界之间的被称为 "纷争界"（the Fray）的子位面（sub-planar），并在必要时现身，以照料他们所守护的世界。这些位面关联赋予了巨人裔独特的能力，包括在位面间穿梭以及塑造宇宙的实体形态。如今，许多巨人裔的位面能力已经衰退或紊乱，使得他们在凡间宇宙中变得更加常见。

巨人裔原本的力量随着时间的推移而减弱。这个曾经能够进行超远距离传送或重塑山脉的族群，如今只剩下微弱的法术能力。然而，这些能力仍有可能恢复力量——通常是在巨人裔随着年龄增长、与位面能量更加协调，或是将更多伊芙拉尔（Iivlars）的丝线织入皮肤时。技艺特别精湛的巨人裔法师或战士，能够施展与其祖先相匹敌的壮举。

生活在物质宇宙中的巨人裔倾向于隐居。由于体型庞大和肤色的原因，许多其他种族常将巨人裔与霜巨人（frost giants）或云巨人（cloud giants）混淆。这种误解往往会导致恐惧或敌意，而大多数巨人裔都宁愿避开这种反应。由于在"纷争界"中生存艰难，许多巨人裔对信任之人表现出极高的忠诚度。这种忠诚不仅维系着同胞的生存，也会延伸到任何与巨人裔建立友谊的人身上。

在巨人裔社会中，贤者是知识的守护者。他们记载着氏族乃至整个文明的历史。他们的编织纹路往往沿着眼部和耳部延伸，象征着他们卓越的观察力与渊博的学识。

Iivlar Weaving.name: 伊芙拉尔编织 Iivlar Weaving
Iivlar Weaving.description: 贤者将位面丝线编织进了自己的皮肤。这些丝线会在其@Template[type:emanation|distance:10]范围内散发昏暗光照。他可以使用维持动作，用来熄灭、重新启动该光照，或调整其颜色。

Plane-Hopper Dash.name: 位面跃迁疾冲 Plane-Hopper Dash
Plane-Hopper Dash.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 巨人裔贤者通过在位面边界间快速穿梭来缩短行程。贤者行走，此次移动不会触发反应动作。一旦行走完成，贤者在其下一回合开始前，其速度获得+5尺状态加值。

Kadamel.name: 卡达谬 Kadamel
Kadamel.publicNotes: 魔族在诸界播散腐败——凡其恶行所及之处，凡人国度无不沦陷。卡达谬（Kadamel）镇守着至关紧要的通路与圣所。他们对诸界通路的永恒守望不为任何外物所扰。他们最重要的使命把持位面界门，除非那些强如半神的魔族亲至，否则任何邪物都不得从其镇守之处通过。这类圣使寡言少动，几乎不对试图接近的凡人作任何回应，但他们同样乐于接受一切助力，以击退入侵的邪魔恶徒。即便如此，他们也只会报以捉摸不透的颔首，表示领受凡人的好意。

Stone Shield.name: 顽石护体 Stone Shield
Stone Shield.description: 卡达谬创造一面石盾作为防御掩体，其赋予AC+2环境加值，并且拥有硬度15，HP120，BT60。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Archon's Protection.name: 圣使护卫 Archon's Protection
Archon's Protection.description:
触发 一个敌人伤害圣使的盟友，且该敌人和该盟友皆距离圣使15尺内

效果 该盟友在对抗触发伤害时获得对全部伤害类型的20点抗力，圣使可对触发本能力的敌人进行一次打击。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.JZVSXgzu52tJGO6D]

Patience of Stone.name: 顽石耐性 Patience of Stone
Patience of Stone.description: 10尺。任何在灵光内结束回合的敌人必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:36|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。若该生物豁免成功，其在24小时内临时免疫。

Calcifying Cloud.name: 钙质化云 Calcifying Cloud
Calcifying Cloud.description:
需求 卡达谬的上一个动作是用石斧打击并命中

效果 卡达谬的石斧爆裂为一片钙质粉尘。被石斧命中的生物，以及以其为中心@Template[type:emanation|distance:5]内的所有非圣使生物必须成功通过一次@Check[fortitude|dc:38|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:petrified]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。若其已经由于卡达谬的能力而陷入缓慢，则改为令其永久@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{石化 Petrified}。

Guardian Glyph.name: 卫戍刻文 Guardian Glyph
Guardian Glyph.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 卡达谬向其躯体上的魔符中灌注一道8环级法术，从@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.sX2o0HH4RjJDAZ8C]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.A16eFTRh82xIjMu8]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hVU9msO9yGkxKZ3J]以及@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XZE4BawIlTf88Yl9]中选择。在储存所选法术期间，卡达谬选择一片自己守护的区域，通常是某位面传送门所在地。当有闯入者进入所选区域时，储存法术将被自动施放并消耗。若该法术具有目标，则会以触发生物为目标。若有区域，则该区域以触发生物为中心。感知到刻文的存在需要一次@Check[perception|dc:38]检定。刻文持续时间无限，但会在卡达谬再次使用本能力或主动解消时失效。

Re-Arm.name: 重整武装 Re-Arm
Re-Arm.description: 卡达谬在一只空手中显化出一柄石斧或一面石盾。

Statue.name: 化为雕塑 Statue
Statue.description: 直到下次主动行动之前，卡达谬伪装成一具雕塑。其在欺骗检定中自动得到50作为结果，同时欺骗相关DC也为50。当以此法静滞不动时，卡达谬获得快速治疗20。

Kadamel.allSaves: +1 status to all saves vs. magic

Einherji.name: 英灵 Einherji
Einherji.publicNotes:
英灵是由女武神从那些在惨烈而传奇的战斗中阵亡的战士中选拔出来的强大战士。毫不留情的英灵由最伟大战士的灵魂锻造而成，作为万神殿的步兵，精通近身战斗与杀死怪物。

英灵多源自武士文化，包括乌尔芬维京（如本条目所示的英灵），来自镣铐群岛的凶悍海盗，甚至还有奥斯里昂的征服者。他们从被战争与力量主宰的任何地方被选中，许多将战斗的召唤与追求肉体力量奉为比善恶观更神圣的神祇，都可能将英灵战士和收殓战死者的女武神视为其选定的神仆。例如，古拉姆、贝丝玛拉和塞赫麦特都曾将陨落的信徒拔擢为英灵。效忠不同神祇的英灵常根据所侍奉神明的偏好武器及其战死之地，配备相应武器或呈现独特外貌；但他们都坚毅不屈，冷酷无情，高效致命。使用双手武器或出身其他背景的英灵，往往以不同的能力替代"巨人杀手"与"瞬间修理"。

+4 to Will Saves vs. Fear.name: 对抗恐惧的意志豁免+4 +4 to Will Saves vs. Fear

Raise a Shield.name: 举起盾牌 Raise a Shield
Raise a Shield.description:
需求 你正持握盾牌。

你举起盾牌保护自己。当你举起盾牌时，你将盾牌所列的环境加值添加到自己的AC上。你的盾牌会一直保持举起直到你的下一回合开始。

Reactive Strike.name: 反应打击 Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
触发 你触及范围内的一个生物使用操作或移动动作，进行远程攻击，或者使用移动动作时离开一个方格。

你攻击露出破绽的敌人。对触发此动作的目标进行一次近战打击。如果该攻击为重击，并且触发此动作的是一个操作动作，则打断此动作。这次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，你的多重攻击减值也不应用于此次打击。

Challenge Foe.name: 挑战敌人 Challenge Foe
Challenge Foe.description:
英灵向他能看见的一名生物发起单挑，尝试对目标@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]。

该目标持续成为英灵的敌人，直至被击败，逃跑或遭遇结束。英灵对指定的敌人造成的伤害获得等同于其武器伤害骰数量的环境加值，但对其他生物造成的伤害则承受等量的环境减值。

如果英灵被其挑战的敌人击败，耻辱将使其丧失使用神卫虔诚法术的能力，持续1周或直至再次挑战同一敌人并获胜，以先满足者为准。

Instant Repair.name: 瞬间修理 Instant Repair
Instant Repair.description: 英灵@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]其盾牌。如果盾牌被摧毁，他不能使用此能力。

Jotun Slayer.name: 巨人杀手 Jotun Slayer
Jotun Slayer.description: 英灵在对抗巨人或至少比英灵大两个体型的生物时，伤害掷骰获得+4环境加值。

Cinder Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: 成年灰烬龙施法者 Cinder Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)
Cinder Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 在所有龙类之中，灰烬龙体型最为庞大，亦是最为凶猛的种类之一。它们通常性情暴躁易怒，要求他者给予敬畏——乃至臣服。灰烬龙的外貌正如其体内的烈焰，鳞片上常呈现红、橙、黄交错的火焰纹理。许多灰烬龙居住在活火山或其他同样炽热的地域之中。它们偏爱那些能承受高温的宝藏，因此宝石、黄金与白银常见于其囤积的财宝中。

Smoke Vision.name: 烟雾视觉 Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description: 烟雾不会妨碍灰烬龙的视觉；它能无视由烟雾造成的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]状态。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal.name: 对抗原能的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal

Boiling Blood.name: 沸血 Boiling Blood
Boiling Blood.description:
触发 灰烬龙被一次近战攻击重击

效果 灰烬龙的高热之血飞溅至攻击者。该目标受到@Damage[8d6[fire]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:34|basic]豁免）。

Reactive Strike (Jaws only).name: 反应打击（仅颚咬） Reactive Strike (Jaws only)

Pyre Breath.name: 烈焰吐息 Pyre Breath
Pyre Breath.description: 灰烬龙喷吐出一股灼热烈焰，在@Template[type:cone|distance:50]范围内造成@Damage[13d6[fire]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:34|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。豁免大失败的生物会着火，受到@Damage[2d6[persistent,fire]]伤害。随后该区域被黑烟笼罩1分钟，效果与薄雾相同，但仅覆盖该锥形区域。灰烬龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Pyre Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用烈焰吐息。

Stoke the Flames.name: 煽燃烈焰 Stoke the Flames
Stoke the Flames.description: 灰烬龙激化周围的火势。所有在60尺范围内并正承受持续火焰伤害的敌人，额外受到@Damage[4d6[fire]]伤害。

Giant Frog.name: Giant Frog
Giant Frog.publicNotes:
Giant frogs can grow up to 6 feet long and weigh over 200 pounds, with rows of razor-sharp teeth lining their gaping mouths.

Frogs that are poisonous or grow to monstrous size can be a menace to adventurers.

Sticky Feet.name: Sticky Feet
Sticky Feet.description: Giant frogs are not off-guard when @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balancing} on a narrow surface, and they gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves to avoid falling.

Tongue Grab.name: Tongue Grab
Tongue Grab.description: A creature hit by the giant frog's tongue becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} by the giant frog. The creature isn't @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, but it can't move beyond the reach of the frog's tongue. A creature can sever the tongue with a Strike against AC 13 that deals at least 2 slashing damage. This deals no damage to the frog but prevents it from using its tongue Strike until it regrows its tongue, which takes a week.

Wemmuth.name: 血棘藤 Wemmuth
Wemmuth.publicNotes:
在血流成河的战场或被围困的城市周围饱受战争摧残的地区里，大量的鲜血浇灌了血棘藤，这是一种肮脏的蔓藤，从人类的苦难中汲取养分，像吸水一样吸收血液。血棘藤拥有基本的智能和无法抑制的嗜血欲望，它们一生大部分时间都在伺机而动，在它们恐怖家园的血腥土壤中成长到令人难以置信的规模。血棘藤的藤蔓几乎只有普通麻绳粗细，但是成年的血棘藤拥有重达6吨重的藤蔓，把这些藤蔓拉直以后能达到6000尺长。然而血棘藤并不会把自己拉这么长，相反的是它们更喜欢将自己缩成一个15尺见方的巨大土丘。它会把自己压缩成一个一个由锋利的刺和捆绑着的藤蔓组成的球体，就像一团可怕的、有大象那么大的风滚草。它们通常会从地上挖出巨大的石块或整棵树，然后将它们整合进滚动的躯体，用这些东西来增强防御能力，抵御不同形式的攻击，或者以令人恐惧的精准度将它们扔向远方的敌人。

一些人猜测，血棘藤本质是一种恶魔腐化，是由切利亚斯的斯戎家族（House Thrune of Cheliax）释放到格拉利昂的，也许是一种对抗对手的焦土战术。涅玛萨斯（Nirmathas）和摩尔苏恩（Molthune）的具有影响力的贵族们都指责对方创造出了这种怪物，涅玛萨斯认为摩尔苏恩和炼狱帝国切利亚斯（Cheliax）关系密切，而摩尔苏恩则把怪物诞生的原因归咎于涅玛萨斯众多德鲁伊和游侠所使用的的原能魔法。有几个瓦瑞希亚（Varisian）传说中的怪物和血棘藤的描述非常相似，这些故事直指一个著名的江湖骗子，而来自蒙蒂维（Mendev）的十字军坚持认为，血棘藤是前飞蝗寄主德斯卡利（Deskari）在被凡人英雄击败之前对格拉利昂释放的祸害。

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 震颤感知（模糊） 60尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet

Blood Leech.name: 吸血 Blood Leech
Blood Leech.description:
触发 血棘藤对一个生物使用紧勒并造成伤害

效果 血棘藤恢复等同于紧勒伤害的一半的生命值。

Thorny Mass.name: 荆棘缠身 Thorny Mass
Thorny Mass.description: 任何时候，当血棘藤10尺范围内的一个生物尝试对它进行一次近战攻击或尝试使用特技以@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]穿过它占据的空间时，该生物受到@Damage[(1d12+10)[piercing]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic]豁免）。

Myceloid.name: Myceloid
Myceloid.publicNotes:
The ambulatory fungus creatures called myceloids are notorious for spreading deadly purple pox, controlling creatures' minds, and devouring humanoid flesh. For a myceloid colony, any battle with humanoids is cause for excitement, as this new fodder presents so many delicious possibilities.

Myceloids consider humanoids to have an ideal life cycle of four simple steps. During childhood, they wander naive and afraid, unaware of myceloid colonies. In adulthood, humanoids discover their true purpose as they taste purple pox and become enslaved by the myceloids' spores. Next, they die, giving rise to a new myceloid. They're then sent on to the afterlife upon becoming a myceloid meal. Eating humanoid flesh is not a necessity-a myceloid can survive on any decaying matter-but it's certainly a pleasure.

Myceloids rarely make alliances, but when they do, they invite their new allies to share a meal to seal the pact. Few outsiders appreciate this hospitality.

Most myceloids have deep purple caps studded with off-white lumps. Their necks and bodies bear resemblance to the stipes of tough, leathery fungi. Smaller mushrooms often grow on a myceloid's body, which the creatures view as either adornments or particularly convenient snacks. They stand roughly as tall as a dwarf, with comparably stout builds.

Telepathy 100 feet (Myceloids and Those.name: Telepathy 100 feet (Myceloids and Those Afflicted by Purple Pox Only)

Spore Pop.name: Spore Pop
Spore Pop.description: If a myceloid is reduced to 0 HP by a critical hit, it pops, forcing it to immediately Emit Spores, even if it has already used the ability that day.

Emit Spores.name: Emit Spores
Emit Spores.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The myceloid expels spores in a @Template[burst|distance:10] centered on a corner of its own space. This cloud lasts until the start of the myceloid's next turn. Each creature that is in the cloud or enters it is exposed to purple pox.

Purple Pox.name: Purple Pox
Purple Pox.description:
Myceloids are immune

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Onset 1 minute

Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 day)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3}, and the creature is compelled to seek out the nearest myceloid colony-this compulsion is a mental emotion effect (1 day)

Stage 3 The creature dies. Over 24 hours, its corpse becomes bloated and bursts, releasing a new, fully grown myceloid.

Spore Domination.name: Spore Domination
Spore Domination.description:
The myceloid targets one creature affected by purple pox within 60 feet. That creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22] save.

It is then temporarily immune to spore domination for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success Until the end of its next turn, the target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{Helpful} to myceloids and can't take hostile actions against them.

Failure As success, but for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As success, but until the purple pox is cured.

Fen Mosquito Swarm.name: Fen Mosquito Swarm
Fen Mosquito Swarm.publicNotes: When deadly fen mosquitoes gather in large numbers, they form into lethal swarms capable of draining blood at a truly alarming rate. Fen mosquito swarms are typically encountered only in tropical swamps or bogs, but during humid months in spring or summer they can drift into riverine areas or even through the waterfront reaches of settlements.

Pyrexic Malaria.name: Pyrexic Malaria
Pyrexic Malaria.description:
The victim can't reduce its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition while it's affected by pyrexic malaria

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Onset 4 days

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 5 dead

Swarming Bites.name: Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[1d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic|options:area-effect] save) and is exposed to pyrexic malaria. Creatures that fail the saving throw also take @Damage[1d4[bleed]].

Urdefhan Tormentor.name: Urdefhan Tormentor
Urdefhan Tormentor.publicNotes:
Urdefhan spellcasters with a knack for the divine are invariably unholy worshippers of daemonkind, typically taking on one of Abaddon's Four Apocalypse Riders as their patron deity. With their unholy gifts, these urdefhan tormentors summon daemons into battle and bolster their allies with profane magic, preferring to stick to the sidelines rather than enter the fray directly.

The violent warmongers, occultists, and poisoners known as urdefhans dwell within the Darklands. They were created in eons past by the mysterious First Apocalypse Riders to serve as agents of the end times of the Universe. Urdefhans continue to honor their creators by worshipping the wretched beings who rule over the plane of Abaddon, and like their fiendish lieges, urdefhans exist for one reason and one reason alone: to kill.

While urdefhans are humanoid and dwell together in large groups, this is where their similarities to other ancestries end. Their visages are horrific, with transparent skin and musculature displaying their glistening entrails, gleaming bones, and perhaps worst of all, their baleful red eyes. This appearance, combined with their gaping maws full of sharp fangs, works to create the false impression that urdefhan are some sort of vampiric undead, not creatures of living flesh and blood. When an urdefhan's life comes to an end, their flesh quickly curdles and then bursts in a wave of awful corruption that spreads to the flesh of other creatures in the area. The typical urdefhan views their eventual demise as a disappointment, for once they're dead, their chances to kill will finally come to an end.

An urdefhan's translucent body allows onlookers to see the various organs and fluids within, while their blue blood often signals their mood and telegraphs possible dangers. The blood of an excited urdefhan ready to attack grows more vibrant and even glows with a faint light. When an urdefhan is prepared to meet their death and imminent soul detonation, their blood grows dark, almost black as pitch.

Urdefhans' primary concern is death and how to inflict it in the goriest, most painful, and widespread ways. Beyond this ethos of violence, urdefhans concern themselves only tangentially with matters such as formal modes of warfare or aspects of their damnable religion. When an urdefhan isn't actively engaged in violence, their giddy cruelty is tempered by only a sense of self-preservation that ensures they survive long enough to spread the "blessings" of their daemonic patrons. They pass the time between wars inventing new weapons, developing new diseases, and researching awful new magic, all in preparation for the next inevitable conflict.

Necrotic Decay.name: Necrotic Decay
Necrotic Decay.description: When an urdefhan dies, their translucent flesh quickly rots away and sublimates into a foul-smelling gas that fills a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] around the body. This gas deals @Damage[5d6[void]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in this area as their flesh curdles and rots (@Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] save).

Stoke the Fervent.name: Stoke the Fervent
Stoke the Fervent.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The urdefhan lets out a battle cry, sending themself and their allies into a fanatical frenzy. The tormentor and each ally that hears the call gains a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, and saving throws, and takes a –1 status penalty to AC. Affected creatures must use at least one of their actions to Strike each round, if they're able (even if it means attacking an ally, object, or thin air). This lasts for [[/gmr 2d4 #rounds]]{2d4 rounds}.

Wicked Bite.name: Wicked Bite
Wicked Bite.description:
Requirements The urdefhan damaged a creature with a jaws Strike on their last action

Effect The urdefhan maintains contact, turning the creature's flesh translucent around the site of the injury. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:22] save or be affected by drain blood or drain vitality (the urdefhan's choice). If the jaws Strike was a critical hit, the creature is affected by both effects, using the same save result for both.

  • Drain Blood The urdefhan drinks some of the creature's blood. On a failed save, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and the urdefhan regains 5 HP (or, on a critical failure, it's @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} and the urdefhan regains 10 HP).

  • Drain Vitality The urdefhan draws out some of the creature's vital essence. The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 hour on a failed save (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 hour on a critical failure).

Strix Kinmate.name: 枭鬼盟亲 Strix Kinmate
Strix Kinmate.publicNotes:
盟亲之间有着深厚的羁绊，并且极擅长团队协作。

枭鬼在自己的语言中被称为"伊塔瑞"（itarii），他们是一种有着鸟类特征的类人生物，生有宽长的黑色羽翼与尖锐的利爪。枭鬼们长有棱角分明的五官，其锐利的双目始终固定向前。

Arrows.name: 箭 Arrows
Arrows.description: 这些箭头是弓的弹药。箭杆是木制的。一端是羽毛保持飞行中的平稳，另一端是金属头。

Strix Camaraderie.name: 枭鬼情谊 Strix Camaraderie
Strix Camaraderie.description: 枭鬼盟亲之间有着很深的联系，因而善于团队合作，以支援彼此的进攻。若敌人同时位于该枭鬼盟亲以及其它枭鬼的触及范围之内，那么该敌人对所有这些枭鬼@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

Strix Vengeance.name: 枭鬼回头 Strix Vengeance
Strix Vengeance.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

触发 枭鬼盟亲或一位他们所能看见的枭鬼盟友因一名敌人的重击而承受伤害

效果 在枭鬼盟亲的下一个回合结束前，枭鬼盟亲对触发敌人所进行的打击的伤害骰，获得额外1d6状态加值。

Shokasura.name: 苦谛修罗 Shokasura
Shokasura.publicNotes: 苦谛修罗是悲惨、可怜的存在，因对残酷现实的绝望而心碎。他们中的许多人原本并非阿修罗，而是其他灵体，他们意识到自己所有的努力都只是在延续一个不公且无可救药的世界。他们不愿承认腐朽已如此之深，也不愿彻底放弃曾经珍视的一切，于是苦谛修罗不断考验凡人，迫使他们证明自己，拼命试图让自己相信，在当下的境遇中仍有值得拯救的人和事。然而这些尝试最终都以灾难收场，要么凡人无法达到苦谛修罗那不可能实现的期望，要么苦谛修罗对所选凡人的考验将其毁灭。

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
苦谛修罗的外形会变成一个小型类人生物。这不会改变苦谛修罗的速度 ，也不会改变其攻击和伤害加值，但可能会改变其攻击造成的伤害类型（通常是钝击）。苦谛修罗变身后通常会失去其棘刺攻击，除非类人形态有类似的徒手攻击。这种变形具有特定且持久的外观，苦谛修罗可以通过进行一小时的仪式来改变外观。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Grieving Venom.name: 苦毒 Grieving Venom
Grieving Venom.description:
豁免骰 @Check[will|dc:17]

最大持续时间 4轮

阶段1 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}（1轮）

阶段2 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}（1轮）

阶段3 @Damage[1d4[poison]]伤害，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，且生物无法使用反应动作（1轮）

Raven Swarm.name: Raven Swarm
Raven Swarm.publicNotes:
A flock of ravens is known as an unkindness. Certainly, the name lives up to its meaning when a swarm of ravens decides to work together. In most cases, a raven swarm like the one presented here won't attack larger foes, but when manipulated by supernatural forces or simple desperation born from hunger, an unkindness of ravens can be a surprisingly dangerous threat.

Few birds are as cunning and social as the raven.

Enraged Cunning.name: Enraged Cunning
Enraged Cunning.description: There are few things as dangerously persistent in the natural world as an angry unkindness of ravens. A raven swarm can hound its prey through most barriers. Simple latches, unsecured chimney flues, loosely shuttered windows, and similar obstacles rarely keep an unkindness away. A raven swarm attempts a Thievery check to bypass many of these simple obstructions, typically against DC 20.

Swarming Beaks.name: Swarming Beaks
Swarming Beaks.description: The ravens' angry pecking deals @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage to each enemy in the swarm's space (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). A creature that critically fails its save is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} as the ravens focus their attacks on the target's vulnerable face.

Hippopotamus.name: Hippopotamus
Hippopotamus.publicNotes:
Typical adult hippos move quickly on land and attack stealthily in the water.

Hippopotamuses, or hippos for short, are semiaquatic animals that spend most of their time in rivers and lakes, but can thrive on land.

Deep Breath.name: 深呼吸 Deep Breath
Deep Breath.description: The hippopotamus can hold its breath for 5 minutes.

Capsize.name: Capsize
Capsize.description: The hippopotamus tries to capsize an adjacent aquatic vessel of its size or smaller. The hippopotamus must succeed at an Athletics check with a DC of 25 (reduced by 5 for each size smaller the vessel is than the hippo) or the pilot's Sailing Lore DC, whichever is higher.

Grisantian Lion.name: 耀阳嗣狮 Grisantian Lion
Grisantian Lion.publicNotes:
耀阳狮的出现是一代人才会遇见一次的大事，但那头传奇生物的后裔在世界之脊山脉和整个塔尔多都很有名。这些原能魔兽不像普通狮子那样成群结队。相反，它们会避开同类，甚至连交配也不例外。它们大约每年一次为了繁衍而寻找普通狮子。产下幼崽的耀阳嗣狮只会哺育并照料后代到其能够自给自足为止——由于它们的成长与发育极其迅速，这通常只需数个月。

完全长大的耀阳嗣狮像大象一样大，且极具攻击性，会猎杀任何遇到的东西。普通狮子依靠隐秘和群体战术来获取食物，而耀阳嗣狮体型过于庞大，无法藏身于高草之中。它转而适应了山地环境：它会选择一处巨大且难以抵达的洞穴作为巢穴，并从任何不幸已占据此地的生物手中夺下它。耀阳嗣狮是狡黠的猎人，能够追踪数英里；接近猎物时，它会贴着岩壁与突出的岩脊前行，以此遮掩自身。接近到足够距离后，它便猛扑而上，撕开猎物的护甲，并将其中的血肉撕碎。若遭到威胁，耀阳嗣狮会将猎物叼入口中，纵身跃起，攀上附近的峭壁并撤回巢穴。

虽然它们是永远无法驯服的野生生物，但耀阳嗣狮懂得塔尔多语，并偶尔同意帮助那些守护自然之人。不过，这样的同盟至多只是暂时的，且即便在最好的情况下也谈不上可靠。

Blinding Mane.name: 炫目鬃毛 Blinding Mane
Blinding Mane.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 借助其耀阳狮祖先的力量，耀阳嗣狮集中精力，使其鬃毛发出明亮光照。20尺内的所有生物必须尝试一次@Check[fortitude|dc:29]豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响

成功 目标直到其下个回合开始前@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]

失败 目标目盲1分钟

大失败 目标永久目盲

Dual Pounce.name: 双重猛扑 Dual Pounce
Dual Pounce.description: 耀阳嗣狮行走，并在移动结束时对同一生物进行两次爪打击。每次攻击都计入耀阳嗣狮的多重攻击减值，但在两次攻击都完成之前，减值不会增加。如果两次攻击都命中，计算抗力和弱点时将伤害合计。

Rend.name: 撕裂 Rend
Rend.description:
爪击。

如果耀阳嗣狮在成功的双重猛扑后使用撕裂，将撕裂的伤害与双重猛扑的伤害合并计算抗力和弱点。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Rend]

Vicious Rend.name: 恶毒撕裂 Vicious Rend
Vicious Rend.description:
触发 耀阳嗣狮使用撕裂

效果 目标的护甲受到等于撕裂伤害的伤害。目标可以尝试@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic]豁免来减少此伤害。

Girtablilu Seer.name: 蝎人先知 Girtablilu Seer
Girtablilu Seer.publicNotes:
蝎人聚落中最高权威的职位是该群体的宗教领袖。这项神圣职责需要经年累月的研习、冥想与奉献，方能唤醒蝎人体内神秘的神术魔法源泉。这些先知确保族群的每项行动都符合传统中最晦涩的教条，对于违背其指令的同族成员，他们毫不犹豫地施以雷霆之怒。

蝎人是栖息于沙漠的守护者，上半身为肌肉发达的人形生物，下半身为巨型蝎子。他们最常被发现以狂热的执着守护着古老神庙与宗教圣物。有人认为他们是数千年前由一位早已逝去的神祇所创造的守护者，但蝎人视自身起源为禁忌话题，拒绝讨论此类理论。

由于蝎人包容多种宗教与信仰体系，某些外族人认为他们同样崇拜着自身古老的神系。事实上，蝎人心致志地敬奉并守护着那些献给那些在文明中已然失传之神的圣地。通过这种方式，他们成为守护者——守护着那些本应在沙漠流沙之下永世沉寂的圣洁仪式。

尽管蝎人对探险者企图闯入其守护之地习以为常，但他们或许会接纳那些真心求知或怀有虔敬之心的访客。有些甚至会自豪地向他人宣扬自己的信仰，渴望获得向新信徒布道的机会。然而，对于企图亵渎他们崇拜的圣地与圣物之人，或是违背其信仰教义者，他们绝不手下留情。

蝎人是技艺精湛的战士，他们饲养受训的巨蝎作为宠物，在沙漠战斗中无人能敌。他们对食物和水的需求极少，凭借惊人的耐力拖垮敌人。必要时，他们能潜伏数日乃至数周追踪猎物，与宠物协同作战将猎物逼入死角。当敌人精疲力竭之际，鲜有人能抵挡蝎人强大体魄——或其致命毒液。

Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet.name: 震颤感知（模糊） 60尺 Tremorsense (Imprecise) 60 feet

Divine Aegis.name: 神术圣盾 Divine Aegis
Divine Aegis.description:
触发 蝎人先知尝试对魔法效果进行豁免但尚未掷骰

效果 先知召唤神术能量保护自身，代价是牺牲其他魔法防御。直到其下个回合开始，其在对抗非神术魔法效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值，在对抗神术效果的豁免上则承受-1环境减值。

Desert Passage.name: 沙漠穿行 Desert Passage
Desert Passage.description: 蝎人忽视沙漠中的天然困难地形。

Girtablilu Venom.name: 蝎人毒 Girtablilu Venom
Girtablilu Venom.description:
豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:30]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段1 @Damage[2d6[poison]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}（1轮）

阶段2 @Damage[3d6[poison]]伤害且力竭1（1轮）

阶段3 @Damage[3d6[poison]]伤害且@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}（1轮）

Spear Frog.name: Spear Frog
Spear Frog.publicNotes:
The spear frog is named for its toxin, which is traditionally used to envenom thrown projectiles like spears and daggers.

Frogs that are poisonous or grow to monstrous size can be a menace to adventurers.

Toxic Skin.name: Toxic Skin
Toxic Skin.description: Anytime a creature touches the spear frog or an adjacent creature Strikes the spear frog with a melee attack, that creature is exposed to spear frog venom.

Spear Frog Venom.name: Spear Frog Venom
Spear Frog Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Sticky Feet.name: Sticky Feet
Sticky Feet.description: Spear frogs are not @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} when Balancing on a narrow surface, and they gain a +4 circumstance bonus to Reflex saves to avoid falling.

Giant Jellyfish.name: Giant Jellyfish
Giant Jellyfish.publicNotes:
Unlike its smaller cousins, the giant jellyfish is an active predator that chases down its prey through reefs or open water. It can even squeeze its enormous bell-shaped body into the tight confines of shipwrecks to drape its mane of tentacles across the exposed flesh of its prey.

Many varieties of jellyfish drift through the world's oceans, feeding on fish and other tiny marine creatures. However, deadly species of monstrous jellyfish pose a threat to unwary swimmers and sailors alike. Note that while jellyfish are animals, they also have the mindless trait because they lack a centralized nervous system.

Jellyfish Venom.name: Jellyfish Venom
Jellyfish Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:25]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d10[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 round)

Squeeze.name: Squeeze
Squeeze.description: A giant jellyfish can fit into tight spaces as if it were a Medium creature. It can move at its full Speed while @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.kMcV8e5EZUxa6evt]{Squeezing}.

Hungry Ghost.name: 饥饿幽灵 Hungry Ghost
Hungry Ghost.publicNotes:
饥饿幽灵诞生自那些没有得到妥善安葬或坟墓被忽视的人。它们并不被束缚于一个特定的地点或物品，但却被强迫着抓住每个机会去做好事，希冀能获得青睐来帮助它们获得最终的安息。然而，它们以生命能量为食的需求往往与这一目标相冲突。

死后通过悬而未决的强大情感系于世间，如生前自我的悲伤回响一般，幽灵困扰着活人。

Living Visage.name: 生者假面 Living Visage
Living Visage.description: 当它们拥有超过30点生命值时，饥饿幽灵看上去就像一个活着的生物。它们在隐藏自己是不死生物时的欺骗检定结果和DC自动取34，并可以暗中使用以生为食（Feed on the Living）能力。

Feed on the Living.name: 以生为食 Feed on the Living
Feed on the Living.description:
饥饿幽灵触碰一个触及内的生物以偷走他的生命能量。如果幽魂正以生者假面示人，它们可以将此能力伪装成无害的接触并将效果延后1分钟，同时令目标不察觉此效果。一个生物一次只能受到一个延迟的以生为食能力影响，如果那个幽灵在延迟的一分钟内失去了生者假面，那么正在延迟的以生为食能力也会丢失。当以生为食生效时，目标受到@Damage[(2d8+4)[void]]伤害，取决于他们的@Check[fortitude|dc:24]豁免结果。

大成功 目标的生命能量压倒了幽灵。饥饿幽灵受到@Damage[5[vitality]]伤害，目标不受影响

成功 目标受到一半伤害，饥饿幽灵恢复等同于此能力造成伤害的HP

失败 目标受到全部伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}，持续1分钟。饥饿幽灵恢复等同于此能力造成伤害的HP

大失败 目标受到两倍伤害并获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}，持续1分钟。饥饿幽灵恢复等同于此能力造成伤害的HP

Ravenous Undoing.name: 贪饿毁灭 Ravenous Undoing
Ravenous Undoing.description: 每24小时内，饥饿幽灵必须使用以生为食（Feed on the Living）能力来吞食30HP（任何幽灵将会得到的HP都会计入这个数额，哪怕幽灵因为已经有了够多的生命值而未恢复生命）。如果幽灵没有吞食足够的HP，他们就会盲目而不计后果地吞噬任何它们遇到的生物，直到吃饱为止。

Rejuvenation.name: 复生 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description: 一旦被摧毁，饥饿幽灵在[[/gmr 2d4 #days]]{2d4天}后完全恢复，出现于它们最后一次被摧毁的地方。它们只有被妥善安葬，坟墓得到清理并维护至少一年，或者被法莱斯玛判定得到救赎时，它们才会被永久摧毁。

Ganzi Martial Artist.name: 混沌裔武术家 Ganzi Martial Artist
Ganzi Martial Artist.publicNotes:
原初混沌的子嗣，混沌裔将源自大漩涡（Maelstrom）的混乱与凡人生活中的世俗喧嚣交织在一起。部分人觉醒自祖上数代血脉所碰触到的大漩涡生物，而其他人则是由于创生彼岸上沸腾的位面摩擦所转变，不过这些所有人都在血与骨之间共享着混沌的本质。

由于混沌裔与大漩涡的联系，其外表可以说千变万化；最为常见的幻蛇之嗣拥有成片的鳞片和羽毛，以及灵活滑溜的尾巴。部分人可能会具有更加奇怪的特征，比如角、发光的橘色眼瞳、或者肢体闪烁着无害的熵能灵光。混沌裔可能比他们所具有血统的标准体格更矮、更高、更瘦弱或更壮实，对于他们来说，被误认为其他常见异界裔的情况也并不罕见。

混沌裔的独立思维达到了极端的程度，通常很有创造力但却反复无常，他们更喜欢那些能够让自己做主的职业。如果某个职业能够控制或迷惑格拉利昂那些更加稳重的居民，就更美好了。混沌裔经常得到因交际、离经叛道或追寻刺激而获取的名声，而其中很多人是真心热爱着这样的名声，进而向着这样的方向靠拢。在所有位面后裔中，混沌裔最有可能将流浪者当做自己的身份。

对近身战感兴趣的混沌裔有时会被武术所吸引，他们将自身那奇异的外貌转变为强大且让人意外的武器。被人临时雇佣对于混沌裔来说是常见的情况，这可能是由于他们都具有着类似的观念，或者单纯就是为了钱。不过通常来说，混沌裔武术家要么在街角展示武艺，要么会向着那些暴政的执行者伸张正义。

异界裔体内充盈着来自外环位面（Outer Planes）的不朽存在——比如天族、魔族和观察者——的本质。尽管本文介绍的那些传承能回溯至轴心枢纽（Axis）和大漩涡（Maelstrom）的异界裔是人类，但几乎任何族裔的成员在出生时都有可能混入大量类似的能量，从而成为位面后裔。更多关于异界裔的内容可以查阅《玩家核心》自78页起的页面，其他异界裔NPC的介绍则起始于《怪物核心》第266页。
Ganzi Martial Artist.allSaves: 对抗导致被控制状态的效果时全豁免+1状态加值

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Controlled Co.name: 对抗导致被控制状态的效果时全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Controlled Condition

Ganzi Resistance.name: 混沌裔抗力 Ganzi Resistance
Ganzi Resistance.description:
混沌裔获得酸蚀、电击或音波的1点抗力。（每日随机选择）

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.PFeGCDFOo2AjI6ib]

Ganzi Spells.name: 混沌裔法术 Ganzi Spells
Ganzi Spells.description:
每日使用[[/gmr 1d12 #Spell Selection]]随机从后述法术中选择2项

  1. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9h9YCncqah6VNsKf]
  2. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.3JG1t3T4mWn6vTke]
  3. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2qGqa33E4GPUCbMV]
  4. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.2oH5IufzdESuYxat]
  5. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]
  6. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.tlSE7Ly8vi1Dgddv]
  7. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzLkNU3AAqOSKFPR]
  8. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Mkbq9xlAUxHUHyR2]
  9. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Fr58LDSrbndgld9n]
  10. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]
  11. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.1xbFBQDRs0hT5xZ9]
  12. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.mrDi3v933gsmnw25]

Flurry of Kicks.name: 连环踢 Flurry of Kicks
Flurry of Kicks.description:
频率 每回合一次
