效果 混沌裔武术家作出2次近战打击。混沌裔武术家如常对这些打击应用多重攻击减值。

Handspring Kick.name: 前手翻踢击 Handspring Kick
Handspring Kick.description:
需求 混沌裔武术家双手都空着

效果 混沌裔武术家快步，然后以-1减值作出1次近战打击。

Procyal.name: Procyal
Procyal.publicNotes:
As the most whimsical and playful of the agathions, procyals are the most likely to be encountered in the Universe, teaching deep philosophical lessons and delivering wisdom through pranks and impersonations. Mischievous and playful, these raccoon-headed humanoids love to socialize with mortals and learn about their societies. Unlike their mortal counterparts, procyals' fur starts off dark russet in color, giving way to gray and white fecks on their muzzles as they grow older. Only procyal leaders boast the stark gray and black coloration of a true raccoon. Those who recognize procyals' age and wisdom treat these creatures with great respect.

Whatever their natural appearance, procyals make excellent shapeshifters and can assume the form of any humanoid that they've encountered. They use this ability for only the greater good of that humanoid or their community, often appearing as someone's trusted mentor to deliver an important message in a more laid-back fashion than talking to a magical celestial raccoon. They're not above playing the occasional harmless prank on the person whose form they've assumed, especially when they can use it to teach a valuable lesson. Raccoon agathions prefer to use a blade if forced into combat, but they're prepared to use their claws and fght dirty if necessary.

Change Shape.name: Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
The procyal can transform only into a specifc individual Small or Medium humanoid that they've met at least once. They can't transform into a generic member of a given ancestry.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Raccoon's Whimsy.name: Raccoon's Whimsy
Raccoon's Whimsy.description: Procyals' core value is whimsy, though unlike for chaotic tricksters, procyals' playful actions have a pattern and their pranks always come with a valuable lesson, even if it takes a long time to decipher the meaning. Receiving and growing from such a lesson requires at least 10 minutes of interaction with the Procyal but can take much longer. A character who learns from the procyal's lesson gains the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid} reaction from the procyal once during the next month. Afterwards, they become immune to this effect from all procyals.

Phasmadaemon.name: 魅影邪魔 Phasmadaemon
Phasmadaemon.publicNotes: 令人恐惧的魅影邪魔利用幻象以及自身令人胆寒的外形（长着骨质尾巴的蛇身、长着角的鳄鱼头颅以及几只昆虫般的钳子）来让他人感到恐惧。它们代表着因惊恐而死。临终之际，任何一种恐惧都可能导致魅影邪魔的诞生，但变成这种邪魔的灵魂必须迅速找到其他的恐惧来汲取养分以增强自身力量。没有人类恐惧的滋养，新生的魅影邪魔会开始消瘦，最终"死亡"并化为位面精粹。只有最聪明、最能干的魅影邪魔才能在最初的饥饿状态中存活下来，从而学会如何捕食哪怕是最勇敢的灵魂。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Unending Terror.name: 无尽恐惧 Unending Terror
Unending Terror.description: 逃离魅影邪魔的恐怖威压灵光并非易事。处于魅影邪魔恐怖威压灵光内的生物在其回合结束时不会自动降低其@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]状态值。作为替代，它们必须在回合结束时对造成惊惧状态的效果进行意志豁免，DC为该效果的DC。成功时，该生物的惊惧状态降低1。

Consume Fear.name: 吞噬恐惧 Consume Fear
Consume Fear.description:
需求 魅影邪魔使一个生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]

效果 魅影邪魔以该生物内心的恐惧及其不可避免的死亡为食，对其造成@Damage[6d8[mental]]伤害。该生物必须进行一次@Check[will|dc:38]豁免。

大成功 该生物不受伤害，并成功挣脱了魅影邪魔的擒获。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全额伤害，并使其惊惧状态增加1 ，最高至@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 4}。

大失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并使其惊惧状态增加2 ，最高至惊惧4。如果生物已经处于惊惧4，则必须进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:38]豁免。如果失败，其生命值降至0并死亡。此效果具有死亡和失能特征。

Inescapable Form.name: 难逃之形 Inescapable Form
Inescapable Form.description: 魅影邪魔能够像小型生物一样挤过狭窄空间。在挤入时，它能以全速移动。魅影甚至能挤过通常只适合超小生物通过的空间，但速度为挤入的标准速度。

Worm Prophet.name: 蠕虫先知 Worm Prophet
Worm Prophet.publicNotes:
尽管他们坚信死后将与神明同住，临终之际，某些祭司仍会绝望地呼唤任何愿意倾听的神明。吞噬这些前祭司尸体的蠕虫吸收了他们的祷告，转变为蠕虫先知——一种虔诚的虫群行者，他们可能崇拜数百位神祇但却不将任何一位奉为守护神，他或许会收集数十种宗教神徽，或随意撕下各类宗教典籍的页面，将其重编成自相矛盾的新经文。这些生物常会摆脱生前束缚它们的典范与禁忌，转而贪婪地试图让他人改信其大杂烩般的信仰，要是受害者不愿意入教，蠕虫先知则会以吞噬他们的方式强行"灌输"信仰。只要情况合适，蠕虫先知通常会毫不犹豫地变化为集群形态。

所有的活物终将化作蠕虫的食粮。但倘若一个生物在死亡时正困于情感漩涡中，或是尚有未尽之事，他的躯体便会染上那股执念或是不愿逝去的意志，进而感染吞噬遗体的食腐者们。当这些无脊椎动物饱餐时，它们会觉醒出某种集体智慧，承载着逝者部分的记忆与动机。一旦尸骸被啃食殆尽，虫群便会聚拢缠绕，以千百具蠕动的躯体重塑亡者的形态。这些重生者被称为虫群行者。

尽管大部分虫群行者诞生自意外，极少数凡人通过强力仪式有意将自身转化为虫群行者。通常，此过程需精心准备一座坟墓，其中布满大量食腐生物，并以异能魔法附魔这块墓地，将举行仪式者的灵魂锚定于此，直至其能融入集群进而存续。这些有意想成为虫群行者的人，大多期望通过此等转变获得突破任何防御的力量，抑或是追求化作永远增殖的大群后带来的虚伪永生——毕竟，只要还有哪怕一条蠕虫存活，虫群行者就能重塑身躯。然而，此等转变必然会对该生物造成创伤，常常导致情感疏离、昔日的戒忌瓦解，以及自我意识在由一到千的转变期间产生的分裂。在转变后，即便是初衷最善良的虫群行者，也可能在漫长岁月里投入邪恶的怀抱，彻底丧失昔日的样貌。

Discorporate.name: 解体 Discorporate
Discorporate.description: 当蠕虫先知的HP降至0时，构成他的生物崩塌，散布在该生物原本占据的空间以及该生物曾经邻接的所有空间。只要有哪怕一只构成生物逃脱，蠕虫先知就可以在1d10天后重组（在无脊椎动物稀少的区域可能会更久）。要想永久摧毁蠕虫先知，必须在1回合内消灭散落的无脊椎生物。这些无脊椎生物共享HP池，其为40，且拥有与蠕虫先知相同的AC、豁免、免疫、抗性和弱点。它们无法使用动作，但在回合结束时会自动逃离。根据GM的裁定，一些巧妙地诱捕或消灭这些生物的手段，也能摧毁蠕虫先知。

A Thousand Mouths In Prayer.name: 千口同祷 A Thousand Mouths In Prayer
A Thousand Mouths In Prayer.description: 构成蠕虫先知的生物们齐声低吟着献给他们所信众神的颂歌。蠕虫先知尝试反制一个距离30尺内的生物身上的一个效果（反制调整值[[/gmr 1d20+24 #Counteract]]{+24}，反制等级6环级）；本能力可反制的效果为：@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]、持续伤害、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]。若反制成功，蠕虫先知在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge A Thousand Mouths In Prayer]]{1d4轮}后才能再次施展此能力。

Clinging Remnants.name: 黏附残虫 Clinging Remnants
Clinging Remnants.description: 蠕虫先知在进行近战打击、以及目标位于武器第一个射程增量内的远程打击时，会向目标投送咬人的害虫，造成@Damage[3d4[persistent,piercing]]伤害。

Draw Bugs.name: 吸引虫群 Draw Bugs
Draw Bugs.description: 蠕虫先知从周围环境中引来更多节肢动物，以修复受损的身体。他恢复@Damage[15]HP。根据GM的裁定，若这片区域内可召唤的节肢动物不足，蠕虫先知将无法恢复生命值。

Squirming Embrace.name: 蠕动拥抱 Squirming Embrace
Squirming Embrace.description: 蠕虫先知行走或掘地。若他们在与一个生物共享空间时停止行走，他对该生物造成@Damage[4d6[piercing]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:32|basic]豁免）。

Swarm Shape.name: 集群形态 Swarm Shape
Swarm Shape.description: 蠕虫先知崩解为由构成生物组成的无定形集群。其携带的物品全部掉落。此形态下，蠕虫先知无法使用攻击动作也无法施法，但可穿行于构成生物无需挤压即可通过的狭窄区域。他可使用相同动作从集群形态重新凝聚为正常形态。

Atrixyl.name: Atrixyl
Atrixyl.publicNotes:
Very rarely, when sinspawn (Monster Core 310) sacrifce sentient beings to runewells, instead of sinspawn, an altogether different sort of aberration is created. Atrixyls are insectile humanoid warriors, whose powers are similar to yet stronger than ordinary sinspawn, and who are dedicated to destroying runewells and similar feshwarping artifacts. Some atrixyls seek to destroy runewells due to an imprinting of pain and suffering that occurs during their creation, seeking to prevent future suffering from runewells. Others seek to break a runewell and tap into its magical energies to gain personal power. This relentless mission has earned them the epithet "runebreakers," and brings them into confict with the sinspawn whose existences depend upon these runewells.

Atrixyls traverse Golarion's ruined wastelands in search of both ancient runewells and more contemporary feshwarping facilities.

True Sin Scent.name: True Sin Scent
True Sin Scent.description: An atrixyl can smell creatures that refect or generally revel in any of the seven sins as defned by the ancient empire of Thassilon (envy, gluttony, greed, lust, pride, sloth, and wrath) within 60 feet as a precise sense and can also distinguish between diferent sins and creatures. These typically include sinspawn and certain demons, though the GM ultimately determines which creatures are appropriately sinful.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Spell Break.name: Spell Break
Spell Break.description:
Trigger The atrixyl critically succeeds on a saving throw

Effect The atrixyl shatters the portion of magic that would afect them and uses it to empower themself. The atrixyl gains temporary Hit Points equal to twice the triggering spell's rank and a +4 status bonus to damage rolls for 1 round.

Absorb Sin.name: Absorb Sin
Absorb Sin.description:
Trigger The atrixyl reduces a creature it can smell with its true sin scent to 0 Hit Points

Effect The atrixyl regains @Damage[6d6[healing]] Hit Points.

Change Shape.name: Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
The atrixyl takes on the appearance of any Medium humanoid. This doesn't change the atrixyl's Speed or their attack and damage modifers with their Strikes but might change the damage type their Strikes deal.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Insectile Agility.name: Insectile Agility
Insectile Agility.description: When the atrixyl Leaps, High Jumps, or Long Jumps, they can increase horizontal and vertical distances traveled by up to 10 feet. They also treat falls as 50 feet shorter.

Resonating Kick.name: Resonating Kick
Resonating Kick.description: The atrixyl makes a fist Strike. If the target is an aberration or is capable of casting spells from the arcane tradition, this attack deals an additional 2d12 force damage.

Roundhouse Smash.name: Roundhouse Smash
Roundhouse Smash.description: The atrixyl makes a fist Strike and compares the attack roll result to the AC of up to two foes, each of whom must be within the atrixyl's melee reach and adjacent to each other. Roll damage only once and apply it to each creature hit. This counts as two attacks for the atrixyl's multiple attack penalty.

Coral Dragon (Ancient).name: 古珊瑚龙 Coral Dragon (Ancient)
Coral Dragon (Ancient).publicNotes: 珊瑚龙是守护广袤海洋珊瑚礁的原始守护者，珊瑚礁遍布于格拉利昂的各大海洋中。即便在龙族中，珊瑚龙也因其傲慢与虚荣而尤为突出，它们为自己覆满珊瑚的鳞片和所保护的五彩斑斓的珊瑚礁而骄傲。珊瑚龙喜欢装饰它们的珊瑚礁，它们视这些珊瑚礁为巢穴，常常用美丽的物品装饰，偶尔也会加入一些贵重物品，如金币。那些寻求珊瑚龙宠爱的人常会发现，这些龙容易被奉承所打动，尤其是当奉承与闪亮或色彩鲜艳的礼物相结合时，这些礼物能与龙及其水下领域的璀璨美丽相得益彰。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal.name: 对抗原能的全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Primal

Biomineralize.name: 生物矿化 Biomineralize
Biomineralize.description:
触发 珊瑚龙被一个没有长触及特征的近战武器或无武装攻击重击，且该攻击造成挥砍或穿刺伤害

效果 珊瑚龙的伤口喷出一股血液，瞬间钙化为一根尖锐的珊瑚枝。珊瑚枝刺穿触发的生物，造成@Damage[8d6[piercing]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic]豁免）。豁免大失败的生物还会额外受到@Damage[1d4[persistent,bleed]]伤害。无论结果如何，珊瑚都会随后崩溃为尘土。

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: 珊瑚龙以任意顺序进行两次爪抓打击和一次尾扫打击。

Kaleidoscopic Display.name: 万花华彩 Kaleidoscopic Display
Kaleidoscopic Display.description:
90尺。覆盖龙体的珊瑚构造闪烁着鲜艳的色彩，令感官超负荷，迫使任何进入或在灵光内开始回合的生物必须进行一次@Check[will|dc:36|options:area-effect,inflicts:dazzled,inflicts:blinded]豁免。无论结果如何，该生物暂时免疫该珊瑚龙的万花华彩1分钟。

大成功 该生物不受影响

成功 该生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]1轮

失败 该生物@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]1轮

大失败 该生物目盲1轮并目眩1分钟。

Reef Bond.name: 礁石契约 Reef Bond
Reef Bond.description:
每条珊瑚龙都与一个活珊瑚礁有神秘联系。如果珊瑚龙距离它们的珊瑚礁超过3英里，它们会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}且无法恢复，每6小时恶心值增加1，除非它们成功进行一次@Check[fortitude|dc:40]豁免。24小时后，珊瑚龙获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}；每24小时流失值增加1。

如果珊瑚礁遭受重大伤害，珊瑚龙会立即察觉到珊瑚礁受损的地点，但无法知道伤害的来源或性质。如果珊瑚礁被完全摧毁，珊瑚龙会立即死亡。

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之威势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: 珊瑚龙的打击重击时，恢复液压吐息的使用次数。

Hydraulic Breath.name: 液压吐息 Hydraulic Breath
Hydraulic Breath.description: 珊瑚龙喷出一股高压水流，在@Template[type:line|distance:120]范围内造成@Damage[18d6[bludgeoning]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic|options:area-effect,forced-movement,inflicts:prone]豁免）。豁免大失败的生物被推离10尺并被击至@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]。珊瑚龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hydraulic Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用液压吐息。

Reef Armor.name: 珊瑚护甲 Reef Armor
Reef Armor.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 珊瑚龙将自己包裹在一道保护性珊瑚壳中，获得50临时生命值，并在临时生命值被耗尽前对穿刺伤害和挥砍伤害具有10点抗力。效果持续1分钟，直到被摧毁，或龙解消效果。

Reef Meld.name: 珊瑚融合 Reef Meld
Reef Meld.description:
频率 每日一次

需求 珊瑚龙与它们的绑定珊瑚礁有物理接触

效果 珊瑚龙与珊瑚礁融合并消失，同时最多可带着八名自愿的生物进入一个异次元空间，在这个空间中既无法影响外界，也不会被外界影响。该效果无限期持续直到珊瑚龙解消为止。一旦融合，珊瑚龙可以花费1分钟移动并从其珊瑚礁上任意10英里内的点出现。

Swordkeeper.name: 剑守 Swordkeeper
Swordkeeper.publicNotes: 想要守护自己的魔法武器库的收藏家会购置或制造剑守。这些多臂的构装体既是展示柜也是安防系统，每个剑守内部仅能容纳一件武器，同时会向外投射所存武器的复制品武装自己，以此阻遏潜在的窃贼。

Central Weapon.name: 核心武器 Central Weapon
Central Weapon.description:
剑守的躯干内藏有一件武器，其等级不得高于剑守的生物等级。只要剑守还在运作，想要打开其中心的武器舱就需要通过四次[[/act disable-device dc=32]]{DC32贼活}检定来@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]；若检定大失败，魔法能量反冲将对尝试检定者造成@Damage[6d6[force]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic]豁免）。

若剑守@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]，上述两项DC均降低2。

若武器被取出，剑守的回响之刃将消失。

Colossal Echo.name: 回响巨刃 Colossal Echo
Colossal Echo.description:
需求 剑守拥有核心武器

效果 剑守投射出一把巨大的回响之刃，以四只手同时握住它，对@Template[type:line|distance:30]范围内的敌人造成@Damage[9d8[force]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:30|basic]豁免）。剑守在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Colossal Echo]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用本能力。

Echoblade Flurry.name: 回响刃舞 Echoblade Flurry
Echoblade Flurry.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 剑守进行两次近战回响之刃打击。若两次打击命中同一个生物，在计算抗力与弱点时先将这两次打击造成的伤害合并再计算。剑守的多重攻击减值如常累计。

Project Echoblade.name: 投射回响之刃 Project Echoblade
Project Echoblade.description:
需求 剑守拥有核心武器

效果 剑守投射出一把回响之刃——其核心武器的力场复制品，造成额外@Damage[1d8[force]]伤害并获得投掷30尺特征。回响之刃继承核心武器的伤害骰，武器特征和符文，但不包含其他能力和需要启动的效果。剑守还能应用对应武器组的重击专精效果。剑守同时最多持有4把回响之刃；无人看管的回响之刃将在剑守的回合结束时消失。

Raise Guard.name: 举刃护身 Raise Guard
Raise Guard.description:
效果 剑守举起一把回响之刃来保护自己，其AC获得+2环境加值，直到它的下回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.LohrnRXCQ0yVt8MK]

Danava Titan.name: Danava Titan
Danava Titan.publicNotes:
Danava titans once regulated the foundational forces that shaped reality. Rebuked by the gods for being harsh and inflexible overseers, these spurned titans joined their siblings in the failed war against their creators. Defeated, the danavas were cast into the paralyzing depths of the cosmos's seas. The few danava titans who have escaped now wield the cold, darkness, and crushing pressure of their prisons in pursuit of their ancient visions of reality. Danavas split mountains, wake primordial beasts, or level whole civilizations in accordance with grand designs they forged at the dawn of time. Others hunt and harvest the balance-enforcing aeons, whom they see as usurpers of their divine responsibility.

Created by ancient deities long before the rise of mortal ancestries, titans united and attempted to overthrow their deific progenitors. The resulting war still figures prominently throughout mortal myths, in which most titans were cast down and imprisoned for eons.
Danava Titan.allSaves: +4 status to all saves vs. mental or divine

+4 Status to All Saves vs. Mental or Div.name: +4 Status to All Saves vs. Mental or Divine

Hadalic Presence.name: Hadalic Presence
Hadalic Presence.description: Creatures that fail their Will save against the titan's impossible stature aura also experience the crushing depths and darkness of the ocean floor. Such creatures see as if in an area of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} (10th rank), and the titan can use their wavesense to detect such creatures as a precise sense, even if neither are in water. On a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}.

Impossible Stature.name: Impossible Stature
Impossible Stature.description: 100 feet. Titans warp perception and distance around them to seem even larger and more imposing. A creature that enters or begins its turn within the emanation must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:46] save or its movement toward the titan is movement over difficult terrain (greater difficult terrain on a critical failure) for 1 round.

Relentless.name: Relentless
Relentless.description: The titan is as ever-moving as ocean waves. They're permanently @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}, and the extra action can be used only to Stride, Strike, or Sustain a Spell, or as one of the actions necessary to cast @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}.

Roiling Rebuke.name: Roiling Rebuke
Roiling Rebuke.description:
Trigger A creature within 200 feet targets the titan with or includes the titan in the area of an attack, spell, or other effect

Effect The titan makes a benthic wave Strike against the triggering creature. If the Strike hits, the titan disrupts the triggering action.

Wide Cleave.name: Wide Cleave
Wide Cleave.description: The titan makes a melee weapon Strike against each foe within their reach. This counts as three attacks for the titan's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until all attacks have been made.

Draugr.name: Draugr
Draugr.publicNotes:
The risen corpses of sailors who died at sea, known as draugrs, reek of rot and decay from the briny deep. Their eyes glow with ghastly green light, and rotting seaweed, barnacles, and dead sea creatures cling to their bodies. Draugrs can't speak, but they express their malicious emotions with gurgles, as though they were eternally drowning with lungs full of water. They desire little more than to attack living creatures, especially those who sail the sea. Even when they go upon land, draugrs often drag the corpses of those they strike down back to the water, populating the depths with even more dead.

Draugrs rise in the haunted places of the sea, where restless spirits, swells of void energy, or supernatural storms deliver death. A corpse might rest at the bottom of the sea for some time before awakening as a draugr. Collecting detritus and organisms, the body becomes increasingly disgusting before it finally rises. Proximity to intelligent life can expedite this process, and an underwater explorer who happens upon a shipwreck might cause a body to suddenly return to unlife as a draugr. These undead don't take intrusions lightly, especially upon their place of death.

Though hateful of the living, draugrs are susceptible to reminders of their lives as mariners. In particular, a well-performed sea shanty or call-and-response work song might cause a draugr to become lost in reverie for a moment. The creatures have even been witnessed moaning along, unable to sing the words but providing haunting accompaniment. The lull rarely lasts long, though, as the beauty of the song quickly becomes a reminder of the tragedy that befell the draugr, reaffirming their desire for blood and death.

More powerful draugrs with burning red eyes are called draugr captains. They're 3rd-level creatures with the elite adjustment that can cast mist as an innate divine spell 3 times per day.

The Sea's Revenge.name: The Sea's Revenge
The Sea's Revenge.description: A creature that slays a draugr is subjected to a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.z2mfh3oPnfYqXflY]{Mariner's Curse} spell with a @Check[will|dc:17|traits:spell] save. The curse ends if the draugr is buried in a calm sea or after 1 week passes.

Grotesque Gift.name: Grotesque Gift
Grotesque Gift.description: A draugr's attacks spatter their targets with rancid flesh and rotting seaweed. A creature damaged by a draugr's Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Swipe.name: Swipe
Swipe.description: The draugr powers their hate into attacking as many foes as possible. The draugr makes a melee Strike and compares the attack roll result to the AC of up to two foes, each of whom must be within its melee reach and adjacent to each other. Roll damage only once and apply it to each creature hit. A Swipe counts as two attacks for the draugr's multiple attack penalty.

Shade (Plane of Fire).name: 残影（火元素位面） Shade (Plane of Fire)
Shade (Plane of Fire).publicNotes:
火魂灵的外观看起来像是由火焰组成的生前版本

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

Planar Incarnation - Plane of Fire (Fire.name: 火元素位面位面塑形（火魂灵） Planar Incarnation - Plane of Fire (Fire Pneuma)
Planar Incarnation - Plane of Fire (Fire.description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

火元素位面 Plane of Fire（"火魂灵"the Fire Pneuma） 火魂灵的外观看起来像是由火焰组成的生前版本

  • 语言 火元素语
  • 额外能力 免疫火焰
  • 近战 灰烬+7（火），伤害 1d8+2火焰

Tennin.name: 天人 Tennin
Tennin.publicNotes:
天人是天界工匠与优雅的舞者，它们在涅槃境（Nirvana）担任侍从，用云与霜为诸神织造奇妙的无缝衣袍，并在宫廷中以轻盈如露的空中舞步进行表演。在灾难性的战争与浩劫期间，天人会从涅槃境降临，修补伤痕，抚慰苦难。涅槃境的领域常常将尽职的工匠与忘我的音乐家这类品德高尚的灵魂晋升至织锦天使的行列，以便他们能用自己的才华为这个被战争席卷的宇宙带来美丽与仁慈。

天人的数量从未满足过抚慰整个世界的需求。而更为可悲的是，在古拉姆（Gorum）死后，它们的数量正日益减少，因为他的死引发并重燃了无数冲突。许多天使在这场纷争中陨落或迷失了方向。

equipment-Flawless Celestial Shawl.name: 无缝天衣 Flawless Celestial Shawl
equipment-Flawless Celestial Shawl.description:
每件无缝天衣只对特定的天人有效，是其不朽修行的结晶。饰带由比精金更坚固、比蛛丝更轻盈的天界丝线织成。天人可以从无缝天衣上抽取丝线，作为一套专家级工匠工具包和工坊来进行制作。该饰带可用于处理任何等级的珍贵材料。天人使用天衣进行任何手艺检定时，其结果视为比掷骰结果高一阶成功度。

启动—重织 Reweave 3 天人使用饰带修理一件物品。此修理行动失去探索特征。

Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement.name: 法术效果：行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement.description:
效果来自@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]

你无视对你速度的环境减值。

Fingers Upon the Loom.name: 织机之指 Fingers Upon the Loom
Fingers Upon the Loom.description: 天人能侦测到穿着或持有任何衣物的生物，这视为60尺范围的精确感官。

Flawless Celestial Shawl.name: 无缝天衣 Flawless Celestial Shawl
Flawless Celestial Shawl.description: 每个天人都有其独特的无缝天衣。没有无缝天衣的天人无法使用其飞行速度或施放神术内在法术。

Secrets of Immortality.name: 不朽之秘 Secrets of Immortality
Secrets of Immortality.description: 天人可以用神秘技能替代医疗技能来[[/act administer-first-aid skill=occultism]]、[[/act treat-disease skill=occultism]]、[[/act treat-poison skill=occultism]]和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]。

Five Color Dance.name: 五色之舞 Five Color Dance
Five Color Dance.description: 30尺。灵光内盟友穿着或持有的任何衣物或装备的硬度增加3，生命值增加20，破损阈值增加10。

Dancer Across the Heavens.name: 天际舞者 Dancer Across the Heavens
Dancer Across the Heavens.description: 天人可以快步进入困难地形，并可以使用其陆地或飞行速度进行快步。此外，当天人尝试进行[[/act perform variant=dance]]{舞蹈}的表演检定时，可以以一个自由动作来行走或快步。

Shade (Plane of Wood).name: 残影（木元素位面） Shade (Plane of Wood)
Shade (Plane of Wood).publicNotes:
木魂灵的外形如同由其凡人本体雕刻而成的木质雕像

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

Planar Incarnation - Plane of Wood (Wood.name: 木元素位面位面塑形（木魂灵） Planar Incarnation - Plane of Wood (Wood Pneuma)
Planar Incarnation - Plane of Wood (Wood.description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

木元素位面 Plane of Wood（"木魂灵"Wood Pneuma） 木魂灵的外形如同由其凡人本体雕刻而成的木质雕像

  • 语言 木元素语
  • 额外能力 8额外生命值，并且具有2点火焰和斧弱点
  • 近战 拳击+7（木），伤害 1d8+2钝击

Urveth.name: Urveth
Urveth.publicNotes:
An urveth is a massive, four-armed burrowing terror with a wormlike body and gaping maw that devours everything it can. Urveths burrow deep underground to hide from the sun, emerging under the cover of darkness to kill and consume.

Darvakkas, also called nightshades, are a ravenous evil made up of equal parts darkness and malice. Originally creatures of the Outer Planes who travel to the convergence of the Shadow Plane and the Void—where the power of nothingness obliterates them—these undead abominations are the physical embodiment of entropy. They burn with an intense hatred for all life, working to bring a final, dark night to the Material Plane where nothing but ash and ice remain.

As creatures twisted by darkness and shadow, darvakkas have a great aversion to sunlight and all sources of vitality energy. On the Material Plane, they spend the hours of daylight hidden below ground, amid ruins, or submerged deep in the ocean's darkest chasms beyond the reach of the sun's rays, emerging when darkness shelters them overhead.

Darvakkas have an aura of entropy that attracts undead thralls to serve as warriors and heralds. They rarely seek alliances with each other or other creatures, existing in solitude as the heads of individual armies of the dead.

Entropy's Shadow.name: Entropy's Shadow
Entropy's Shadow.description: 60 feet. Urveths leak entropy and corruption from their very being. A living creature entering or starting its turn in the aura takes @Damage[5d6[void]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:38|basic]. If it fails, it's also @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 minute and pulled 10 feet toward the urveth.

Reactive Strike.name: Reactive Strike
Reactive Strike.description:
Claw only. An urveth gains 3 extra reactions each round that they can use only to make Reactive Strikes.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ReactiveStrike]

Sunlight Powerlessness.name: Sunlight Powerlessness
Sunlight Powerlessness.description: A urveth caught in sunlight is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}.

Frenzy.name: Frenzy
Frenzy.description: The urveth makes two claw Strikes and one stinger Strike in any order.

Swallow Whole.name: Swallow Whole
Swallow Whole.description:
Huge, @Damage[(2d10+5)[bludgeoning]], Rupture 35

A living creature that ends its turn swallowed whole by an urveth becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} or increases its drained condition by 1, and the urveth gains 10 temporary Hit Points. A creature whose drained condition increases to 5 in this way dies.

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.SwallowWhole]

Urveth Venom.name: Urveth Venom
Urveth Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:37]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[3d6[void],2d6[poison]]{3d6 void damage and 2d6 poison damage} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[void],2d6[poison]]{3d6 void damage and 2d6 poison damage}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[3d6[void],2d6[poison]]{3d6 void damage and 2d6 poison damage}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 4} (1 round)

Naari Pyrochemist.name: 火元素裔高温化学家 Naari Pyrochemist
Naari Pyrochemist.publicNotes:
火元素裔的血液中燃烧着元素之火。大多数火元素裔都是二等公民，他们在火巨灵和火焰国度的铁蹄之下做牛做马，但那些出现在火巨灵那等级森严的国度之外的个体或者选择逃跑的个体则过着追求名誉、荣耀和权力的激情生活。

火元素裔喜爱火焰，但并不意味着他们都会拥抱火焰的破坏本质。那些在社会中寻求更具建设性角色的人，或许会珍视火焰那保护性的温暖，以及它在创造或烹饪时扮演的角色。另一些人则从火焰闪烁摇曳的姿态中获得灵感，为自己作为杂技艺人或舞者所拥有的技巧而自豪。塞恩蕾（Sarenrae）教堂非常欢迎这些火元素裔火舞者，既欣赏他们的技巧，也是为了确保这些火元素裔能够有一处安歇之地，能够远离他们那些更加暴力的亲族。

但总体来说，火元素裔会被那些能够让他们享受在火焰荣耀的行业与使命所吸引。火元素裔的高温化学家会将这种使命感应用在炼金术的教学中，将每一次炸弹投掷或者火焰的引燃都视为纯粹的回应。

Infused Items.name: 灌注物品 Infused Items
Infused Items.description:
火元素裔高温化学家携带以下物品。火元素裔高温化学家每天都会在每日准备期间补充这些物品。

5个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.yd3kEK21YknZLlcT]

2个@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.TZUskLT7yvP7N2co]

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.MoBlVd36uD9xVvZC]

Quick Bomber.name: 高速投弹手 Quick Bomber
Quick Bomber.description: 火元素裔高温化学家以交互动作取出1个炽火胶，然后以远程打击把它投掷出去。

Fuath.name: 海难小魔怪 Fuath
Fuath.publicNotes:
尽管它们体型很小，但海难小魔怪是沉船的化身。在每个黑暗的夜晚，这些小魔怪会偷偷切断绳索，扯断船帆，砸碎六分仪，玷污船上的食物。一旦船只沉没，海难小魔怪就会回到沉船里，满足它们对地面生物肉体的渴望。虽然海难小魔怪更喜欢让自己的猎物睡着，但它们也为那些奋起反抗的水手们准备了一种可怕的死法：用魔法水泡包裹住他们，直到将其溺死。

由于常年生活在海里，海难小魔怪有着海马一般的面容，还有一样的绿色毛发覆盖在它黄色的皮肤上，双手则是一对龙虾般的大钳子。由于不会说地底通用语，他们很难和海鳐小魔怪之外的小魔怪交流，但很尊重海鬼婆和其他水生秽恶精类。

小魔怪很久以前就在第一世界出现了，它们是大自然消耗、侵蚀和分解能力的具现。在物质位面，他们与凡人文明的遭遇将他们扭曲成制造混乱、破坏和陷阱的生物，每种小魔怪都专精于某种特定的混乱。

Vulnerable to Sunlight.name: 阳光易伤 Vulnerable to Sunlight
Vulnerable to Sunlight.description: 每当海难小魔怪持续暴露在阳光下1小时后，它就会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{流失 Drained 1}（或流失状态值+1）。如果海难小魔怪潜入水下超过1尺深度，阳光不再对它造成不良影响。

Viscous Choke.name: 水球窒息 Viscous Choke
Viscous Choke.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 海难小魔怪选择30尺内一个需要呼吸空气的生物，然后用某种粘性的魔法水泡包裹住它最多1分钟。目标必须成功通过@Check[reflex|dc:17]豁免，否则开始窒息，必须屏住呼吸才能避免溺水。该魔法水泡可以暂时抹去，这需要窒息的生物或其相邻的生物提供总计3个交互动作，然后窒息的生物能以+2环境加值尝试一次新的豁免，如果成功则效果结束（这些动作不必连续，也不需要全部由同一个生物做出）。

Drainberry Bush.name: Drainberry Bush
Drainberry Bush.publicNotes:
Drainberry bushes are floating bushes that originate from the First World, with long, thorny vines and dense clusters of bright-red berries. Their hollow thorns quickly siphon blood, which is how the carnivorous plants feed, and they rapidly turn consumed blood into fresh batches of delicious berries. They exude a faint white glow that's a result of stored vitality energy.

Drainberry bushes exhibit unusually high intelligence and have an astute sense of value. When creatures attempt to harvest their berries, they typically become insulted by the lack of bartering. Creatures that attempt to converse with drainberry bushes find the plants telepathically convey only short and simple phrases: most commonly, "Money please," "Deal good," "Deal no good," "Want that," (with a gesture toward an item it covets), "Thank you, customer," and if necessary, "No refunds." Though a drainberry bush considers the market value of its berries to be 25 gp, it greatly prefers interesting art objects as payment—even ones of significantly lower value.

Nature Empathy.name: Nature Empathy
Nature Empathy.description: The drainberry bush can use Diplomacy to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} on and make very simple Requests of animals and plant creatures.

Blood Berries.name: Blood Berries
Blood Berries.description:
The drainberry bush must drain blood from living creatures for sustenance. This causes clusters of bright red berries to grow among its branches.

Each cluster of berries lasts for 1 day, and a drainberry bush typically has [[/r 1d6+3 #clusters]]{1d6+3 clusters} when encountered. When consumed, a cluster restores @Damage[(2d8+10)[healing]] Hit Points. This effect has the healing, necromancy, and primal traits.

A creature can pluck a cluster of berries with a successful unarmed Strike or Thievery check against the bush's AC.

Consume Berries.name: Consume Berries
Consume Berries.description: The bush draws nourishment from one cluster of blood berries, regaining @Damage[(2d8+10)[healing]] Hit Points. That berry cluster wrinkles and dies.

Drain Blood.name: Drain Blood
Drain Blood.description:
Requirements The drainberry bush has at least one living creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} with one of its vines

Effect The bush squeezes all creatures it has grabbed, its hollow thorns piercing flesh and siphoning blood. Each creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save or take @Damage[(2d8+10)[piercing]] damage and become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} (double damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2} on a critical failure). For every creature damaged this way, a cluster of blood berries immediately grows along the bush's branches.

Storm of Vines.name: Storm of Vines
Storm of Vines.description: The drainberry bush makes up to four vine Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks count toward the bush's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after the bush makes all these attacks.

Requiem Dragon (Adult).name: 成年安魂龙 Requiem Dragon (Adult)
Requiem Dragon (Adult).publicNotes: 安魂龙是灵魂之河（River of Souls）的守护者，负责引导灵魂抵达其在来世的最终归宿。灵魂的安全旅程对安魂龙至关重要，一些安魂龙会从灵魂首次进入灵魂之河开始，直到它们在骨园的审判，最终引导灵魂到达它们最终的安息之地。大多数安魂龙将自己与特定的位面绑定，负责守护所有进入该位面的灵魂，导致这些龙与天堂或地狱等地方相关联，尽管这些龙从不对这些位面宣誓效忠。安魂龙将它们的巢穴建在灵魂之河沿岸——这些巢穴是从其他位面拯救出来的沉重建筑拼接而成——并充满了无价的记录和伟大成就的纪念物。

Soul Journey.name: 灵魂之旅 Soul Journey
Soul Journey.description: 安魂龙花费1小时穿越位面通道进入灵魂之河，然后可以到达灵魂之河的任意位置。这具备@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.5bTt2CvYHPvaR7QQ]效果，但安魂龙能够精确到达任何主要位面上的地点。

Status Sight.name: 状态视觉 Status Sight
Status Sight.description: 安魂龙会自动知晓它能看到的所有生物的生命值。

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Divine.name: 对抗神术全豁免获得+2状态加值 +2 Status to All Saves vs. Divine

Soul Anchor.name: 灵魂锚定 Soul Anchor
Soul Anchor.description:
触发 一个60尺内的生物的生命值将降至0

效果 安魂龙将触发生物的灵魂锚定于其躯体，该生物的生命值保持在1点，陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 2}，并获得与安魂龙等级相等的快速治疗，持续1分钟。该生物在24小时内暂时免疫灵魂锚定效果。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.k8bmDh3nWi2FUyz5]

Withhold Death.name: 阻止死亡 Withhold Death
Withhold Death.description:
触发 安魂龙被一次攻击重击

效果 安魂龙抵抗灵魂的松动，减少部分伤害。安魂针对触发攻击获得15点所有伤害类型的抗力。

Dooming Breath.name: 毁灭吐息 Dooming Breath
Dooming Breath.description: 安魂龙从口中喷出来自创生熔炉的能量，在@Template[type:line|distance:90]范围内造成@Damage[12d8[spirit]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic|options:area-effect]豁免）。豁免失败的不死生物还必须成功通过@Check[will|dc:36|options:area-effect,inflicts:doomed]豁免，否则陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 1}。如果目标已陷入毁灭，则毁灭值增加1（最多为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{毁灭 Doomed 4}）。安魂龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Dooming Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用毁灭吐息。

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: 安魂龙以任意顺序进行两次爪抓打击和一次尾扫打击。

Draconic Momentum.name: 龙之威势 Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: 安魂龙的打击重击时会恢复毁灭吐息的充能。

Soul Shield.name: 灵魂护盾 Soul Shield
Soul Shield.description:
频率 每日一次

效果 安魂龙利用其生命精华在60尺内的一个生物周围创造出一个精魂能量护盾。此护盾与生物建立了一个连接，效果与@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.d7Lwx6KAs47MtF0q]相似，区别在于该效果不会因距离而中断，并持续1小时。此外，该生物获得对物理和精魂伤害的5点抗力，适用于其所承受伤害的一半。安魂龙可以解消该效果。

Resurrection Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).name: 青年复生龙施法者 Resurrection Dragon (Young, Spellcaster)
Resurrection Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).publicNotes: 复生龙徘徊于生与死之间。它们精通命能，使得它们能够将死者复生，同时也精通虚能，能够赋予他人死亡。它们利用这些能力戏弄凡人的生命，召唤灵魂来帮助自己，或复生它们认为重要或有趣的生物。复生龙的巢穴通常是一个荒凉之地。虽然它们像其他龙一样囤积财富，但它们几乎不装饰自己的巢穴，财宝通常被存放在黑暗的角落里，仿佛它们对自己的财物毫不在乎。然而，复生龙倾向于保留从复生的生物或计划复生的生物那里得到的纪念物，而这些物品会特别安全地保管。

Reawaken!.name: 醒来！ Reawaken!
Reawaken!.description:
触发 复生龙能看到的一个活物死亡

效果 复生龙利用神术与生命能量将灵魂重新连接到已死躯壳。该自愿生物将在其下回合开始时复活，同时陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死 Dying 1}状态。每个生物只能被此能力复生一次。

Risen Commander.name: 复生指挥官 Risen Commander
Risen Commander.description: 复生龙与它的仆从有着强烈的联系，复生龙每回合可以用一个自由动作维持@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.9WGeBwIIbbUuWKq0]或@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.hghGRzOSzEl4UXdS]。

Siphon Life.name: 生命吸取 Siphon Life
Siphon Life.description:
触发 一个60尺内的生物使用了一个恢复生命值的治疗效果

效果 复生龙将命能从该效果中引导开，从而将其影响降到最低。触发恢复生命值效果的所有掷骰取最小值，并且任何恢复生命值的固定值（如两动作@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]的附加生命值）都会被减半。然后，复生龙获得1d8临时生命值，持续1轮。

Soul Siphoning Breath.name: 汲魂吐息 Soul Siphoning Breath
Soul Siphoning Breath.description: 复生龙释放一股神圣能量，在@Template[type:cone|distance:30]范围内造成@Damage[7d6[void]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic|options:area-effect]豁免），并从范围内的生物身上汲取生命之力。复生龙获得快速治疗5，直到其汲魂吐息重新充能。复生龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Soul Siphoning Breath]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用汲魂吐息。

Fire Wisp.name: Fire Wisp
Fire Wisp.publicNotes:
Fire wisps are sizzling spheres of flame and ash, perpetually crackling and shimmering with heat. They're carefree, boisterous, and quick to action—sometimes recklessly so.

Wisps are tiny elemental beings that emerged during the creation of the Elemental Planes. The first wisps roamed the Inner Sphere in shifting symphonies that traded members with their every meeting. These symphonies of free wisps created music out of their combined resonances, but when the wicked Elemental Lords realized the value of the wisps' resonance, they captured whole symphonies for use as servants.

Wisps attune to each other and to those they surround themselves with. This attunement makes them naturally supportive allies. Free wisps still roam the Inner Sphere and the Universe, but they're usually shy and hide themselves from strangers. However, they happily offer their service to those who show them kindness. They especially find themselves drawn to spellcasters who practice elemental magic; these wisps usually watch from afar but sometimes approach those who seem safe to become familiars or comrades.

Free wisps who find one another become close almost immediately. They get especially excited when they find wisps of elements other than their own, showing none of the animosity sometimes exhibited between elementals of different planes. Instead, they join in an excited dance, emitting resonances that faintly echo the symphonies of ancient days.

Smoke Vision.name: Smoke Vision
Smoke Vision.description: The fire wisp ignores the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition from smoke.

Accord Essence.name: Accord Essence
Accord Essence.description:
Trigger An ally within 30 feet that benefited from the wisp's resonance in the last hour is targeted by an attack

Effect The wisp detonates themself in an elemental explosion. This grants temporary Hit Points equal to half the wisp's current Hit Points to allies within @Template[emanation|distance:30]{30 feet} who have benefited from the wisp's resonance in the last hour. These temporary Hit Points last 1 hour.

A wisp that uses this reaction is permanently destroyed, and they can be restored by only a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{Wish} ritual or similarly powerful effect. If an ability would prevent the wisp's destruction (for instance, if the wisp is summoned and would merely be dismissed), Accord Essence has no effect.

Resonance.name: Resonance
Resonance.description:
30 feet. All wisps vibrate at a frequency attuned to their element, resonating with and empowering all creatures and effects sharing that trait.

A creature in the area gains a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for effects with the air trait; a creature with the elemental and air traits gains this bonus to all attack and damage rolls.

In Concert.name: In Concert
In Concert.description: When a fire wisp rolls a critical failure on a check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.HCl3pzVefiv9ZKQW]{Aid}, they get a failure instead, and when they roll a success, they get a critical success instead.

Shade (Abaddon).name: 残影（末日荒原） Shade (Abaddon)
Shade (Abaddon).publicNotes:
受食者的外观为它们生前形态的中型版本，并且需要时刻逃离邪魔的吞食

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

Planar Incarnation - Abaddon (The Hunted.name: 末日荒原位面塑形（受食者） Planar Incarnation - Abaddon (The Hunted)
Planar Incarnation - Abaddon (The Hunted.description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

末日荒原 Abaddon（"受食者" the Hunted） 受食者的外观为它们生前形态的中型版本，并且需要时刻逃离邪魔的吞食

  • 祝佑 邪秽
  • 语言 邪魔语
  • 额外能力 快速治疗5
  • 近战 1 拳击+7，伤害1d8+2钝击

Terror Bird.name: Terror Bird
Terror Bird.publicNotes:
Common terror birds are notable hunters. On their own, they use their great speed to catch prey unaware. In a flock, they can swarm and take down larger beasts like aurochs with their overwhelming numbers.

Terror birds aren't one species, but rather a family of deadly, flightless avian predators. All terror birds are capable of bursts of great speed and have powerful beaks that can tear apart the flesh of their prey. Most stalk large, open prairies and steppes, competing directly with other sizable predators such as big cats and wolves.

Sprint.name: Sprint
Sprint.description:
Frequency once per minute

Effect The terror bird Strides three times in a straight line

Tearing Clutch.name: Tearing Clutch
Tearing Clutch.description: The terror bird's powerful beak can tear through flesh. On a successful beak Strike, the target takes 1 persistent bleed damage. This bleed damage increases to 1d4 on a critical hit.

Giant Mosquito.name: Giant Mosquito
Giant Mosquito.publicNotes: These horrifically enlarged versions of the common mosquito often prey upon megafauna like dinosaurs and other large creatures, but they won't turn down a chance to drink the blood of a smaller target-such as a humanoid.

Blood Drain.name: Blood Drain
Blood Drain.description:
Requirements The giant mosquito has a creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The giant mosquito uses its proboscis to drain blood from the grabbed or restrained creature. This deals @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:24|basic] save), and the giant mosquito gains temporary Hit Points equal to the damage dealt that last 1 minute. A creature that takes any damage from having its blood drained by a giant mosquito is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} until it receives any kind or amount of healing.

Septic Malaria.name: Septic Malaria
Septic Malaria.description:
The victim can't reduce its @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition while it's affected by septic malaria

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:24|traits:disease]

Onset 1 day

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 day)

Stage 3 as stage 2 (1 day)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 5 dead

Shikigami.name: Shikigami
Shikigami.publicNotes:
Shikigami are made of paper and can easily transform between a flat cutout form and a three-dimensional doll of molded paper. Unlike most other kami, who are bound to their wards by a more powerful spirit or deity, shikigami are minor spirits that even mortal practitioners can sometimes bind into a tiny paper form and task with guarding small works, such as garden statues and vases. Landowners delight in having shikigami protect their gardens, whether they paid a wandering spellcaster to entreat the shikigami or simply had the fortune of another spirit assigning a shikigami to their land. Travelers who come across a shikigami-graced milestone or waypost believe that such encounters are good omens for the journey.

For their part, shikigami have mixed opinions on civilization and the humanoids who dwell therein. While shikigami will fight to protect their ward against invaders and desecrators, these kami are just as likely to leave—their ward in tow—if locals begin to despoil the area or show a disregard for nature. Most practitioners capable of binding a shikigami wouldn't engage in this type of disrespect, but should the kami catch wind of such practices, shikigami across the land might abandon their contracts en masse, leaving behind an uncomfortable vacuum with their exodus. In this way, shikigami exemplify the precarious balance between the expansion of civilization and the preservation of the natural world.

Not all shikigami protect gardens, so you can substitute the shikigami's spade for any sort of mundane tool that's useful to the shikigami's task and their ward. The kami wields any such weapon with the same damage dice, modifiers, and traits listed for their spade Strike, but change the damage type as appropriate for the new weapon.

Kami are divine nature spirits from the lands of Tian Xia, far to the east of the Inner Sea region. They serve as guardians of natural objects and places they protect—their wards—and are ancient enemies of oni (Pathfinder Monster Core 252–255). Kami can merge with their wards, allowing them to surreptitiously watch anyone who treads upon their sacred grounds. Kami leave those who they deem harmless alone, but fight vigilantly to scare away anyone perceived as a threat.

Ward.name: Ward
Ward.description:
Every kami is bound to a ward: a specific animal, plant, object, or location. A kami can merge with or emerge from their ward as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. While merged, the kami can observe their surroundings with their usual senses as well as the senses of their ward, but can't move, communicate with, or control their ward. Additionally, a kami merged with their ward recovers Hit Points each minute as if they spent an entire day resting.

A shikigami's ward is typically a minor work of art or symbol of civilization, such as a milestone, trail sign, personal garden, or tiny statue.

Flatten.name: Flatten
Flatten.description: The shikigami flattens to the width of a sheet of paper. While Flattened, they can float on the wind, gaining a 20-foot fly Speed, and they can slip through small cracks and gaps without needing to Squeeze; however, they become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}. The shikigami can Dismiss this effect.

Zuishin.name: Zuishin
Zuishin.publicNotes:
Zuishin are kami warriors and archers tasked with watching over important shrines, ancient gates, or sacred doorways. With sturdy armor and hallowed armaments, zuishin fight tirelessly to drive off unholy powers who wish to desecrate their wards. Of all kami, zuishin most frequently fight against oni, as the wards zuishin guard are often targeted by these vile fiends.

Zuishin tend to regard mortals with skepticism. To earn a zuishin's trust, a supplicant might offer items of natural significance, such as an urn of hallowed earth, a branch from an ancient tree, or an arrangement of local flowers.

Like all kami, a zuishin might come across as reserved or even indifferent to humans and their ilk; however, this impression stems only from a zuishin's wisdom and longevity, which makes mortal affairs seem relatively trivial. In the company of other kami, they're unerringly benevolent and readily offer aid to their fellows. For example, a zuishin whose ward lies nestled in an ancient forest might readily join forces with kodama in those trees to deter foes.

Kami are divine nature spirits from the lands of Tian Xia, far to the east of the Inner Sea region. They serve as guardians of natural objects and places they protect—their wards—and are ancient enemies of oni (Pathfinder Monster Core 252–255). Kami can merge with their wards, allowing them to surreptitiously watch anyone who treads upon their sacred grounds. Kami leave those who they deem harmless alone, but fight vigilantly to scare away anyone perceived as a threat.

Ward.name: Ward
Ward.description:
Every kami is bound to a ward: a specific animal, plant, object, or location. A kami can merge with or emerge from their ward as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. While merged, the kami can observe their surroundings with their usual senses as well as the senses of their ward, but can't move, communicate with, or control their ward. Additionally, a kami merged with their ward recovers Hit Points each minute as if they spent an entire day resting.

A zuishin's ward is typically a gate, doorway or shrine.

Healing Arrow.name: Healing Arrow
Healing Arrow.description:
The zuishin blesses an arrow with healing magic. They expend a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Cleanse Affliction}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.rfZpqmj0AIIdkVIs]{Heal}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.BCuHKrDeJ4eq53M6]{Sure Footing} spell and make a composite longbow Strike against an ally.

A critical failure has no effect, but on any other result the ally is affected by the spell rather than taking damage from the Strike.

Holy Weaponry.name: Holy Weaponry
Holy Weaponry.description: Any weapon becomes a striking @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.DH0kB9Wbr5pDeunX]{Holy} weapon while the zuishin wields it. A zuishin creates arrows out of nothing as part of their attacks with any bow they wield.

Shade (Plane of Air).name: 残影（气元素位面）Shade (Plane of Air)
Shade (Plane of Air).publicNotes:
气魂灵的外观看起来像是由空气组成的生前版本

当凡人死亡时，他们的灵魂将前往外环位面中的骨园，在那里接受死亡女神法莱斯玛的审判。一旦他们受到审判，他们的灵魂就会前往来世接受最终奖赏或惩罚，在这个过程中，他们会变成一种叫做"残影"的生物。这个过程会赋予这些灵魂一个新的身体，其身体的外形由它前往的位面的主要意识形态所塑造。残影的生前记忆几乎被抹去，只留下一些如同梦境般模糊的记忆碎片。无论残影生前的体型、力量或天性如何，他们在来世都是中型生物。

阴魂的存在可能会持续无数纪元，但这种状态并非一成不变的。神祇、浩瀚众界的居民、甚至位面本身都可能进一步转变残影的本质，通过将其转变为原始的精粹（quintessence），心魂要素（spiritual essence）被用于扩张位面的物理表征，或被转变为天族、魔族、观察者之类的新形态。如果残影死亡，他们的身体会在类似腐烂的过程中分解，他们的本质会回归至组成位面本身的精粹或元素中。这代表着灵魂之旅的真正终结——它们的生命精华与浩瀚众界的核心融为一体，被回收到创生熔炉中，为新灵魂的诞生提供能量。

Planar Incarnation - Plane of Air (Air P.name: 气元素位面位面塑形（气魂灵） Planar Incarnation - Plane of Air (Air Pneuma)
Planar Incarnation - Plane of Air (Air P.description:
所有残影都会被所在的位面塑造形体，并表现出位面的本质。他们的数据有如下调整。他们也可能获得和位面相关的生物特征。

气元素位面 Plane of Air（"气魂灵"the Air Pneuma） 气魂灵的外观看起来像是由空气组成的生前版本

  • 语言 风元素语
  • 额外能力 飞行速度20尺
  • 近战 造风+7（气），伤害 1d8+2钝击

Winter Hag.name: 冬鬼婆 Winter Hag
Winter Hag.publicNotes:
冬鬼婆的性情正如其名般冰冷刺骨。她们身上毫无凡人的温情，视情感为软弱，厌恶任何形式的情感流露。她们同样要求受其庇护的仆从保持这份冷漠，尽管自称天性冷漠，冬鬼婆仍会主动寻觅同伴，招揽那些被世间苦涩所侵蚀，或被凛冽寒美所吸引的灵魂。魔法改造与偶尔的惩戒，很快将这些不幸者塑造成冬鬼婆宫廷中的完美臣仆。然而某些勇敢者坚称，音乐能让冬鬼婆心生怜悯。

冬鬼婆的外貌完美而残酷，仿佛从冰晶与纯净白雪中凿出的雕塑女子。

鬼婆是来历不明的诡异掠食者，最臭名昭著的便是以孩童和年轻人为猎物。她们无一例外呈现女性外貌，在日常生活中通常伪装成凡人女性。她们强大的魔法与操纵手段让让她们能引诱天真脆弱的猎物，在绑架或吞噬之前，先将受害者折磨得体无完肤以满足其虐待狂的欲望。典型的鬼婆皆以虚荣心和控制欲为特征。虽可能存在恶意较弱的鬼婆，但此类存在往往深藏不露，既为躲避冒险者的追捕，亦为逃避其喜爱虐待的亲族。

Spell Effect: See the Unseen.name: 法术效果：识破无形 See the Unseen
Spell Effect: See the Unseen.description:
效果来自@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.jwK43yKsHTkJQvQ9]

你可以看见隐形的生物，它们的身形闪烁，对你视为@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]状态并难以识别。你还在识破幻象的相关检定上获得+2状态加值。

Coven.name: 巫团 Coven
Coven.description:
冬鬼婆能将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.xxWhyl81w3ckslAU]，@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.FhOaQDTSnsY7tiam]和@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.R5FHRv7VqyRnxg2t]添加到巫团法术中。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.Coven]

Snow Vision.name: 雪地视域 Snow Vision
Snow Vision.description: 雪不会减弱冬鬼婆的视力；她忽视由降雪带来的@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]状态。

Thaw the Heart.name: 融化心扉 Thaw the Heart
Thaw the Heart.description:
如果冬鬼婆看到一个生物以大于等于26的结果成功通过一次@Check[performance]检定，则鬼婆会陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}并且失去对情绪效果的免疫，持续1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.GdkIUl4w8yAJxqdO]

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
冬鬼婆变为任意中型类人女性的外貌。这不会改变其速度或其打击的攻击伤害加值，但是可能会改变其打击造成的伤害类型（通常变为钝击）。

@Localize[PF2E.NPC.Abilities.Glossary.ChangeShape]

Curse of the Frozen Heart.name: 霜心诅咒 Curse of the Frozen Heart
Curse of the Frozen Heart.description:
豁免骰 @Check[will|dc:25]

阶段1 @Damage[3d6[cold]]伤害（1日）

阶段2 目标获得5点寒冷抗力（1日）

阶段3 目标获得10点寒冷抗力且不将任何人视作盟友（1日）

阶段4 目标免疫寒冷，不将任何人视作盟友，并且对所有非敌对的生物变为不友善（1日）

阶段5 目标变得免疫寒冷和情绪效果，停止衰老，且永久受到鬼婆的支配术（dominated）效果——如果鬼婆死亡，目标保持在阶段4

Ice Climb.name: 冰面攀爬 Ice Climb
Ice Climb.description: 冬鬼婆可以使用列出的速度攀爬，但只能在冰面上。她忽视由冰和雪形成的困难地形，她在穿越冰面时不会有摔倒的风险。

Kiss of Rime.name: 雾凇之吻 Kiss of Rime
Kiss of Rime.description:
频率 每小时一次

效果 一片魔法冰晶嵌入30尺内一个生物的血肉中。该生物必须进行豁免对抗霜心诅咒。

Attic Whisperer.name: Attic Whisperer
Attic Whisperer.publicNotes:
Beware the haunting sobs of the attic whisperer, for they carry the pained wrath of an abandoned child who perished due to the neglect or absence of their caretakers. Animated by loneliness, the embittered spirit binds itself to the material world in a body made of bits and oddments of a lost childhood-wooden blocks, scraps of blankets, ratty dolls, buttons, carved trinkets, and glass marbles. To give themselves the semblance of a head, they top their patchwork bodies with a small animal's skull.

Attic whisperers most frequently lurk in old infirmaries, orphanages, and other such institutions where children were forgotten, and they lay dormant for decades in hopes that they might one day find a playmate to ease their eternal loneliness. When they sense the living, attic whisperers attempt to lure them into their clutches by calling out to them using the voice of a small child. Though attic whisperers intend only to play with those they encounter, they drain the breath and voice from living creatures as their dark impulses take over.

Aura of Sobs.name: Aura of Sobs
Aura of Sobs.description: 10 feet. An attic whisperer enshrouds itself in a tapestry of stolen voices. Each living creature that enters or starts their turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:19|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] save or the unnerving, bitter sobs render them distraught and they become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for as long as they remain within the aura. A creature that succeeds is temporarily immune for 1 hour. The attic whisperer can activate or deactivate the aura with a single free action, which has the concentrate trait.

Whispered Despair.name: Whispered Despair
Whispered Despair.description:
Trigger A creature with an active emotion effect enters an attic whisperer's aura of sobs

Effect The attic whisperer attempts to counteract the emotion effect, with a counteract modifier of +13.

Steal Breath.name: Steal Breath
Steal Breath.description:
The attic whisperer siphons the breath from living creatures, sapping their strength. A living creature hit by a jaws Strike must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:21|options:inflicts:enfeebled,inflicts:fatigued,inflicts:unconscious] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 24 hours and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}.

Critical Failure The target is enfeebled 1 for 24 hours, is fatigued, and falls @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}.

Steal Voice.name: Steal Voice
Steal Voice.description:
When an attic whisperer hits a living creature with a bony hand Strike, it tries to pull the victim's voice into its aura. The victim must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target's voice is weak for 1 minute. Anytime it attempts an action with the auditory trait, it must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] check or the action is lost.

Failure The target loses the ability to speak for 1 hour, until the curse is removed, or until the attic whisperer is destroyed, whichever comes first. During this time, the attic whisperer can perfectly mimic the target's voice, and the target takes a –2 circumstance penalty to saving throws against that attic whisperer's aura of sobs.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effects lasts until the attic whisperer is destroyed or the curse is removed.

Ambush Copse.name: 伏击树丛 Ambush Copse
Ambush Copse.publicNotes:
被锯断和被斧劈开的木材相互摩擦，随着伏击树丛的移动，轰然穿过森林。这团巨大、愤怒、旋转着的致命原木群的树皮上遍布切口与焦痕。

森林从未遗忘。它记得那些斧头、刺耳的锯声，以及噼啪燃烧的柴火烟雾。它记得那些将古老树木运走切割、塑形、焚烧的马车。精类生物的干预或失控的元素魔法将这些记忆连同森林的愤怒与悲伤一同唤醒，凝聚成形——成为伏击树丛。

伏击树丛会在伐木者途经的村庄发泄怒火，或静候入侵者踏入它的林地疆域。尽管伏击树丛可能被误认为是一株受伤的树精，但它可以停止移动，伪装成一堆蔓生的原木，或一间半塌的小屋。在那里，它静静等待复仇的时机。

Berserk.name: 狂暴 Berserk
Berserk.description: 看到火焰或斧头的伏击树丛有机会陷入狂暴。在其回合开始时，若它察觉到斧头或相当于点燃的火把或更大型的火源存在，伏击树丛必须进行一次@Check[flat|dc:5]检定，失败则进入狂暴。狂暴的伏击树丛无法使用专注动作，会疯狂攻击最近的活物，若附近没有活物，则攻击最近的物体。

Blinding Branches.name: 致盲枝条 Blinding Branches
Blinding Branches.description:
触发 在伏击树丛20尺范围内的一个生物在移动动作中离开一个方格

需求 触发生物位于森林地形中

效果 伏击树丛的元素能量驱动附近树枝抽打该生物的面部。触发生物必须成功通过@Check[reflex|dc:30|options:inflicts:blinded]豁免，否则将@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]1轮。

Felling Ambush.name: 伐倒伏击 Felling Ambush
Felling Ambush.description:
触发 一个生物移动到距伏击树丛10尺以内

需求 伏击树丛伪装成树木或原木

效果 伏击树丛对触发生物发动一次原木打击。若攻击命中，目标必须尝试通过@Check[reflex|dc:30|options:inflicts:prone]豁免，否则被击至@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]。

Feign Copse.name: 伪装树丛 Feign Copse
Feign Copse.description: 直到下一次行动前，伏击树丛会呈现为一小片无害的树木或原木。在伪装成树木或原木的欺骗检定及相应DC上，它自动取43（在森林地形中为45）。

Pounding Smash.name: 猛力重砸 Pounding Smash
Pounding Smash.description: 无论攻击是否命中，伏击树丛的近战打击都会在目标的占据空间内制造一片5尺方格的困难地形。

Pulverizing Barrage.name: 粉碎弹幕 Pulverizing Barrage
Pulverizing Barrage.description: 伏击树丛发动三次原木打击，每次承受–2减值，且全部瞄准同一生物。伏击树丛的多重攻击减值在所有三次攻击完成后才增加。伏击树丛获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 2}状态，持续至其下一回合开始。

Sunder Objects.name: 破坏物品 Sunder Objects
Sunder Objects.description: 当伏击树丛对一件物品或构造物造成伤害时，会对其额外造成@Damage[15[untyped]]伤害。

Veranallia.name: Veranallia
Veranallia.publicNotes:
Veranallias represent the freedom of life to grow, change, and adapt. They rarely interact directly with non-azatas, as most other beings find their nature hard to comprehend, but those who secure their aid find them powerful allies. The lower half of a veranallia's body is made of vegetation that constantly repeats a dizzying cycle of sprouting, blooming, thriving, and wilting. The upper half of their body appears as that of a humanoid of any gender-it is rare for a veranallia to remain consistent in their gender for more than a few seasons at a time.

Veranallias transform the landscape in their wake, bringing creation and destruction alike. The world around them overflows with an abundance of vegetation, with plenty of food for nearby animals, and when they bring destruction, they do so without cruelty, as it is sometimes necessary to make room for new life. They trigger forest fires in woodlands before dry brush piles up to dangerous levels, and bring bitter winters to areas plagued with parasites that thrive in hot weather.

Alter Weather.name: Alter Weather
Alter Weather.description:
Frequency three times per day

Effect The veranallia dramatically alters weather patterns in the surrounding area, producing any of the results of a successful 9th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.XkDCzMIyc0YOjw05]{Control Weather} ritual.

Rebirth.name: Rebirth
Rebirth.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The veranallia spends a minute to encase a creature that has been dead for no more than a year in a cocoon. After 24 hours, the creature is restored to life, and the cocoon explodes in a shower of colorful blossoms. If the veranallia's chooses, Rebirth can change the creature's ancestry or heritage, typically into an nephilim.

Unrisen.name: Unrisen
Unrisen.publicNotes:
An unrisen is a mangled conglomeration of splintered bones, decaying organs, and rotting flesh, created when a ritual such as resurrect goes catastrophically wrong. Immense care must be taken, for if such a ritual fails utterly, an unrisen can be the result—as many a ritualist has learned to their horror.

Unrisen are barely intelligent, aware only of the agony constantly inflicted by their flawed creation and their resentment for the living. They tend to attack the casters involved in the botched ritual first before lashing out at everyone else around them. Though an unrisen's twisted form is unrecognizable as the intended target of the resurrection, its wordless howls are often disturbingly similar to the deceased's voice. If an unrisen is destroyed before it can rise again, it's reduced to a handful of metallic blue-green salts referred to as essential salts.

Meant to Live.name: Meant to Live
Meant to Live.description: Whenever an unrisen would take damage from vitality energy, it instead heals half that number of Hit Points.

Resurrection Vulnerability.name: Resurrection Vulnerability
Resurrection Vulnerability.description: A creature with a prepared or spontaneous spell that can restore the dead to life (such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.Hnc7eGi7vyZenAIm]{Breath of Life} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.IkGYwHRLhkuoGReG]{Raise Dead}) can expend an appropriate spell slot as a 2-action activity to destroy an unrisen within 30 feet. The attempt fails if the unrisen succeeds at a Will save against the creature's spell DC.

Rise Again.name: Rise Again
Rise Again.description: If the unrisen is reduced to 0 Hit Points by means other than fire damage, disintegration, or its resurrection vulnerability, it returns to unlife at the start of its next turn. It has 100 Hit Points and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} in the space in which it was destroyed. The unrisen can't be returned by this ability again for 1 hour.

Agonized Howl.name: Agonized Howl
Agonized Howl.description: The unrisen howls in pain at its cursed existence. Creatures within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] take @Damage[9d8[mental]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[will|dc:30|basic] save. The unrisen can't use Agonized Howl again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Agonized Howl]]{1d4 rounds}.

Awful Approach.name: Awful Approach
Awful Approach.description:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The unrisen reshapes its grotesque form to move swiftly. It Strides twice. Any living creature that can see the unrisen during this movement must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure); this is a mental and visual effect.

Death Grip.name: Death Grip
Death Grip.description:
Requirements The unrisen has a living creature @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect The unrisen attempts to destroy its victim's life force so it shares in the unrisen's fate. The creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:30] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}. While the curse lasts, the creature regains only half as many HP from effects with both the healing and vitality traits; if it dies, any attempt to raise it from the dead causes it to return as an unrisen. The curse ends automatically if the creature's doomed value is reduced to 0.

Sceaduinar.name: Sceaduinar
Sceaduinar.publicNotes:
Strange creatures born from jagged crystals in the heart of the Void, sceaduinar are fueled by its void energy and driven to extinguish all life. Resembling crystalline gargoyles with serrated limbs and sharp, bat-like faces, sceaduinar stand about 7 feet tall and weigh around 100 pounds.

These malevolent beings sometimes gather in great packs of their own kind. Despite their intelligence, they act like cunning, feral beasts for the most part, though they occasionally build tools to aid them in extinguishing life. Sceaduinar sail through the great voids of their home plane, seeking to destroy any sparks of life that find their way into that deadly realm-even the twisted sparks found in undead creatures.

When they discover portals to other planes, sceaduinar swarm through in great numbers, slaughtering all they come across. While dwelling outside the Void is uncomfortable for sceaduinar, they can exist for extended periods of time apart from their home. Of course, the feeling of a plane where void energy isn't the rule doesn't improve these creatures' attitude, and as a result, they tend to be particularly cruel and violent when encountered in such realms.
Sceaduinar.allSaves: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 对抗魔法的全豁免+1状态加值 +1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic

Void Child.name: Void Child
Void Child.description: Sceaduinar have neither souls nor the ability to create. A sceaduinar is immune to effects that target a soul (such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.GYmXvS9NJ7QwfWGg]{Seize Soul} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.kqhPt9344UkcGVYO]{Resurrect} ritual) or that require knowledge of a creature's identity (such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.r784cIz17eWujtQj]{Scrying}), and critically fails Crafting checks.

Wing Flash.name: Wing Flash
Wing Flash.description:
Trigger A creature attempts a melee attack against a sceaduinar or an Acrobatics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.21WIfSu7Xd7uKqV8]{Tumble Through} the sceaduinar's space

Effect The sceaduinar flexes its wings to emit a brief pulse of void energy that deals @Damage[4d6[void]] damage to the triggering creature (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save).

Drain Life.name: Drain Life
Drain Life.description:
When the sceaduinar damages a living creature with its jaws Strike, the sceaduinar gains 5 temporary Hit Points and the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25|options:inflicts:drained] save or become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Further damage dealt to the creature by the sceaduinar increases the drained value by 1 on a failed save, to a maximum of drained 4.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.LRIYUFQ7FE9H4RWD]{Effect: Drain Life}

Entropic Touch.name: Entropic Touch
Entropic Touch.description: Void damage dealt by a sceaduinar damages undead and creatures with void healing as if it were vitality damage. The sceaduinar's melee Strikes have the benefits of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.JQdwHECogcTzdd8R]{Ghost Touch} property rune on attacks against incorporeal undead.

Grioth Scout.name: 格里欧斯斥侯 Grioth Scout
Grioth Scout.publicNotes:
在一个新的世界上最先遇到的格里欧斯是斥侯。斥侯通常经由单向传送门从他们的家园出发，在浩瀚的太空中旅行，格里欧斯斥侯从未期望再次看到他们的家园，因为格里欧斯领导层通过将他们搁置在新世界来确保对殖民化努力的真正奉献。

漂离其恒星轨道的行星在飘过黑色帷幕（Dark Tapestry）时变得寒冷而没有生命力。 这些死寂的世界被称为格里欧斯的可怕生物所觊觎，他们在这些漂泊的世界上忍受着可怕的寒冷，并将它们转化为专门供奉外神与旧日支配者中黑暗之神的行星神庙。从这些冰冻黑暗的堡垒中，格里欧斯寻找温暖的、有生命力的世界，通过禁忌的仪式将它们从各自的太阳上扯弄出来，这个过程往往需要数代之久。

一个邪教徒通常会带领一支格里欧斯斥侯队，这支队伍在农村居民区的边缘寻找一个废弃或被遗忘的地方作为他们最初的入侵点。经过数代人的努力，格里欧斯的定居点逐渐强大，并征服了周围的文化，最终，强大的格里欧斯从星空中降临，开始下一阶段的星球征服。

格里欧斯使用一种由颤音与咔嗒声组成的语言。它们虽能讲其他方言，但声音总是干涩、沙哑。

Echolocation (Precise) 20 feet.name: 回声定位（精准）20尺 Echolocation (Precise) 20 feet
Echolocation (Precise) 20 feet.description: 格里欧斯可以在所列范围内将其听觉视为精准感官。

No Breath.name: 无须呼吸 No Breath
No Breath.description: 格里欧斯除了说话外不呼吸，对需要呼吸的效果（如吸入性毒药）免疫。

Grioth Venom.name: 格里欧斯毒液 Grioth Venom
Grioth Venom.description:
豁免骰 @Check[fortitude|dc:17]

最大持续时间 6轮

阶段1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}（1轮）

阶段2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}（1轮）

阶段3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3}（1轮）

Shock Mind.name: 心灵震击 Shock Mind
Shock Mind.description:
格里欧斯斥侯用虚空玻璃武器进行一次打击。

如果打击命中，会造成额外@Damage[1d6[mental]]伤害，并且目标必须通过@Check[will|dc:17|traits:incapacitation]豁免（这具有失能特征），否则会@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]1轮。

Suli Dune Dancer.name: 巨灵裔沙丘舞者 Suli Dune Dancer
Suli Dune Dancer.publicNotes:
由于巨灵裔的巨灵祖先能在整个物质宇宙中游历，因此他们（凡人与由全部六种元素组成的小巨灵的后代）通常是对应位面上最常见的巨灵子嗣。他们通常会担任工匠和和平使者，被迫努力在这充满分歧的世界中带来和谐与平衡。

巨灵裔有一种其他巨灵子嗣无法比肩的天生魅力，但这通常会对他们那傲慢的自尊起到推波助澜的作用，甚至会让这种自大成为一种个人的怪癖或者诙谐的假象。巨灵裔之外的人很少能意识到，吹嘘并非是他们自我意识膨胀的症状，而是可以与人类诗歌比肩的文化习俗。巨灵裔的自夸不光用来美化自我，还有他们的伙伴和家人在历史上取得的成就，其最终目的是编制出能够让后世传颂的故事。而这种情况对于和其他巨灵子嗣一同生活的巨灵裔更甚，因为他们缺乏与元素位面的强烈联系而被看低一等。

巨灵裔的沙丘舞者只是这些巨灵子嗣和其他类人社会融合的方式。他们努力磨练自身的技巧，使自身达到能够增强旅伴的程度。沙漠地区之外的巨灵裔喜欢把名字改为和自身所处地形相仿的词汇，但不管他们喜好的是森林、丘陵还是极地荒原，他们的夸夸其谈总是极具说服力。

Elemental Bulwark.name: 元素壁垒 Elemental Bulwark
Elemental Bulwark.description:
触发 敌人将要以寒冷、电击或火焰或者具有气、土、火或水特征的法术伤害巨灵裔沙丘舞者

效果 巨灵裔沙丘舞者获得对抗触发伤害的2点抗力

Distracting Dance.name: 乱心之舞 Distracting Dance
Distracting Dance.description:
通过旋转身体或精妙的手部动作，巨灵裔沙丘舞者尝试分散30尺内1个生物的注意力。巨灵裔沙丘舞者尝试@Check[performance|against:perception]检定对抗目标的察觉DC。

大成功 目标陷入@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]并且察觉检定承受-2点环境减值，持续至巨灵裔沙丘舞者的下个回合结束为止。

成功 目标陷入措手不及，持续至巨灵裔沙丘舞者的当前回合结束为止。

大失败 巨灵裔沙丘舞者在对抗目标的攻击时陷入措手不及，持续至其下个回合结束为止。

Elemental Assault.name: 元素侵袭 Elemental Assault
Elemental Assault.description:
巨灵裔沙丘舞者的身体或武器充盈着元素魔法。巨灵裔沙丘舞者选择一种元素并且作出近战打击。打击造成额外1d4点指定类型的伤害，而且具有与对应元素相应的特征：

  • 气 电击

  • 土 钝击

  • 火 火焰

  • 金 挥砍

  • 水 寒冷

  • 木 命能

Vulpinal.name: Vulpinal
Vulpinal.publicNotes: Vulpinals serve as the cunning, clever musicians and minstrels of the agathions. Incredibly far-ranging, these foxlike humanoids love traveling to both learn and teach all the songs, dances, myths, and traditions they can fnd. Though they prefer traveling alone, vulpinals are extremely gregarious toward those they meet on their journeys. They enjoy participating in the festivities of cultures they encounter, and they're known to form small traveling groups of like-minded individuals if they believe that their shared expertise can prove benefcial.

Fox's Wile.name: Fox's Wile
Fox's Wile.description: A vulpinal's core value is cleverness. They can apply their knowledge and stories from their extensive travels to just about any situation in an instant. Before spending any other action on their turn, the vulpinal can @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} as a free action.

Morlock Tinkerer.name: Morlock Tinkerer
Morlock Tinkerer.publicNotes:
Most morlocks have little talent for crafting, but many have an uncanny knack for tinkering. The sounds of machinery and moving parts tend to attract them. These morlocks particularly enjoy the ticking sounds of clockworks. Many tales from Darklands travelers describe morlocks who are able to take used or disabled mechanical traps and restore them, seemingly for the morlock's own satisfaction more than any desire to use the device.

Morlocks descended from humans who were lost among the dark, tangled tunnels of the upper reaches of the Darklands thousands of generations ago. Their eyes grew large and pale to absorb any speck of illumination. Their frames became wiry from an altered diet and their arms grew long, becoming perfect for the uncanny, four-limbed shuffle that lets them traverse the subterranean passages. However, their forms hide their strength and swiftness. Morlocks no longer remember the lives their ancestors led on the surface, although many of them dwell in shattered ruins that were swallowed by the earth. Some morlocks worship the statues of humans from these bygone eras as gods, but others now venerate Lamashtu, Rovagug, or other violent deities.

Morlocks typically stands just over 5 feet tall and weigh roughly 150 pounds.
Morlock Tinkerer.allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. disease and poison

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Disease and P.name: +2 Status to All Saves vs. Disease and Poison

Instinctual Tinker.name: Instinctual Tinker
Instinctual Tinker.description:
The morlock tinkers with an adjacent construct or mechanical hazard. They attempt a @Check[crafting|defense:fortitude] check against the construct's or hazard's Fortitude DC. The morlock can't succeed if the target's level is more than double the morlock's.

Critical Success The target gains @Damage[4d6[healing]] Hit Points and a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls for 1 minute.

Success The target gains @Damage[2d6[healing]] Hit Points.

Critical Failure The morlock injures itself, taking @Damage[2d6] damage (typically bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing, but potentially a different type at the GM's discretion).

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.TEzLEXBZzNCp6flg]{Effect: Instinctual Tinker (Critical Success)}

Leap Attack.name: Leap Attack
Leap Attack.description:
The morlock Strides up to twice its Speed, during which it attempts a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2HJ4yuEFY1Cast4h]{High Jump} or a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. At any point during its movement, the morlock can make a melee Strike against an enemy in its reach.

The morlock then can't use Leap Attack for 1 round.

Sneak Attack.name: Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: A morlock's Strikes deal an extra 1d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Swarming Stance.name: Swarming Stance
Swarming Stance.description: A morlock can share the same space as another morlock, but no more than two morlocks can occupy the same space. When morlocks share the same space, they gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls.

Sakugami.name: Sakugami
Sakugami.publicNotes:
Sakugami are especially powerful kami who protect seasonally blossoming trees, particularly ones in places where the primeval powers of nature remain strong. The cycle of a barren tree bursting into a riot of flowers once a year, before those blossoms inevitably fade with the turning of the seasons, provides a striking visual metaphor for sakugami, whose association with this annual cycle of growth and decay grants them powers over time as well as nature. Also known as blossom kami, sakugami have a particular fascination with mortals. Many folk legends tell of sakugami who bestow their blessing upon worthy individuals who fight for just causes. In truth, while blossom kami are mesmerized by such mortals—seeing the essence of a flower in a short life devoted to bringing beauty and comfort to its surroundings—they're so rare and enigmatically aloof that few ever encounter them. Decades, even centuries, might pass before a humble village realizes that a sakugami has been watching over it.

The stories persist, however, as they have for ages, leading to a widespread appreciation for blossoming trees. The site of a new village might be chosen due to its proximity to an ancient wisteria, or a temple might be carefully constructed around a single young plum. As sakugami are most commonly associated with cherry trees, many larger population centers in Minkai will plant and carefully tend small groves of cherries, both for their beauty and out of respect for the blossom kami.

Kami are divine nature spirits from the lands of Tian Xia, far to the east of the Inner Sea region. They serve as guardians of natural objects and places they protect—their wards—and are ancient enemies of oni (Pathfinder Monster Core 252–255). Kami can merge with their wards, allowing them to surreptitiously watch anyone who treads upon their sacred grounds. Kami leave those who they deem harmless alone, but fight vigilantly to scare away anyone perceived as a threat.

Ward.name: Ward
Ward.description:
Every kami is bound to a ward: a specific animal, plant, object, or location. A kami can merge with or emerge from their ward as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. While merged, the kami can observe their surroundings with their usual senses as well as the senses of their ward, but can't move, communicate with, or control their ward. Additionally, a kami merged with their ward recovers Hit Points each minute as if they spent an entire day resting.

A sakugami's ward is typically a specific deciduous tree with seasonal blossoms, such as a chery, plum, or wisteria.

Sakugami's Foresight.name: Sakugami's Foresight
Sakugami's Foresight.description:
Trigger The sakugami is subject to a hostile action or needs to roll to defend itself

Effect The sakugami rolls twice and uses the higher result for its saving throw or other defense (a fortune effect) or forces the hostile creature or danger to roll twice and use the lower result for its attack roll or similar roll (a misfortune effect).

Fleeting Blossoms.name: Fleeting Blossoms
Fleeting Blossoms.description: A sakugami's staff Strikes stir up fleeting blossoms that bloom, wilt, and decay all in the space of an instant. On a hit, they deal an additional @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage, as well as an additional @Damage[1d6[void]] damage to living creatures and an additional @Damage[1d6[vitality]] damage to undead.

Swift Staff Strike.name: Swift Staff Strike
Swift Staff Strike.description: In a rapid series of movements, the sakugami unleashes a deadly assault. The sakugami makes three staff Strikes. The sakugami's multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after they've made all three Strikes.

Touch of Ages.name: Touch of Ages
Touch of Ages.description:
A sakugami's attacks bestow a curse that alters the very flow of time in those they attack. When a sakugami hits a creature with a melee Strike, the creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:36] save as its perspective shifts rapidly between that of advanced age and an infantile state. Regardless of the outcome, the creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2}, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, but the conditions are permanent.

Nosferatu Thrall.name: 诺斯费拉图血奴 Nosferatu Thrall
Nosferatu Thrall.publicNotes:
诺斯费拉图血奴是那些受缚于诺斯费拉图意志的凡人，虽然血奴不是不死生物，但它们通过非自然的方式生存：以他们主人的血液为食。

诺斯费拉图是一类古老的吸血鬼，源自远古大瘟疫中丧生的凡人。或许是因为它们的年龄，诺斯费拉图无法再创造更多的同类。

Mindbound.name: 心灵束缚 Mindbound
Mindbound.description: 诺斯费拉图主人对它们的血奴的思维进行了有效的控制。如果奴隶主之外的人将血奴选做了一个会给予他们@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]状态的效果的目标时，血奴的主人在骰反制检定对抗时的反制检定调整值为支配DC-10。

Rally.name: 集结 Rally
Rally.description:
触发 血奴在结束回合时距离它们的主人超过30尺

效果 血奴向它们的主人行走至多等同于他速度的距离。

Mortal Shield.name: 人肉护盾 Mortal Shield
Mortal Shield.description:
触发 血奴的主人将要受到打击或法术攻击的伤害，并且位与于血奴相邻的方格

效果 血奴扑向主人的身前，承受一半的伤害（分摊的伤害量采用原始造伤数值计算，分摊时不计任何弱点或抗性），血奴的主人承受任何剩下的伤害，（接下来）如常应用任何弱点和抗性。

Swing Back.name: 回摆 Swing Back
Swing Back.description:
频率 每轮一次

需求 诺斯费拉图血奴最后的动作是一次失手的巨木棒打击

效果 诺斯费拉图血奴进行针对同一个目标的另一次巨木棒打击，使用上次（失手的）打击的多重攻击减值。

Iceberg Clam.name: 冰山蚌 Iceberg Clam
Iceberg Clam.publicNotes:
虽说严格来说既不是冰山也不是蚌，但这种极具毁灭性的元素生物之所以得名"冰山蚌"，源于它天然的伪装和捕食习性。这个球形伏击者能随心所欲地操控周身水流的温度，甚至连构成自己身体的水也能加热或冷却——它会佯装成能让人暂避风浪的所在，把累透的泳客和随波逐流的船只骗来，再将它们包裹起来活活煮沸。

除非它在不久前刚进食、仍在消化食物，否则融化的冰山蚌在大片水域中几乎难以察觉。由于它无需耗费能量维持冰冻外壳，因此可以一连数周甚至数月不进食，随洋流漂流，直到下一个不幸的生物或船只闯入它的体内——并且永远无法离开。

Watery Body.name: 水体之躯 Watery Body
Watery Body.description: 冰山蚌可与其它生物占据同一空间，对其他生物而言，它所占据的区域视为困难地形。

Ambush Freeze.name: 伏击冻结 Ambush Freeze
Ambush Freeze.description:
需求 冰山蚌当前没有冰冻外壳

触发 一名敌人进入或试图离开冰山蚌的占据空间

效果 冰山蚌使用冰冻外壳能力。

Boil.name: 沸腾 Boil
Boil.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 冰山蚌占据空间内的所有生物受到@Damage[4d10[persistent,fire]]伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic]豁免）；若冰山蚌拥有冰冻外壳，则该外壳受到@Damage[20[fire]]伤害，且该伤害无视硬度。处于冰山蚌占据空间内的生物无法从此持续火焰伤害中恢复。

Frozen Shell.name: 冰冻外壳 Frozen Shell
Frozen Shell.description: 冰山蚌用一层冰冻外壳覆盖自身。只要冰冻外壳存在，冰山蚌占据空间内的所有生物都无法离开各自的空间。该外壳具有AC 10，硬度10以及60点生命值，并且免疫重击和精准伤害。若冰山蚌移动，被困在外壳内的所有生物会随之一起移动。当冰山蚌拥有冰冻外壳时，任何源自外壳外的攻击必须先瞄准壳。冰山蚌可以解消自己的冰冻外壳。若冰山蚌主动解消外壳，或外壳生命值降至0，则冰山蚌在接下来的[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Ambush Freeze or Frozen Shell]]{1d4轮}内无法再次使用伏击冻结或冰冻外壳。

Heated Jet.name: 炽流喷射 Heated Jet
Heated Jet.description:
需求 冰山蚌当前没有冰冻外壳

效果 冰山蚌借助一股超高温水流猛冲，沿直线移动至多60尺，并对路径上的所有生物造成@Damage[4d10[fire]]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic]豁免）。

Divoynik.name: 冒名怪 Divoynik
Divoynik.publicNotes:
当一个紧密团结的聚落中，某位深受爱戴的社区支柱被指控犯下滔天罪行时，整个聚落都会被撼动。被告坚称自己清白，但压倒性的证据令一切无可置疑。正义虽得以伸张，社区却已不可逆转地改变——昔日的睦邻氛围被挥之不去的猜疑取代，而这正是冒名怪最爱的养料。

冒名怪是恶毒的变形者，不仅能模仿其他生物的样貌，还能从受害者的脑海中攫取思想与记忆。即便死亡，冒名怪也会保留最近一次假扮的形象。诸如诚实之环之类的法术能看穿冒名怪的伪装，而真景术更能揭示其变形的本质，显露出它体表原本难以察觉的特征——那就像动物身上的条纹，在冒名怪的身体上若隐若现。除了魔法手段，遭遇冒名怪的人还有另一种可靠的辨认方法：尽管冒名怪在外形上与所模仿的对象别无二致，但其体内既没有血液，也没有心脏。

Cracked Mirror.name: 镜裂之弱 Cracked Mirror
Cracked Mirror.description: 当冒名怪以某个生物的形态出现时，它受到该生物的物理攻击时具有3点弱点；同时，被它模仿的那个生物在受到冒名怪的物理攻击时，也同样具有3点弱点。

Savor Anguish.name: 嗜痛之饲 Savor Anguish
Savor Anguish.description:
触发 冒名怪30尺内的某个生物在对抗情绪效果的豁免检定中失败

效果 冒名怪汲取该生物的心灵苦痛，获得5点临时生命值，持续最多1分钟。对同一生物的此类情绪汲取每24小时只能进行一次。

Sudden Betrayal.name: 突袭背信 Sudden Betrayal
Sudden Betrayal.description: 只要至少有一名敌人不知道冒名怪的真实本质，它在先攻检定时总是可以使用欺骗技能。若冒名怪在先攻时使用了欺骗，并且在战斗的第一轮，那么尚未行动的敌人面对它的攻击时均处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]。

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description:
